Hello,
This is one of the most difficult emails I’ve had to write.
The 50-year precedent set by _Roe v. Wade_ is on the verge of being overturned. The Supreme Court’s draft decision would overturn the basic right to abortion and bodily autonomy.
**I won’t mince words: a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions is under a full-fledged attack at the Supreme Court — and in states like New Hampshire.**
Anticipating the end of Roe, partisan politicians across the country are launching unprecedented efforts to eviscerate reproductive rights.
In state legislatures, Republicans have passed legislation defunding Planned Parenthood, banning abortion, and mandating unnecessary ultrasounds.
**Republicans are also fighting harder than ever to flip swing seats like mine to pack the Senate with anti-choice policymakers.**
**[I will always keep fighting to protect reproductive rights — no matter what attacks come my way. Will you join me by splitting an urgent donation of $5 between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46665687/351250211/-376037004?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3490-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTU0Mzg0MC0wN2VmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7TydNtZ1vYfGB6-zKaE7ilgimf-ZWnEaubj9lW8eNRc=)**

name: FBI Warrant
subject: the face of tyranny
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michigan for Ryan D
body:
You read that right. The FBI sent people to my home to arrest me.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z15mup4r870mql63asm9itts520hjl1954803ao0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5climeoj2cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65shhcjhbcddn6pgnepj16qrr9dtmcgpjed72maoecthl6pirepblepp7cctlmpjrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33d5lmgo74dr66jgb6p9nm2qmash5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2pg137dvdefcp78o8dba5717lb5bprm43lm8ba8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5climeoj2cth2bs)
---
| | Friend, The FBI just showed up. You read that right. _**The FBI sent people to my home to arrest me. **_ This is face of tyranny and government overreach. Anyone who has followed our campaign knows I am prepared to give my life fighting against this exact oppression. But let me back up. My name is Ryan Kelley. You've probably never heard of me, or at least hadn't heard of me before today when my name and picture was splashed across every news outlet in the country. Thats ok. The media and the establishment swamp have tried to pretend I don't exist, but I am now leading in the polls to be the Republican nominee for Governor in Michigan. **That's right. Governor. In Michigan. A state where election fraud happened and Trump's victory was stolen...and Biden's DOJ just had me arrested. ** I started this campaign for a simple reason. The government's grip on the throat of its citizenry has grown so tight as to make our republic unrecognizable. When the COVID lockdowns came to Michigan and the "vaccine passport", and "rules for thee but not for me" crowd unconstitutionally locked us in our homes and closed businesses and took away our rights--I stood up. I stood up. And this is what happens when you stand up to tyranny in Biden's America. _I will never bend the knee to tyrants. I don't think you will either. _ There is a simple answer. We beat them. We beat them at the ballot box so badly that they can't cheat. They can't steal it. We beat them so badly that no government, no political party, no deep state operative _**will ever, ever forget the consequence of oppressing the will of the people**_ and attempting to steal our God-given rights. _I need_ _your_ _help_. [I need you to make a donation right now and help me fight back. I have no intention of letting up now. ](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi9s19hp6u8h7987ls9l0jv30iaitpgmt25is2pg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5climeoj2cth2bs) That they're trying to throw me in prison shows they're scared. You know what will scare them more? A war chest unrivaled in history. A war chest that says every man and woman across this country who believes in liberty and the rights of the people are standing arm-in-arm ready to defend those rights. You've probably never gotten a letter from a political prisoner, but you're getting one now. The question is: _What will you do next?_ Will you delete this email and go back to your day waiting around for them to take away your next freedom? Maybe your second and first amendment rights next? Or will you [click the link, make a donation, and be part of the true grassroots movement that is building here](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpbuv73ammq4v68ilaunhn54cmut5e1m0ibjlu18_rp22sh2s8i66pb5climeoj2cth2bs)? I've made it clear where I stand. I will not back down. I will not stop defending OUR rights. Yours and mine. I need you to commit, right now. Click the link, make as generous a donation as you can. **They want us silent. They want us on our knees.** Stand up. Stand with me. Get involved right now, while there is still time.
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl6gnee12t2a0usf1kcc4ov5m0g7u90ok2bjri2g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5climeoj2cth2bs)
---
Ryan D. Kelley,
Political prisoner and candidate for Governor.
---

---

When the COVID lockdowns came to Michigan and the "vaccine passport", and "rules for thee but not for me" crowd unconstitutionally locked us in our homes and closed businesses and took away our rights--I stood up. I stood up. And this is what happens when you stand up to tyranny in Biden's America. I will never bend the knee to tyrants. I don't think you will either. There is a simple answer. We beat them. We beat them at the ballot box so badly that they can't cheat. They can't steal it. We beat them so badly that no government, no political party, no deep state operative will ever, ever forget the consequence of oppressing the will of the people and attempting to steal our God-given rights. I need your help. That they're trying to throw me in prison shows they're scared. You know what will scare them more? A war chest unrivaled in history. A war chest that says every man and woman across this country who believes in liberty and the rights of the people are standing arm-in-arm ready to defend those rights. You've probably never gotten a letter from a political prisoner, but you're getting one now. The question is: What will you do next? Will you delete this email and go back to your day waiting around for them to take away your next freedom? Maybe your second and first amendment rights next? Or will you ? I've made it clear where I stand. I will not back down. I will not stop defending OUR rights. Yours and mine. I need you to commit, right now. Click the link, make as generous a donation as you can. They want us silent. They want us on our knees. Stand up. Stand with me. Get involved right now, while there is still time. Ryan D. name: Rand Paul
subject: It’s more than 8.6%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
Friend, did you hear? Inflation has reached a four-decade high. It's over 8.6% OVERALL, but we know the reality is much higher.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z969d3pkd8e579mc64c8c4shkkluoe5qbbkmald0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ulr66o30mjijfdbme4pjbddkcpgj1cj168oj6dtnm4q7csbicdqb2p31c5oe1o37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmiqr8c3i6tj39p5lmorr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5climapr2clj649fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6cddlpi25014m5tej14sdatvlimivivpo635aco_rp22sh2s8i66pb5climeoj5cph2bs)
---
Friend, did you hear? Inflation has reached a four-decade high. It's over 8.6% OVERALL, but we know the reality is much higher.
* Gas prices have almost doubled in the last 2 years.
* Rent is higher than ever.
* Real estate keeps going up.
* Cars - even used cars - are the most expensive they've ever been.

And the Democrat plan is to JUST KEEP SPENDING! We cannot afford to do that, friend. We need to rein in this unreasonable spending and my Six Penny Plan is the only budget on the map.
---
[**STAND WITH RAND: STOP INFLATION**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zskde4thrnp5t52k9k8n69oee0q7rmabe4ll0p38_rp22sh2s8i66pb5climeoj5cph2bs)
---
The truth is, this ever-increasing inflation is stealing every American’s purchasing power and financial security. The national debt is devaluing our currency. It’s leading America down the path toward socialism. It’s a CRISIS and it HAS TO STOP. **We cannot keep ignoring this problem at the expense of taxpayers that’s why I’ve introduced the SIX PENNY PLAN to put our nation on track to solve the spending and inflation crisis that Congress has created.** If you agree, I need you to chip in NOW to help me pass my plan.
---
[**DONATE: $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z63rqfbi11hf94idc2lga81ma3vl1he4pvba62dg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5climeoj5cph2bs)
---
[**DONATE: $75**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoedohvp4no5kruj4ae52st1kv1qqbfk5pd8inog_rp22sh2s8i66pb5climeoj5cph2bs)
---
[**DONATE: $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrbtm60sko41ip6tlico7e1ba5p2859ent45vekg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5climeoj5cph2bs)
---
[**DONATE: $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ahi3b9djvg86bjp3f31a9nr3blke9epimi16go_rp22sh2s8i66pb5climeoj5cph2bs)
---
If we don’t intervene now, this is all going to get a whole lot worse. _The Congressional Budget Office estimates Biden's newest spending plan will add $3 trillion to the debt. The consequences will be devastating._ That's why we have no choice but to take back the Senate, pass my six penny plan, and end this nonsense. **I’m committed to doing everything I can to get it done, but I need you on my side, too.****_Will you help by chipping in now?:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfu6tll5jsm5u6olleb654sc0e9o9vaivs2pssqg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5climeoj5cph2bs)_**
In liberty, Rand Paul

body:

Patriot,

This is former Navy SEAL, Morgan Luttrell, in the MUST-WIN Texas 8th District Election.

I'm reaching out to you today so that I can humbly ask for your help.

We're only days away from this critical race being over -- and we're falling behind.

That's why I'm asking for your help -- [**will you chip in just $10 bucks by midnight tonight to help fuel our grassroots campaign, win this critical election, and finally end Nancy Pelosi 's control of Washington?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60615339:JLvggSoNf:m:1:3299561967:D16528857CE42F6698AE4B72FE9FF172:r)

I know we ask a lot -- but that's only because everything is on the line.

**We 've seen President Trump's America First Agenda work... and the only way to get our country back is to win this race.**

Our campaign is fueled by grassroots patriots like you... **but time is running out.**

**Voters are already planning to head to the polls. Help before it 's too late:**

Thank you for your support -- it means everything to me.

name: Team DeSantis
subject: The Ron DeSantis Round Up
body:
Check out what the campaign has been up to this week.
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bd256639e227b8e143388760ec4108b087ca4dcaa632d1809d1f13de1d0a1d1e57a8c9290f93c0b37e5ee94f7677f72037a7f57ffceadc994d0038319b800cb4)
---

**Welcome to the Ron DeSantis Round Up where we help you stay up-to-date with America's favorite Governor!**
---
|
---
Governor DeSantis was invited to speak at the Jewish Leadership Conference last weekend in New York City to share the success of Florida's blueprint for protecting religious freedom. New York politicians and Leftists tried to pressure the venue to cancel the event, but Governor DeSantis stood strong and told the packed crowd, _" They tried to cancel me. But here I stand."_
---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bd256639e227b8e169c361e2d8bfbb67f809fba325964b9d29a694ffe124edfb1861264c86f6893adfda80a196f631200c7e9a94c83c81c1a33daf24b69848f0)
---

---
|
---

On Wednesday, Governor DeSantis launched the DeSantis Education Agenda, a blueprint for pro-parent school board candidates and members in Florida. The program is a statewide agenda for school board candidates and members who are committed to empowering the role of parents in their children's education and preventing far-Left agendas from infiltrating the state's public school systems. Every parent in Florida should ask their school board candidates if they have pledged to support the DeSantis Education Agenda.
_**" Florida has delivered the most student-focused, parent-centered education agenda in the nation at a time when curriculum in states around the country are being used as opportunities to indoctrinate innocent children." -- Governor Ron DeSantis**_
Read more about the initiative in __**[The Federalist](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bd256639e227b8e1ba8fab0cdca8978c994a3fff0721b11af40ce518ea07e2385987e78788e078f467dd622026a4fee82b7d1bbf444b63d9c2cb8fc68a7746a2 "The Federalist")**__.
__**[Help Governor DeSantis in his mission to protect Florida children-- chip in here.](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bd256639e227b8e1839de4488d0d8ebc47dedcf7f5ac41a042b142cd4ed5c1e34b8fc3e4fc4a3687d62d26a324fae4ec4fe37b9b659abc2e3c9c23e1051e2540 "Help Governor DeSantis in his mission to protect Florida children, chip in here.")**__

---
|
---

Last week, America's favorite First Lady was honored with the Woman of Inspiration Award in Fort Myers. Read more from __**[Fox News](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bd256639e227b8e1cd6f1e11fc684bc4910e3b2bb0e1e3317657ea69141903b976adad7763d03a5907ed28a08bebd7cc33acbc3de1fac093c0657edc32dfa657 "Fox News")**__.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bd256639e227b8e1ae1354c5d3a429f3ce5c06187328c87082aa867f47aa466f162c2c7cf70f1e741baf2be77e37e67f87b84577261610ee6b37e1878c09383a)
---

---
|
---

Governor DeSantis announced the re-establishment of the Florida State Guard, an emergency-focused civilian volunteer force. By bringing back the Florida State Guard, Florida now joins 22 other states and territories with state-level defense forces. Florida will add 400 members to the Guard to respond to this year's hurricane season, and more than 1,200 individuals have already expressed interest in joining.
_**" The U.S. military has been kicking out great service members over the Biden administration's unacceptable COVID vaccine mandate, and they are even targeting members of the National Guard. The bureaucrats in D.C. who control our National Guard have also refused to increase the number of guardsmen despite our increasing population, leaving Florida with the second worst National Guardsmen to resident ratio. By reestablishing the Florida State Guard under the leadership of Lieutenant Colonel Graham, we have a great opportunity to expand our capability to help people in times of need or disaster." -- Governor Ron DeSantis**_
---
|
---
_**" There are more than 18 million children in our country who live without a father in their home. This has a severe impact on children, and often leads to dropping out of school, crime, and substance abuse. Incredibly, there are those who diminish the importance of fatherhood and the nuclear family -- we will not let that happen in our state. I am proud to say we are doing everything we can to support involved fatherhood in Florida." -- Governor Ron DeSantis**_

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=073821980ca5b8ff5a9952aaa15be462f51396552f12dd44b73f383768951685a559e159cb8a02d90d587ca2a5acb6c09dc014c4e504b99efd4b475877dba3f4)
---

Read more about Governor DeSantis's efforts to tackle the fatherlessness crisis in __**[The Daily Wire](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=073821980ca5b8ff212f7dd32ece329c4d9c4115d83c2ac2559d5c662b0bd799921ef9b0ebd56fd729734bc38958c735127c551e39e088ad2903b72b75e026c4 "The Daily Wire")**__.

---
|
---

I am proud to say we are doing everything we can to support involved fatherhood in Florida." -- Governor Ron DeSantis | Read more about Governor DeSantis's efforts to tackle the fatherlessness crisis in "The Daily Wire". | ICYMI: Team DeSantis dropped our new Top Gov merchandise line that was featured on Fox and Friends! 👀 Go Mach 10 for freedom and secure exclusive Top Gov merch on our official storefront NOW! ⬇️ ✈️ | | If the Left is having a spasm about you -- you're winning. Watch Governor DeSantis's mic drop moment of the week below! 🔥 🔥 🔥 | | The Freedom Team is a growing movement of supporters who refuse to live by the Democrat lockdown rules. We are people who love freedom and the ability to do what's right for our families. Become a member of the DeSantis Freedom Team today -- help recruit new supporters to the team and get rewarded in the process. Rewards range from t-shirts to an invitation for an event and a photo with Governor DeSantis and the First Lady. "Don't wait - join the DeSantis Freedom Team TODAY!" | Gov. body:

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46670140/351270747/1401769761?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220618_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTRjMjVlZi0wZWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JKag2R57GR6I3mEsfijzCoqlLx65K45X9XD6XmwWLgY=)

Friend,
On January 1, 1863, the Emancipation Proclamation legally established the freedom of all enslaved people in the Confederate States, yet it wasn’t until two years later, on June 19, 1865, that the last enslaved people in Galveston, Texas were notified that they were free.
This Monday, we will celebrate Juneteenth, our most recent federal holiday, as a day that marked a major turning point in the fight for Black emancipation in the era of slavery. Last year, I was proud to help pass legislation making Juneteenth a federal holiday.
But the fight for a true multiracial democracy is not over. When I proudly co-authored the _Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act_ to strengthen our democracy and protect the right to vote, Senate Republicans filibustered it like some scene out of the Civil Rights Era.
On Monday, those same Republicans will release statements honoring Juneteenth while supporting legislation that makes it harder for Black and brown people to vote.
**[In honor of Juneteenth and the work we still have ahead, will you add your name next to mine to call on Congress to pass comprehensive voting rights legislation to protect the right to vote for every American?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46670141/351270748/-1283567266?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220618_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTRjMjVlZi0wZWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JKag2R57GR6I3mEsfijzCoqlLx65K45X9XD6XmwWLgY=&emci=76a5d2d4-49ee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=de4c25ef-0eef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=24719896)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46670142/351270749/-1283567266?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220618_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTRjMjVlZi0wZWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JKag2R57GR6I3mEsfijzCoqlLx65K45X9XD6XmwWLgY=&emci=76a5d2d4-49ee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=de4c25ef-0eef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=24719896)**
As a member of Congress, I will never stop fighting back against these attempts to turn back the clock on civil rights.
I appreciate your support. Thank you for standing with me.
Onward,
Mondaire

body:

But while the defendants have the mic right now, we need your help to build our movement’s strength — and show that Georgia voters have our support. [_**We’re going to make sure that the defendants in this trial don’t get the final word. And with the support of grassroots donors like you, we can continue to power this work, fight back, and win. Please chip in a $20 contribution or anything you can to support the fight to protect our democracy in Georgia and across the country.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46670884/351272640/-1655330128?amount=20&refcode=em_20220618_f_f_trial_s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjY4MGY3OC0wZmVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6RW8js70fAnPMMCNEhE034INsRJPedfTqhGU4ZJNhxE=) We’ve said this from the start: Any effort to suppress the vote will be met with a fight. name: Jodi Picoult
subject: angry but not helpless
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Let me be clear: we absolutely cannot afford to lose a single pro-choice voice in the Senate.
| | |
---
I’m angry that the Supreme Court is on the verge of overturning Roe v. Wade, everyone, and I hope you are too.
But I’m also terrified. Terrified because a public poll for New Hampshire’s Senate race shows that Republicans could also very well unseat Democrat Maggie Hassan.
Let me be clear: **We absolutely cannot afford to lose a single pro-choice voice in the Senate. **
**Maggie won her last race by just 1,017 votes. It’s not a stretch to say that everything we do (or worse,_don’t_ do) to support her campaign could make or break this race. [That’s why I’m asking to please rush $3 or whatever you can to help her get reelected.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46672187/351277260/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1164-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGVjOWJhMy0wZmVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7jVn-QOzVel8LiuKJhcf--bKcgylpWXBC9T2W-E-oRI=)**
I’ve known Maggie for a long time, and she’s always been an advocate for women and a fantastic Senator for the Granite State. Now more than ever before, we need to elect an advocate for middle-class families, women’s rights and affordable health care. But her race will be extremely tight, and she can’t win without our help.
It’s okay to be angry, but we can’t be helpless. **[That’s why your donation – $3 or whatever you can – to Maggie’s campaign is so important right now. subject: Wishing you (and my husband Chris) a happy Father’s Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Chris’s fight for our common good is about making this country a better place for the next generation.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46673099/351281166/1383944506?refcode=em_surv_2022.06.18_b1_zb_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTllNjNkYy0xMWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tbx4z95vDwsgxqOSDIWia_LamG9gbaz4m-LdRpK98cQ=) Hey Derek, I’m Zoë, Chris’s wife. Chris is busy hanging out with our kids, so I thought I would take a moment to wish all of you a happy Father’s Day weekend.

When Chris and I met in law school a decade ago, I could never have imagined the journey we would take. It’s been an honor watching him grow as a leader, as a public servant, and above all, **as an incredible father to our three young children** – and he’s a pretty great dog dad to our pup, Yankee Doodle, too. 😉

Chris demonstrates compassion, honesty, and determination with every decision he makes. He never loses sight of what matters most, not just for our family but for all of the families here in western Pennsylvania.

**Chris’s fight for our common good is about making this country a better place for the next generation – including for our children.**

**[I’m hoping you’ll help me wish Chris a happy Father’s Day by taking a moment to sign this Father’s Day card!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46673100/351281167/-1335952706?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTllNjNkYy0xMWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tbx4z95vDwsgxqOSDIWia_LamG9gbaz4m-LdRpK98cQ=&emci=829dcbb2-8fee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=459e63dc-11ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=13185894)** | [SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46673101/351281168/-1335952706?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTllNjNkYy0xMWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tbx4z95vDwsgxqOSDIWia_LamG9gbaz4m-LdRpK98cQ=&emci=829dcbb2-8fee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=459e63dc-11ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=13185894)
---
I’m going to get back to celebrating with our family now, but again, I want to wish all of the dads, uncles, grandpas, and father-figures a very Happy Father’s Day!

Zoë

__ | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Update on our budget numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| Hi Peter, Meteorologist and Democratic candidate for Congress, Eric Sorensen here. Earlier this week I shared that we were $35,788 away from closing our budget. Today’s update: $24,873 to go. A good first step! I’ve promised no exaggerations throughout this campaign, so that’s a real update. Once it’s raised, that’s it, I’m done asking for money. And my hope is that we can raise it quickly, allowing more time and energy for our whole team to focus on talking with voters. So what’s in the budget? Our latest poll shows that I lead by 4% in the initial head to head, but after voters learn that I’m their trusted weatherman and a scientist, **then my lead grows to 7%**. And to educate them, we put together a great TV ad to run across the district, watch here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/forecast](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46662743/351238859/1975073682?refcode=genemjune18&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGEzZGJkMS1lZmVlLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCce5-hVe_d2-1mll73Q2TIWGd5QXXCBqlPxL3jlRRY=) We know that if we keep running our ad on TVs across the district, we will win this race. And that’s how you can help: every contribution makes sure that we’re able to **fully fund our plan to WIN.** I hope that you’ll contribute to our efforts. clean_body: | Hi Peter, Meteorologist and Democratic candidate for Congress, Eric Sorensen here. Earlier this week I shared that we were $35,788 away from closing our budget. Today’s update: $24,873 to go. A good first step! I’ve promised no exaggerations throughout this campaign, so that’s a real update. Once it’s raised, that’s it, I’m done asking for money. And my hope is that we can raise it quickly, allowing more time and energy for our whole team to focus on talking with voters. So what’s in the budget? Our latest poll shows that I lead by 4% in the initial head to head, but after voters learn that I’m their trusted weatherman and a scientist, then my lead grows to 7%. And to educate them, we put together a great TV ad to run across the district, watch here: = We know that if we keep running our ad on TVs across the district, we will win this race. And that’s how you can help: every contribution makes sure that we’re able to fully fund our plan to WIN. I hope that you’ll contribute to our efforts. I’m the science communicator running on the trust I’ve built in our community – that’s a real promise. $24,873 to go. This is your chance to share the issues that matter to you most and your concerns for the future.| | | Peter, In the years since Donna left office, she’s traveled across Maryland — and nationwide — hearing from voters of all backgrounds. We’re running a grassroots-driven campaign, so your input is important. This is your chance to share the issues that matter to you most and your concerns for the future. | | Your thoughts guide our work, Peter, so thank you. Team Edwards | | | | | Congresswoman Donna Edwards is a proven progressive leader and a fighter with the clout and experience to deliver for Maryland’s 4th Congressional District from day one. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Congress must investigate the NRA.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DAN GOLDMAN FOR NY
body:
Peter,

Our grocery stores, our houses of worship, and our schools are under attack. Americans are dying in horrific acts of gun violence that are preventable.

I’m calling for an immediate Congressional investigation into the role of the NRA and gun manufacturers in mass shootings, and for Congress to repeal immunity for gun manufacturers and dealers. Join me by adding your name here >>> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QIVrgJ6WlEibnPv7svRL1Q2]

Sign On → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QIVrgJ6WlEibnPv7svRL1Q2]

The overwhelming majorities of voters, including Republicans and gun owners, believe in universal background checks and other gun legislation opposed by the gun lobby. Yet the Republican Party shows more loyalty to the NRA and the gun manufacturers than their own constituents. And thanks to a GOP-backed law, gun manufacturers and distributors have federal immunity from lawsuits.

We can’t sit back and watch this epidemic of gun violence continue, and we can’t keep trying to solve it with the same tired playbook. We must tackle this issue from different angles, including by investigating the NRA and gun manufacturers and distributors to see what their role is in the mass shooting epidemic.

Join me in demanding immediate action by signing my petition here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QIVrgJ6WlEibnPv7svRL1Q2]

Thanks for your support,

Dan

Donate Now → [htpps://secure.actblue.com/donate/goldman-em-q22022?refcode=em_GLD_PET_InvestigateNRApet_061822_actives_EB&amount=25]

Dan Goldman is running for Congress to protect our democracy and defend our fundamental rights at a moment when there have never been greater threats to both.

Paid for by DAN GOLDMAN FOR NY
Dan Goldman for NY
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008

subject: Biden’s DOJ just had me arrested
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michigan for Ryan D
body:
You read that right. The FBI sent people to my home to arrest me. This is face of tyranny and government overreach.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhot88tru788c3u9mqc0si3ah3lfplub1hn04q3o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbonfcrgsqrr1d1ksgr60olgclpm8tr5mlhmdd3lc6orec5i65j76p73ckqjbcdn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6lj33c5lm9jr4cr666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933climaor1c5j6aoh5u)

---
| | Friend, The FBI just showed up. You read that right. _**The FBI sent people to my home to arrest me. **_ This is face of tyranny and government overreach. Anyone who has followed our campaign knows I am prepared to give my life fighting against this exact oppression. But let me back up. My name is Ryan Kelley. You've probably never heard of me, or at least hadn't heard of me before today when my name and picture was splashed across every news outlet in the country. Thats ok. The media and the establishment swamp have tried to pretend I don't exist, but I am now leading in the polls to be the Republican nominee for Governor in Michigan. **That's right. Governor. In Michigan. A state where election fraud happened and Trump's victory was stolen...and Biden's DOJ just had me arrested. ** I started this campaign for a simple reason. The government's grip on the throat of its citizenry has grown so tight as to make our republic unrecognizable. When the COVID lockdowns came to Michigan and the "vaccine passport", and "rules for thee but not for me" crowd unconstitutionally locked us in our homes and closed businesses and took away our rights--I stood up. I stood up. And this is what happens when you stand up to tyranny in Biden's America. _I will never bend the knee to tyrants. I don't think you will either. _ There is a simple answer. We beat them. We beat them at the ballot box so badly that they can't cheat. They can't steal it. We beat them so badly that no government, no political party, no deep state operative _**will ever, ever forget the consequence of oppressing the will of the people**_ and attempting to steal our God-given rights. _I need_ _your_ _help_. [I need you to make a donation right now and help me fight back. I have no intention of letting up now. ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5ma0spq2nv95l29k6js8hc2utm98ank0ju5ph1g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clhm2ob6clh2bs) That they're trying to throw me in prison shows they're scared. You know what will scare them more? A war chest unrivaled in history. A war chest that says every man and woman across this country who believes in liberty and the rights of the people are standing arm-in-arm ready to defend those rights. You've probably never gotten a letter from a political prisoner, but you're getting one now. The question is: _What will you do next?_ Will you delete this email and go back to your day waiting around for them to take away your next freedom? Maybe your second and first amendment rights next? Or will you [click the link, make a donation, and be part of the true grassroots movement that is building here](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3ra48logpd7n96ej2f3nr042428cd8c5jdmabmo_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clhm2ob6clh2bs)? I've made it clear where I stand. I will not back down. I will not stop defending OUR rights. Yours and mine. I need you to commit, right now. Click the link, make as generous a donation as you can. **They want us silent. They want us on our knees.** Stand up. Stand with me. Get involved right now, while there is still time.
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsl116v20j6jfo76tf12kd0ohjjpvqii8f503uso_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clhm2ob6clh2bs)

Political prisoner and candidate for Governor.

Here are the highlights from a recent article in Blue Tent about Reproductive Freedom for All’s campaign: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46677765/351299555/360116050?refcode=E16272-20220618-RFFASplitFR-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjViMWRmMy0xYWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z9na3ai3nz7gEAg2KXSMrRkvf_LIXxmD0r14ycZfqWc=) [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46677766/351299556/360116050?refcode=E16272-20220618-RFFASplitFR-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjViMWRmMy0xYWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z9na3ai3nz7gEAg2KXSMrRkvf_LIXxmD0r14ycZfqWc=) With this _historic_ ballot measure campaign, we have a real opportunity to give deciding power _back_ to voters — _and save abortion access in the event Roe v. Wade is overturned._**Fairness Project and Reproductive Freedom for All are working together on this.** **Fairness Project is supporting RFFA _and_ looking for other states where a similar campaign is viable, while RFFA mobilizes Michiganders in-state! ** [_**Will you split a donation to both of these organizations today, team, and boost the efforts of all aspects of our operations to save abortion rights?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46677767/351299557/360116050?refcode=E16272-20220618-RFFASplitFR-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjViMWRmMy0xYWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z9na3ai3nz7gEAg2KXSMrRkvf_LIXxmD0r14ycZfqWc=) [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46677768/351299558/360116050?refcode=E16272-20220618-RFFASplitFR-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjViMWRmMy0xYWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z9na3ai3nz7gEAg2KXSMrRkvf_LIXxmD0r14ycZfqWc=) These campaigns _take a lot of resources._ **The more than 30,000 folks in Michigan who’ve signed up to collect signatures for this ballot measure will tell you the same!** We have big plans to increase our efforts across the country as the Supreme Court prepares to strike down _Roe v. Wade._ **There is a path forward here,_and this is an essential part of it!_** [_**So will you back us up and support these efforts by splitting a donation between Fairness Project and RFFA today, team?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46677769/351299559/360116050?refcode=E16272-20220618-RFFASplitFR-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjViMWRmMy0xYWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z9na3ai3nz7gEAg2KXSMrRkvf_LIXxmD0r14ycZfqWc=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation

Friend,

_**Thank you for joining the fight to SAVE ARIZONA.**_

In this election, we have a choice. We can either move forward in freedom and prosperity or continue to head down a dark path towards _**authoritarian socialism.**_

_For me, the choice is clear. We must retake our country, but to do that, we need to reclaim our**Senate Majority first.**_ That's why I have launched our **Official Reclaim the Senate Fund.** We will save our country, and it starts here in Arizona.
**[RECLAIM THE SENATE>>](https://click.email.blakemasters.com/?qs=4e3cb3c0f9099b726b6601e56233e703c5dcbbacb6c690542af18bcef1ebf831ad15b50947154179b8563b4ca10f4c718e11d319172dca8a)**
We have already seen what Democrats want the future of America to be. A country without rule of law, where mob violence is not just tolerated but openly encouraged. They want you dependent on the government in every aspect of your life. __**We cannot let that become our future.**__

_Every single dollar contributed to our_ _**Official Reclaim the Senate Fund**_ will go towards staving off socialism in America and FIGHTING FOR PROSPERITY. I need every patriot like YOU to step up today or risk another two years of liberal rule.
**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to our Official Reclaim the Senate Fund to help me save Arizona and retake the Senate.>>](https://click.email.blakemasters.com/?qs=4e3cb3c0f9099b726b6601e56233e703c5dcbbacb6c690542af18bcef1ebf831ad15b50947154179b8563b4ca10f4c718e11d319172dca8a)**

name: Team Kermit
subject: He wants to stop mail-in-voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:
As a child, Dr. Kermit would tag along when his parents went to vote — and they’d teach him of times not long ago, when his grandparents were subject to literacy tests and denied access to the ballot box. | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46679378/351301780/-1221368887?refcode=fl_email_ta_20220618VPP_tk_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTNkZjQ1NC0xY2VmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QYbTtDReqLiyld_v2-PeHPkFmqkgayjeaPpEpBoUEQQ=)
---
This November, a lot is on the line, including the basis of our democracy: voting rights. As a child, Dr. Kermit would tag along when his parents went to vote — and they’d teach him of times not long ago, before his ancestors had the right to vote, and when his grandparents were subject to literacy tests and denied access to the ballot box. That changed when Democrats passed the Voting Rights Act of 1965. **Now, the GOP is finding new ways to chip away at democracy** — from voter ID laws and gerrymandering to closing polling places in Black neighborhoods and spreading lies about voter fraud. **Dr. Kermit is running to champion the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act** and put an end to these discriminatory practices. **His opponent, Kevin Kiley, has questioned the validity of the 2020 election and is running on a platform of _revoking mail-in-voting._** **[Will you split a donation between Dr. Kermit’s campaign and Voter Protection Project to keep up the fight for voting rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46679379/351301781/1478754298?refcode=fl_email_ta_20220618VPP_tk_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTNkZjQ1NC0xY2VmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QYbTtDReqLiyld_v2-PeHPkFmqkgayjeaPpEpBoUEQQ=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: As a child, Dr. Kermit would tag along when his parents went to vote — and they’d teach him of times not long ago, when his grandparents were subject to literacy tests and denied access to the ballot box. | | = This November, a lot is on the line, including the basis of our democracy: voting rights. As a child, Dr. Kermit would tag along when his parents went to vote — and they’d teach him of times not long ago, before his ancestors had the right to vote, and when his grandparents were subject to literacy tests and denied access to the ballot box. That changed when Democrats passed the Voting Rights Act of 1965. Now, the GOP is finding new ways to chip away at democracy — from voter ID laws and gerrymandering to closing polling places in Black neighborhoods and spreading lies about voter fraud. Dr. Kermit is running to champion the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and put an end to these discriminatory practices. His opponent, Kevin Kiley, has questioned the validity of the 2020 election and is running on a platform of revoking mail-in-voting. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = In solidarity, Team Kermit | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California's 3rd District. = | = | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. But Republicans and their special-interest friends are funneling cash every day to defeat Sean and take back our House Majority. He’s counting on grassroots supporters like you to keep this campaign running strong. Will you chip in $10 before midnight to power Sean’s campaign and protect our House Majority? | = | | PAID FOR BY SEAN PATRICK MALONEY FOR CONGRESS Sean Patrick Maloney for Congress P.O. Box #270 Newburgh, NY 12551 United States We’d really be crushed to see you go, but you can click here to .

name: Nan Whaley
subject: Gun violence is a huge problem in America. We can change that.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Whaley/Stephens
body:
Team,
In 2022, there have been more mass shootings in our country than there have been days in the year.
That number is devastating and we’re not talking about statistics. We’re talking about lives.
All across the country, including here in Ohio, people are demanding action, just as we did after a mass shooting in Dayton that left nine people dead. As mayor of Dayton at the time, I saw the horror and heartbreak that shooting brought on our community first-hand.
There are commonsense measures we can take to reduce gun violence – measures like universal background checks which I support, along with the majority of Ohioans and many other Democrats running for governor in states across the country. And since Republicans across the country have slowed this kind of action, it’s up to us.
**[I’m running for governor because I believe that Ohio deserves better – including better leadership on addressing the gun violence epidemic in our country. If you agree, chip in $5 to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46680373/351302937/-293918599?refcode=nw_email_220618_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2Q0ZDY5Ni0xZGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Z1UdiiVu_uirpRFMN2CYh5AdyRVvsHWr1OP9XfgSe4=)**
Mike DeWine hasn’t just been a roadblock to progress on this issue: He’s actively made our communities less safe.
Instead of the action he promised he’d take to reduce gun violence, DeWine caved to the gun lobby over and over. Just this spring, he signed a permitless concealed carry law and even a bill to arm teachers – putting guns directly into our kids’ schools.
This is exactly the opposite of what we need to make our communities and our families safer.
**[We can do better – I know it, and so do other Democrats running for change. Pitch in $5 right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46680374/351302938/-293918599?refcode=nw_email_220618_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2Q0ZDY5Ni0xZGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Z1UdiiVu_uirpRFMN2CYh5AdyRVvsHWr1OP9XfgSe4=)**
Onward,

Nan Whaley

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46680381/351302939/-293918599?refcode=nw_email_220618_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2Q0ZDY5Ni0xZGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Z1UdiiVu_uirpRFMN2CYh5AdyRVvsHWr1OP9XfgSe4=)****

name: Ally For Utah
subject: Reminder: Ganel-Lyn Condie endorses Ally Isom for U.S. Senate
body:
"Ally brings a hope that if you have principle-based leadership, and you’re willing to take time to listen to one another, then we can make good decisions."
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FYa2rStjmkE5kwdqKnmmRSKAujh7ov7R5LIPliwfQTmg9lUjacESr6RNkQol0GnuCz7ubyPshhdQqPd0ETYimfBYfJwYECjaahVkbzcO8Li3CgpFm2INOUP_6_na_I-2nkY0A4ibO2cq_UUIapFckw==&c=ZXdqcXGyCbTrOLslk4zm-Zy6Mxyxu9QpuUDtd0ZDIGubEu_xd6iS6g==&ch=DQWqXoI-S7REkK8ozqPi_v0KUPjJVRrJHpEPyjqw-711TPB9tAkJoQ==)
---
---
| | Speaker, host, and author Ganel-Lyn Condie publicly endorses Ally Isom for U.S. Senate. [Watch her video on YouTube here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FYa2rStjmkE5kwdqKnmmRSKAujh7ov7R5LIPliwfQTmg9lUjacESr1opDljVatxod1mbQv0x3xIellhVoPhvPCOCJZTsSv_h9Qt5zVq2H5hf0xx-K97ldF0Zr1voUok4nkwiNlB9GKPTjnkDAu5CWA==&c=ZXdqcXGyCbTrOLslk4zm-Zy6Mxyxu9QpuUDtd0ZDIGubEu_xd6iS6g==&ch=DQWqXoI-S7REkK8ozqPi_v0KUPjJVRrJHpEPyjqw-711TPB9tAkJoQ==)
---
| "I think there is a time for change, and this is that time.
I am certain that Ally could be doing so many things with her life right now, but I'm so grateful she's been willing to stand up and stand for principles that allow people to feel heard and restores some trust.
She's willing to listen, but she's also willing to sit down at the table and come up with ideas that really protect our rights and our understanding as a conservative party.
Ally brings a hope that if you have principle-based leadership, and you're willing to take time to listen to one another, then we can make good decisions.
I believe it is time to have a fresh perspective. Someone that comes from a perspective of a mother, as a wife. And it's time now for some healing and true leadership that goes back to those principles that protect and actually enable families and communities to flourish and govern themselves. And I know Ally really believes in those principles."
---
|

Ken Verdoia interviewed Ally Isom on Facebook Live on June 7, 2022
---
Learn more about Ally's top priorities in Washington and how she will represent Utah in the U.S. Senate.

clean_body: "Ally brings a hope that if you have principle-based leadership, and you’re willing to take time to listen to one another, then we can make good decisions." | | | | | | | == | | Speaker, host, and author Ganel-Lyn Condie publicly endorses Ally Isom for U.S. Senate. == | "I think there is a time for change, and this is that time. I am certain that Ally could be doing so many things with her life right now, but I'm so grateful she's been willing to stand up and stand for principles that allow people to feel heard and restores some trust. She's willing to listen, but she's also willing to sit down at the table and come up with ideas that really protect our rights and our understanding as a conservative party. Ally brings a hope that if you have principle-based leadership, and you're willing to take time to listen to one another, then we can make good decisions. I believe it is time to have a fresh perspective. Someone that comes from a perspective of a mother, as a wife. And it's time now for some healing and true leadership that goes back to those principles that protect and actually enable families and communities to flourish and govern themselves. And I know Ally really believes in those principles." | Ken Verdoia interviewed Ally Isom on Facebook Live on June 7, 2022 Learn more about Ally's top priorities in Washington and how she will represent Utah in the U.S. Senate. == | | Business and community leaders endorse Ally Isom for U.S. Senate: == == == == == == == | | | == | VOTE ALLY ISOM FOR U.S. SENATE! | | I reached out Monday.
I reached out Thursday.
Now, I’m asking one last time.

[**_That’s how absolutely critical meeting my End of Week fundraising goal is to outraising Republican Don Bacon, winning this race, and flipping Nebraska blue. I only need 1 more gift from 18326 to make it. Can I count on you? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46682485/351306404/1129282168?refcode=20220618_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTFmMGZiMi0xZmVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLfGm6Uc2D1yJMdoN6_AGo2DSqLc6WWjxf8EprLq6qw=) I’m humbled beyond words.

When I asked you to support my vision for a better Nebraska -- I knew you’d have my back.

But I never could have imagined the FLOOD of support that would come in to lift up my vision for Nebraska’s hardworking families. [**_Now, as of 11am, I only need one more gift from 18326 in these final 13 hours to CLINCH my End of Week fundraising goal, replace Don Bacon, and show Bacon’s Republican allies that their attempts to defeat us are no match for this grassroots movement. It would mean so much to me if you’d be the last gift I need before midnight. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46682486/351306435/1129282168?refcode=20220618_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTFmMGZiMi0xZmVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLfGm6Uc2D1yJMdoN6_AGo2DSqLc6WWjxf8EprLq6qw=) To every family struggling to put food on the table... Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. clean_body: | | | I reached out Monday. I reached out Thursday. Now, I’m asking one last time. = I’m humbled beyond words. When I asked you to support my vision for a better Nebraska -- I knew you’d have my back. But I never could have imagined the FLOOD of support that would come in to lift up my vision for Nebraska’s hardworking families. = To every family struggling to put food on the table... To every Nebraskan worrying about prescription costs... To every voter whose concerns have been ignored... = = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for everything you do, Tony | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream. This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund. Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. = If you only want to receive our most important emails, click . name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: What Laura Ingraham said
body:
I hate to say it... But they're grooming our kids.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvlvasc7vpjm44esrqa2q9bpsei8onfpcqj80f9g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clhm1o36chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcs3mchqmfc37m9or4pbksooneolhc5j30o7169gb8ptj6uqncsbgspjj8sbme1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor9ddk6up70pjkcapm1ptgmlin49fg)
if you mess with our children, we will see you in court!

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaagjfp5nkeau828p398neigtc1nagsf2q678qno_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clhm1o36chh2bs)
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Radical activist teachers brainwashed a 12-year-old girl to think she's a "boy" and hid it from her mother...

So, we're dragging the teachers and school into court to make them pay for their disgusting actions and stop this from happening to other children.

[**But to win this critical case I need your help today. That is why I'm asking you to join me by donating to make sure these radical teachers can't brainwash any more children.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1fnhhanktnj73muove7usvkmqba2o3ntsqp13qo_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clhm1o36chh2bs)

In case you missed the details of our case when I announced it with Laura Ingraham on her great **Fox News** show **The Ingraham Angle** let me recap it for you.

One day Jessica Konen, a mother of a young 12-year-old girl in middle school was called in and told by the school that her daughter was now a "boy."

What she found out was that over the past several months teachers indoctrinated her sixth-grade daughter into believing she was transgender and bisexual.

Her daughter didn't even know what those two words meant until these sick activist teachers infected her daughter with their twisted beliefs...

The teachers recruited Jessica's daughter to join their "Equality Club" where she was told she may be transgender and bisexual.

The teachers then helped her to create a totally new identity with new names, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom.

They even created a "Gender Support Plan" for her and instructed the faculty to use her new male name and pronouns -- ALL without her mother's knowledge.

And worse than that -- **these radical teachers told Jessica's daughter NOT to tell her mom because she couldn't be "trusted."**

The actions of these teachers and the school are sickening...

They intentionally hid their radical indoctrination from Jessica -- even though the Supreme Court has consistently ruled that parents have the right to control their children's education.

Left-wing activist teachers, administrators and schools are out-of-control...

It's disgusting. It's awful. And we have to stop them.

That's why I'm asking for your help today.

[**Will you join me to make these Left-wing activist teachers and the school pay for their illegal actions?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ehfmk94tbkc19bqagj80tkq586aab26fh6ro7g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clhm1o36chh2bs)

You see, we are suing the school AND the teachers for their illegal actions...

Because the only way we're going to stop these activist teachers and administrators is to drag them into court.

The fact is that we have no idea how many other children this is happening to across the country -- Jessica's daughter is just one example.

We know the California Department of Education and the teachers' associations train schools and teachers to keep secrets from parents...

Who knows how many other young children are being poisoned?

Left-wing radicals are using our classrooms to brainwash our children and grandchildren with their sick-and-twisted views.

And we have an opportunity to stop it.

This lawsuit puts every single activist teacher, administrator and school on notice -- if you mess with our children, **we will see you in court!**

They should be teaching our children math, reading and history -- not pushing them to become transgender or bisexual.

But, to stop this from happening -- we need to win this case...

That's why I'm asking for your help immediately today.

[**Will you please step up and make a generous donation to help us drag these radical activists to court?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg2ksluaqv6ct911kael81euo32t8fvglefocs20_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clhm1o36chh2bs)

And please know here at the Center for American Liberty we don't just file lawsuits -- we **WIN** them!!

My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on **Newsmax** and **Fox News** with **Laura Ingraham** , **Tucker Carlson** , **Shannon Bream** and **Fox and Friends.**

I've been on a lot talking about our numerous legal battles and victories against the radical Left.

We've already won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court.

We're also taking the fight to big tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives...

But this case to stop activist teachers from corrupting and hurting our children and grandchildren is so important -- it's one we cannot afford to lose.

[**That's why, I'm asking if you can give today -- $35, $50, $100, $250 or more. I will use it to protect our children and grandchildren from the radical Left.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbqq4sbr4e2es8qqj2jk85m8n05ao1uvv2ggp57o_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clhm1o36chh2bs)

So, the next time a radical teacher wants to poison another child with their sick beliefs they'll know that we're watching and are ready to drag them into court...

That is the only way we're going to stop them -- they have to fear the consequences of their actions!

With your help, we'll hold these teachers accountable for brainwashing and grooming their young students- and we'll put all radical leftist teachers on notice that they won't get away with their plot to indoctrinate our kids and erase our parental rights.

Thank you in advance for your support.

**God Bless,**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrml3n29k25br5t2d0ai9ue3smf3u8ngqd6gg1a8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clhm1o36chh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaeolku4b56o2iv4vdj9tdls42g2qm3d5ahi2jc8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clhm1o36chh2bs)

**Harmeet K. Dhillon**
Founder & CEO, The Center for American Liberty

P.S. Radical activist teachers in California tricked a 12-year-old girl into believing she was transgender and bisexual.

They helped her change into a "boy" with a new identity a new name and new pronouns **\-- and told her to hide it from her mother.**

Now we're dragging these activist teachers and the school into court to pay for their abuse of her young daughter, and I need your help to win.

[**That's why I'm asking you to give an emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100, $250 to stop these radical liberals from poisoning our children.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpf7fmpvds35hk7oplo940scsr57kup46h21jlkg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clhm1o36chh2bs)

We must win this case and put every single Left-wing teacher and school on notice -- if you infect our children with your radical values we will drag you into court too!

[ >> DONATE TODAY! << ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8ajq30mhio1e7ottibn0jmubkbashjccvjpv210_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clhm1o36chh2bs)

body: 96 Friend, WE DID IT. I won the Republican primary and I couldn’t have done it without your ongoing support. I know we share the same values, and I am truly humbled by the outpouring of support I received. BUT THERE’S NO TIME TO CELEBRATE. WE HAVE A LONG ROAD AHEAD OF US. This November, I’ll be representing conservatives everywhere in the fight to take back America. But it won't be that easy. This is the #1 battleground Senate race in America and Schumer’s dark money cronies have already spent OVER 30 MILLION DOLLARS to defeat me. THANKS TO A DEM CONTROLLED SENATE...inflation is skyrocketing, the border is in crisis, and America has been diminished on the world stage. The American people are ready for new leadership. I am honored to be highlighted by Riveting Women [https://rivetingwomen.com/victoria-virasingh-for-congress-daughter-of-virginias-8th-district/?mc_cid=daf8f70f10&mc_eid=e682c70172] , a blog run by a group of extraordinary women who work to share their stories and shine a spotlight on leading women figures from across industries.
This campaign has been such an enriching experience. I've met so many people who are ready for a change and truly believe leaders are supposed to reflect the people they were elected to represent.
As the proud daughter of the 8th, I genuinely understand our community's needs. And as your Congresswoman, I will always listen and fight for the change we desperately need. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=riveting_1]
Thank you so much to Riveting Women for highlighting our campaign!
We are so close to the finish line, and we cannot continue our momentum without your support! Vote early TODAY [https://www.victoriaforcongress.com/vote] or on Election Day, Tuesday, June 21.

Your support means everything!
Victoria

Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=rivetingb]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Fed ends easy money – update from your favorite free market think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/easymoneyends?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**On Wednesday the Fed raised interest rates by 0.75 percent. That might not seem much, but the cost of borrowing almost doubled overnight.**

Interest rates are still historically low, but the era of easy money economics could be coming to an end.

**For the past two decades, central bankers around the world have used low interest rates as a solution to almost every economic problem. **When the giant hedge fund, Long-Term Capital Management, collapsed in 1998, the Fed cut interest rates to prop up the stock market. After the subprime bubble burst in 2008, the Fed did the same again.

Threatened by a global covid pandemic? Cut rates. Risk of recession? Lower rates. Confronted by a market correction? Lower rates some more.

**Central bankers acted like they had found a magic formula that would produce perpetual prosperity. **But, of course, keeping interest rates so low for so long has consequences:
1. **Easy money is inflationary.** When the Fed intervened to prop up the stock market, they pushed up the price of almost every asset in America. Until very recently, consumer prices might have remained stable (in part because the US was able to import cheap consumer goods from China.) But with all the additional easy money that the Fed has hosed at the US economy in the past two years, even the prices of everyday items are rising, too.
2. **Bad investments.** When interest rates are set too low, capital gets misallocated. When borrowing is ridiculously cheap, lots of money gets poured into businesses and ideas that don’t actually make much sense. We could be about to see which those might be. With debt so cheap, a lot of businesses have borrowed heavily. As long as interest rates remain low, they can service those debts, but not actually pay off the principal. Rising rates will flush out a lot of these ‘zombie’ companies.
3. **‘Woke’ investing.** A number of the largest fund managers in America have started to make investment decisions on the basis of ESG criteria – or Environmental, Social and Governance. This means that instead of deciding how to invest the capital they manage on the basis of what returns it might yield, fund managers have allocated capital on the basis of their own political preferences. ESG criteria are almost entirely subjective.

**A direct consequence of ‘woke’ investing is that oil and gas projects have been deliberately and systematically starved of capital.** This, in turn, helps explain why gas prices are so high. With ‘woke’ fund managers driving investment out of the oil and gas sector, there is a constraint on supply – which is one of the main reasons you are paying higher prices at the pump.

**ESG might not survive the return of economic reality. **Who wants to hear what your fund manager thinks about making the world a better place when the assets they manage are down 20 percent?

Now that rates are rising, expect a lot of discussion about why interest rates were not increased earlier and what the right rate should be.

US Treasury Secretary, Janet Yellen, recently admitted that she made the wrong call on interest rates back in 2021 because she was ‘wrong about the path that inflation would take’. No doubt there will also be debates about who the President ought to appoint to the Fed to ensure that they make the right call in the future.

The next generation of conservative leaders in America might need to think further than who they want on the Fed. Those that believe in free markets should instead be asking why a government agency, the Fed, fixes the price of credit in the first place. No government agency, no matter how smart and well-informed, will ever know enough to be able to set the perfect price.

**Conservatives should ask not if we have the right interest rate, but - fifty years after Richard Nixon inadvertently created it – do we have the right sort of monetary system in the first place? **
---
| |
---
Have a great weekend!

Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---

---

When the Affordable Care Act was passed, Texas was given the opportunity to receive $100 billion in federal funding in exchange for increasing Medicaid eligibility.
Texas Republicans refused this offer.
Health care coverage in Texas is among the worst in the nation. Nearly 20% of Texans are uninsured. Expanding Medicaid could drastically reduce this number.
What do you think? Should action be taken to immediately expand Medicaid and insure more Texans?

| Peter,

* Assemblymember Anna Kelles

* Dryden Deputy Supervisor and Former Congressional Democratic Nominee Dan Lamb

**In The News:**

From the start of this campaign, Josh has always pledged to fight for Upstate New Yorkers and push for a better path for future generations. At the bedrock of this, we must improve the economic opportunities available in our communities and aim to reduce inequality. Josh wrote **_[this Op-Ed](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46685109/351317367/-2015313378?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmU3ZjIxMy0yOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZrO4FFlcTP_I9HWcdJP0Hy5XaNXCrweQOyTP6d-J6s=&emci=99cfbf13-80ee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0fe7f213-28ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=4588596)_** explaining his plan to forge a better economic path forward for everyone who calls Upstate New York home. If you have not had a chance to read it, we would encourage you to take a look or check out **[_our campaign website_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46685114/351317396/-1126184350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmU3ZjIxMy0yOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZrO4FFlcTP_I9HWcdJP0Hy5XaNXCrweQOyTP6d-J6s=&emci=99cfbf13-80ee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0fe7f213-28ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=4588596#issues)** for our full economic policy platform.
| [READ THE OP-ED ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46685128/351317409/-2015313378?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmU3ZjIxMy0yOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZrO4FFlcTP_I9HWcdJP0Hy5XaNXCrweQOyTP6d-J6s=&emci=99cfbf13-80ee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0fe7f213-28ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=4588596)

Josh also recently penned **[_this letter_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46685139/351317421/-367974971?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmU3ZjIxMy0yOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZrO4FFlcTP_I9HWcdJP0Hy5XaNXCrweQOyTP6d-J6s=&emci=99cfbf13-80ee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0fe7f213-28ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=4588596)** to the New York State Public Service Commission and expressed his strong opposition to NYSEG’s proposal to increase prices on Upstate New Yorkers who are already struggling to get by. The proposed 22.2% average increase in prices for electricity service and a 15.2% average increase in prices for gas service is completely out of touch with reality, and it will only exacerbate the economic hardships facing many working New Yorkers, small businesses, and senior citizens. Our public servants should be working to lower costs, not make them worse. In Congress, you can count on Josh to always be on the side of working families, small businesses, and our seniors. Please, if you haven’t already, read Josh’s **[_full letter_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46685144/351317430/-367974971?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmU3ZjIxMy0yOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZrO4FFlcTP_I9HWcdJP0Hy5XaNXCrweQOyTP6d-J6s=&emci=99cfbf13-80ee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0fe7f213-28ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=4588596)** to the New York State Public Service Commission.
| [READ THE LETTER ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46685151/351317442/-367974971?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmU3ZjIxMy0yOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZrO4FFlcTP_I9HWcdJP0Hy5XaNXCrweQOyTP6d-J6s=&emci=99cfbf13-80ee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0fe7f213-28ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=4588596)

Federally, the threat of the Supreme Court overturning _Roe v. Wade_ gets heavier every day. A decision of this nature dangers lives, tramples everyone’s right to bodily autonomy, and is completely out of touch with how the majority of Americans feel about abortion. Josh is committed to defending reproductive rights, including access to abortion. He recently wrote **[_this letter_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46685155/351317459/1663564404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmU3ZjIxMy0yOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZrO4FFlcTP_I9HWcdJP0Hy5XaNXCrweQOyTP6d-J6s=&emci=99cfbf13-80ee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0fe7f213-28ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=4588596)** to The Justice Department encouraging Attorney General Merrick Garland to take immediate action and prepare affirmative civil litigation to protect women’s access to abortion services. You can read the full letter **[_here._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46685163/351317480/1663564404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmU3ZjIxMy0yOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZrO4FFlcTP_I9HWcdJP0Hy5XaNXCrweQOyTP6d-J6s=&emci=99cfbf13-80ee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=0fe7f213-28ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=4588596)**

clean_body: With the summer in full swing, we wanted to update you on what we've been up to on the campaign trail. | = | Peter, With the campaign season in full swing, we wanted to update you on what we've been up to on the campaign trail. In The Community: The best part of this campaign has been time on the road meeting supporters like you, Peter. We’ve visited all 11 counties, most more than once by now, and we’ve put a lot of miles on the car. It’s easily been the most rewarding part of the job, and here are a few (of the many) highlights: = = Flag Day in Hudson and an Indivisible Columbia New York Forum in Chatham = = The Cortland County Dairy Parade = = Visiting McMahon's EZ Acres in Homer and Speaking to the Cortland County Dems = = Registering new voters at the Ithaca Festival and speaking with the Sullivan County Dems | | Hitting the road in our new (and massive) district is the most fun part of our campaign, but it does take time away from the important work of raising the resources to win this toss-up district in November. = | = Latest Endorsements: We are humbled and honored to have recently earned the endorsements of... Cortland County Democratic Committee Chenango County Democratic Committee Ulster County Democratic Committee Communications Workers of America District 1 Assemblymember Anna Kelles Broome County Democratic Committee Chair Barbara Fiala Chenango County Democratic Committee Chair Patricia Giltner Cortland County Democratic Committee Chair Timothy Perfetti Tioga County Democratic Committee Chair Max H. Della Pia New York State Democratic Committee Vice-Chair, and Former Tompkins County Democratic Committee Chair and Democratic Rural Conference Chair Irene Stein Dryden Deputy Supervisor and Former Congressional Democratic Nominee Dan Lamb Former Congressional Democratic Nominee Tracy Mitrano Former Tompkins County Legislature Chair and Congressional Democratic Nominee Martha Robertson Clermont Democrats Tompkins County Progressives Voter Protection Project Defend the Vote Backroads PAC ....and more! It truly is an honor to have the endorsements of such notable community members and local and national organizations. If you haven’t added your personal endorsement of Josh’s campaign — | In The News: From the start of this campaign, Josh has always pledged to fight for Upstate New Yorkers and push for a better path for future generations. At the bedrock of this, we must improve the economic opportunities available in our communities and aim to reduce inequality. Josh wrote explaining his plan to forge a better economic path forward for everyone who calls Upstate New York home. If you have not had a chance to read it, we would encourage you to take a look or check out for our full economic policy platform. | Josh also recently penned to the New York State Public Service Commission and expressed his strong opposition to NYSEG’s proposal to increase prices on Upstate New Yorkers who are already struggling to get by. The proposed 22.2% average increase in prices for electricity service and a 15.2% average increase in prices for gas service is completely out of touch with reality, and it will only exacerbate the economic hardships facing many working New Yorkers, small businesses, and senior citizens. Our public servants should be working to lower costs, not make them worse. In Congress, you can count on Josh to always be on the side of working families, small businesses, and our seniors. Please, if you haven’t already, read Josh’s to the New York State Public Service Commission. | Federally, the threat of the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade gets heavier every day. A decision of this nature dangers lives, tramples everyone’s right to bodily autonomy, and is completely out of touch with how the majority of Americans feel about abortion. Josh is committed to defending reproductive rights, including access to abortion. He recently wrote to The Justice Department encouraging Attorney General Merrick Garland to take immediate action and prepare affirmative civil litigation to protect women’s access to abortion services. You can read the full letter | Get Out To Vote: Finally, we wanted to send a final reminder to get out and vote in the June 28th primary! Even though we aren't on the ballot this primary, it's vital that as many people as possible vote. Early voting begins TODAY! Check out your local Board of Elections page to find your nearest early voting site. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | | = | = | = | = Onwards, Team Riley | | Text 'RILEY' to 30343 to stay up to date with the latest campaign news. subject: Polls show that we can flip Ohio blue, but we need your help.
