body:
This race couldn't be closer:
| Team, The results from the first two polls in Ohio's Senate race show Tim Ryan and J.D. Vance are "virtually deadlocked." Take a look: 🔵 Tim Ryan: 39%
🔴 J.D. Vance: 42%
_Suffolk / May 24, 2022_

🔵 Tim Ryan: 44%
🔴 J.D. Vance: 41%
_GrowProgress / June 3, 2022_
While the election continues to heat up, here's what we know for sure: **The polls show that Tim can win in November, but it won't be easy.** It's clear that this race is going to be close, but we have the power to tip the scales towards Tim – because Ohio deserves better than J.D. Vance.

Look, Vance will say and do whatever it takes to get elected. He's shamelessly reinvented himself as a MAGA Republican despite having once been a self-described "never-Trumper."

**Here's the bottom line:** Ohioans can't afford another far-right Republican who cares more about special interests than working people. We need a leader who will fight for us – not for their personal financial and political gain.

**[We need to make sure that we have all of the resources we need to keep Vance out of the Senate, but thanks to his billionaire Silicon Valley backers like Peter Thiel, beating him won't be cheap. Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us flip Ohio blue and elect Tim Ryan to the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46685434/351318332/55609811?refcode=em22_220618_senpol_fnd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220618_senpol_fnd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmU2ZjIxMy0yOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iUyrYs1l2WU1H4gK8V4grfQRhlDSO6GSXqGbC2jlOLw=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46685435/351318333/55609811?refcode=em22_220618_senpol_fnd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220618_senpol_fnd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmU2ZjIxMy0yOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iUyrYs1l2WU1H4gK8V4grfQRhlDSO6GSXqGbC2jlOLw=) Thank you,

clean_body: This race couldn't be closer: | Team, The results from the first two polls in Ohio's Senate race show Tim Ryan and J.D. Vance are "virtually deadlocked." Take a look: 🔵 Tim Ryan: 39% 🔴 J.D. Vance: 42% Suffolk / May 24, 2022 🔵 Tim Ryan: 44% 🔴 J.D. Vance: 41% GrowProgress / June 3, 2022 While the election continues to heat up, here's what we know for sure: The polls show that Tim can win in November, but it won't be easy. It's clear that this race is going to be close, but we have the power to tip the scales towards Tim – because Ohio deserves better than J.D. Vance. Look, Vance will say and do whatever it takes to get elected. He's shamelessly reinvented himself as a MAGA Republican despite having once been a self-described "never-Trumper." Here's the bottom line: Ohioans can't afford another far-right Republican who cares more about special interests than working people. We need a leader who will fight for us – not for their personal financial and political gain. = = Thank you, The Ohio Dems The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open U.S. Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. | = | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Val Demings
subject: Here's where things stand, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Your donation could be the one that stops Rubio and the GOP from flipping the Senate
| | |
---
**Friend: I'm trailing Marco Rubio in the polls – and now, I'm so close to reaching my midnight fundraising goal. Here's where things stand:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46685474/351318515/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3578-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmU2ZjIxMy0yOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwFq6SnODrcZkdMsuveLLzBo1oW0vnBeqKT77TyPSjA=)
Polling shows me a few points down in my race, which will decide Senate control. I know that we can overcome this, but missing this goal means making tough decisions like pulling back our efforts to reach Floridians.

Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes. In a race this tight, every choice we each make is incredibly impactful. **It could be your single donation that lets us knock just enough doors, call just enough voters or run enough ads to push this campaign – our movement – to victory.**
The GOP isn't showing any signs of slowing down: Marco Rubio is breaking GOP fundraising records, and Mitch McConnell's special-interest allies are ready to drop hundreds of millions to keep Florida red. National Republicans have already poured in $10 million to keep me and any other Democrat from winning in Florida again.

**This is an absolutely critical moment, and I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me fight back against Rubio and the GOP and take the lead. This is about Florida, defending the Senate and protecting our democracy from the GOP's far-right agenda. **
**[_So please, friend, I need you to donate $5 to make up this critical gap before my deadline. Remember, your donation could be the one that stops Rubio and the GOP from flipping the Senate._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46685475/351318516/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3578-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmU2ZjIxMy0yOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwFq6SnODrcZkdMsuveLLzBo1oW0vnBeqKT77TyPSjA=)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Stop the anti-life movement
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9281%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=lpQSZDTTSpxDRDIGwZbekw&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c35610%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qYpiUmyRFwsInyvPJ1EGZg&sysid=1)[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c35611%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t4uxLz839Q4BSiVDmMELOQ&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c35612%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X9zFU5LzGI1p3RoWBfaXdg&sysid=1) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c35613%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PBjygq9OzPHlve2yovyi%2bA&sysid=1) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9281%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=lpQSZDTTSpxDRDIGwZbekw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9281%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=lpQSZDTTSpxDRDIGwZbekw&sysid=1)

---
Peter, there is no acceptable reason why military-style assault weapons should still be allowed on our streets.

In 2012, a legally purchased AR-15 was used to end the lives of 20 children and six staff members in Sandy Hook Elementary School. In 2016, a similar legally purchased rifle was used to take 49 lives at Pulse nightclub. Five weeks ago, a legally purchased AR-15-style weapon was used to kill 10 New Yorkers in a Buffalo supermarket. _And one week after that, a legally purchased assault weapon was used to murder 19 children and two teachers in an elementary school in Uvalde, Texas. _And now, only 2 weeks ago, an AR-15 was used to kill four people in a hospital in Tulsa, Oklahoma.
**The facts are painfully clear: Legally purchased military-style assault weapons are the weapon of choice for most mass shooters and make shootings _significantly_ more deadly.** We MUST ban these weapons before they’re used in yet another tragedy.
I’ve spent my years as your attorney general fighting to protect New Yorkers from gun violence in any way I can – including holding gun manufacturers and sellers accountable for their part in this epidemic – but I need to know if you’re in this fight with me. **Peter, I need to hear from 10,000 fearless fighters before midnight, so please take a moment to answer this quick one-question survey:**
| | **Should we ban military-style assault weapons?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46685647/351319314/-822847262?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk541-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzU1MTBjOS0yOGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qlQxT62pdoPiN5a32JUrnHdjUr5scqzpAJ2mPffDODw=&emci=87fab33e-c8e5-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=0c5510c9-28ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)

Friend,

**_WE NEED TO SAVE AMERICA._**

Our beloved Country is becoming a _SOCIALIST NATION_ at the hands of Joe Biden and the radical Left. They will NEVER stop coming after my father because they KNOW his movement is STRONGER THAN EVER.

Washington Democrats want to fundamentally DESTROY America as we know it, and **WE WILL NOT LET THAT HAPPEN.** __Not on our watch.__

body:
We need his leadership in Washington | | | Hey, Peter, it's Marsha Blackburn. I’m so excited to announce my endorsement of Jeremy Hunt for Georgia’s Second Congressional District. Jeremy is **_exactly_** what we need more of in Washington. He is a West Point graduate who trained at Fort Benning before going on to serve our great country for five years as an active-duty Army intelligence officer. He has experience working with the Ukrainian Army, and it’s clear he respects our country by fighting to ensure our freedoms from the front line. As a Georgia native, Jeremy knows exactly what issues are most important to Georgians and is crucial to firing Nancy Pelosi once and for all. **There is no better candidate to speak up for Georgians and all Americans than Jeremy Hunt.** I’m proud to endorse him for Congress. I look forward to him joining me in Washington to stand up for conservative principles and speak out against the Left’s radical agenda. body:
I want to congratulate you on your official nomination to the inaugural Ambassador's Circle membership program. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6167%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Oka%2fOZkFyFTV6NmyJ8G%2bzQ&sysid=1)
I want to congratulate you on your official nomination to the inaugural Ambassador's Circle membership program.

| | Friend,

I want to congratulate you on your official nomination to the inaugural Ambassador's Circle membership program.

Your name came across my desk as someone who might be a good fit for my Ambassador’s Circle program because of how much you've done for freedom-loving patriots across the nation.

_**[Which is why I am thrilled to extend an invitation for you to join this membership program today.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63636%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B6JyJMYcp1qKkJuzaNkRUQ&sysid=1 "Which is why I am thrilled to extend an
invitation for you to join this membership program today.")**_

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63637%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0e%2fB%2bA8Xw2rDP%2fReMuQZpg&sysid=1 "Nikki Haley formally invites you to her Ambassador's Circle")
---
| | | [JOIN NOW](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63638%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8%2fR0850kI8JjBBC9kHptDg&sysid=1 "Join Now")
---

This year will be a costly battle for the future of our country, and the Ambassador's Circle is the premier club for patriots dedicated to restoring our GOP majorities in 2022.

By joining my exclusive Ambassador’s Circle you will be playing an active role in restoring our Republican majorities in 2022. Along the way, we’ll keep you updated on how your support is making an important impact on electing strong conservatives to office.

_**[Please accept your invitation by midnight tonight.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63639%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2lXUaB5GEn%2fWbuLwMSL%2fXQ&sysid=1 "Please accept your invitation by midnight
tonight.")**_

Thank you for your support and dedication to electing strong conservatives.

My very best,

Nikki R. Haley

---
| | | [ACCEPT INVITATION](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63630%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xE8LH5H6DElBXbASUpE%2b7w&sysid=1 "Join Now")
---

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63631%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UTqK4ozKYI0puVxQF68cug&sysid=1)
---
**_A Note From Nikki:_** Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. **_[Pre-order your signed copy today to have it shipped to you once it launches in October.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63632%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5gLtq13K%2b9wn3Lmg51mAwQ&sysid=1 "Pre-order your signed copy
today to have it shipped to you once it launches in October. subject: Regan Deering: Impressive Candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Regan4Congress](https://regan4congress
body:
Read more from my letter to the editor in the Illinois Times | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us14.campaign-archive.com/?e=2fa613cb76&u=62755cae87ea324590220f153&id=5413840019)
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| **IMPRESSIVE CANDIDATE** I was impressed by Scott Reeder's interview with Regan Deering ("A conservative community activist," May 19). We are so lucky to have a candidate of her caliber running in the 13th Congressional District. I was also impressed with her background and think we are indeed fortunate to see her in that race. I've watched her speak and have been equally impressed by her education and total understanding of what we need in Congress. I was also moved that Regan was adopted and has an honest and informed belief about abortion and her pro-life commitment. Her understanding of the Midwest and as the mother of three gives her a unique perspective, and one we need. Finally, Regan loaned her campaign $150,000. As the Sangamon County Republican chair under Governors Thompson, Edgar and Ryan, I spent a lifetime seeking candidates like that. As the only female of four primary candidates, it's important we elect Regan, as in November, she will be running against a female Democrat brought in from Washington, D.C. _
Irv Smith_
_Sangamon County Republican Chairman Emeritus_
---

clean_body: Read more from my letter to the editor in the Illinois Times | | | | | | | | | | | IMPRESSIVE CANDIDATE I was impressed by Scott Reeder's interview with Regan Deering ("A conservative community activist," May 19). We are so lucky to have a candidate of her caliber running in the 13th Congressional District. I was also impressed with her background and think we are indeed fortunate to see her in that race. I've watched her speak and have been equally impressed by her education and total understanding of what we need in Congress. I was also moved that Regan was adopted and has an honest and informed belief about abortion and her pro-life commitment. Her understanding of the Midwest and as the mother of three gives her a unique perspective, and one we need. Finally, Regan loaned her campaign $150,000. As the Sangamon County Republican chair under Governors Thompson, Edgar and Ryan, I spent a lifetime seeking candidates like that. As the only female of four primary candidates, it's important we elect Regan, as in November, she will be running against a female Democrat brought in from Washington, D.C. Irv Smith Sangamon County Republican Chairman Emeritus | "Support Regan Today!" | "Paid for by Regan4Congress" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Regan4Congress, All rights reserved.

You can [chip in to help her campaign reach its mid-month goal here. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46686203/351322090/-2114825830?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_220618_FR_MM3_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjBkMTI0NS0yY2VmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IWSSGEOodeyuYA8pLGIFSWI7VvtvT-KS2LDgRYUlAUY=)**
* * *
**Folks, this is a longer message but I hope you’ll read it as it comes from the heart.** I want to tell you about one of the things that motivates me to show up and fight the good fight in Congress – thinking of families like mine. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46686206/351322093/-2114825830?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_220618_FR_MM3_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjBkMTI0NS0yY2VmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IWSSGEOodeyuYA8pLGIFSWI7VvtvT-KS2LDgRYUlAUY=)
---

I’m a mother of two kids, Nevada and Cody, who are my pride and joy. If you’re a parent, you can relate when I say that much of what I do is for them.
It’s no secret that being a parent is a full time job. _When they’re young, they call out “Mom!” or “Dad!” so frequently that you forget your own name!_
And no matter what age they are, the want to give them everything you possibly can and more is always there.

**When I first ran for office, I made it one of my priorities to make life easier for parents who are working, on top of raising their children.** I know it’s not an easy task and if there’s anything I can do to take pressure off of working families – _I’m sure as hell up for the task._
But I need to be honest with you. When extremist candidates like my Republican opponent, April Becker, stand on their pedestal to shout divisive and bigoted rhetoric, it worries me about the future for families across our state.
Nevadans are some of the kindest, most caring people you can meet. April Becker is wrong to think that we have any interest in showing our kids that the future of their state will be centered around hatred and lies.
Whether it’s promoting fallacies about LGBTQ+ people, telling our daughters what they can and cannot do with their own bodies, or showing our kids that truth doesn’t matter, **April is creating an environment that is harmful to Nevada families.**
For me, fighting for families has been at the heart of my mission in serving as Congresswoman for Nevada’s Third District.
I’ve advocated for putting money back in the pockets of working parents, I’m a staunch supporter of the Equality Act that tells our kids that we love them for who they are, and I’m working hard to lower prescription drug prices for every family across our state.
**I have the fire in my belly to keep this fight going strong,** but I also know when I need to ask for help to get it done. And folks, this is one of those moments.
[**I’m asking – will you take a moment and please chip in $10 to my campaign’s mid-month goal? This race is awfully tight and families across Nevada deserve someone who will fight for their best interests in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46686209/351322097/-2114825830?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_220618_FR_MM3_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjBkMTI0NS0yY2VmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IWSSGEOodeyuYA8pLGIFSWI7VvtvT-KS2LDgRYUlAUY=)

body:
The future of our democracy is on the line in the fight to protect Democrats’ razor-thin Senate majority this November. | | | [](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqcJuDX2HRji8zceUQ74uMPyXwArFUhhEylhu27HuuFZPbUWWTdGH4838vBzdyazPkgGfSEI9dOrau8XGHCENJ6Je06YUb2AtP8-YN1Byq9GBTg8785gsbQ_ffAWduYcpvWzfix_Nu-bDq4dr3FgY3KMEwRjF-T7-ob1l3Xq3DKaUEIvnjbOlgAU0K2yGpMlFiH62R03oRyhx5dhTxdenySMqDMes6BMa7trzKNEbM0aJSdng96PgR3JJh8NDyIzsxg9rNX6sCiWaFu5-rt2QSBfnEDK9y3ZtDVyseuPxY-fJ0sSgNyHVvIa40d9lmhdp0gHfRkosOukCWgRsrJiOD/3n0/EAuzG8N3S8Gre_LPSRzaQA/h0/ft5xY6g0jIXKKLwyS8nmM2Q1G9UeLGrAVMBnB9LMxD0)
Peter, The House Select Committee’s January 6th hearings are shining a shocking spotlight on the traitors who embraced Trump’s Big Lie and incited a violent insurrection against our country. But let’s be clear: **The GOP’s attempts to overthrow our democracy aren’t over.** Here are a few things to keep in mind as the midterms approach:
1. Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans voted DOWN a bipartisan commission to investigate the January 6th insurrection. _They are directly protecting the insurrectionists from facing accountability._
2. GOP candidates running in key 2022 Senate races — including Georgia, Pennsylvania, and North Carolina — are EMBRACING Trump’s Bie Lie about the 2020 election results.
3. If Mitch McConnell and Republicans gain control of the Senate in 2022, they will obstruct election protections, launch frivolous political investigations, and could even try to impeach President Biden in retaliation for Democrats holding Donald Trump accountable for his very real crimes.

clean_body: The future of our democracy is on the line in the fight to protect Democrats’ razor-thin Senate majority this November. | | | Peter, The House Select Committee’s January 6th hearings are shining a shocking spotlight on the traitors who embraced Trump’s Big Lie and incited a violent insurrection against our country. But let’s be clear: The GOP’s attempts to overthrow our democracy aren’t over. Here are a few things to keep in mind as the midterms approach: 1. Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans voted DOWN a bipartisan commission to investigate the January 6th insurrection. They are directly protecting the insurrectionists from facing accountability. 2. GOP candidates running in key 2022 Senate races — including Georgia, Pennsylvania, and North Carolina — are EMBRACING Trump’s Bie Lie about the 2020 election results. 3. If Mitch McConnell and Republicans gain control of the Senate in 2022, they will obstruct election protections, launch frivolous political investigations, and could even try to impeach President Biden in retaliation for Democrats holding Donald Trump accountable for his very real crimes. We’re dead serious when we say that the future of our democracy is on the line in the fight to protect Democrats’ razor-thin Senate majority this November. I’m reaching out with a huge update, folks — the House just passed the bipartisan _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_! This critical bill will be the most significant investment in wildlife and habitat conservation in a generation — funding conservation efforts for more than 12,000 species of wildlife and plants. About one-third of our wildlife species are at risk of extinction right now — and we can’t afford to let that number grow larger. My _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act,_ co-sponsored by Roy Blunt in the Senate, would enact key wildlife protections to conserve animals and plants for future generations. [**Representative Debbie Dingell worked hard to pass this bill in the House. Now, we need to keep up this momentum and get it across the finish line in the Senate. Will you add your name right now to show your support?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46686425/351322755/1322490899?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220618_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjM0ODQ1OS0yZGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yaz6UdncK-pl8BXpko0JZFbIOImT9TggItfCD6cgTzk=&emci=28678253-2def-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e2348459-2def-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46686426/351322756/1322490899?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220618_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjM0ODQ1OS0yZGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yaz6UdncK-pl8BXpko0JZFbIOImT9TggItfCD6cgTzk=&emci=28678253-2def-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e2348459-2def-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)

name: Crystal Vanuch
subject: This is our moment
body:
I hope you will join me.
| | | [](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/2842025254f7ba7c/98768b63b9b4fcabc3d6b838967d376c/40203)
---
Peter, __This is important.__ We only have [**_less than four hours_** of early voting](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/2842025254f7ba7c/de1856ef99795a1bc3d6b838967d376c/40203) left today before we shift campaign operations to focus on PRIMARY ELECTION DAY this Tuesday, June 21st. I cannot overstate how important it is that EVERY member of our movement does their part by voting in this Republican primary election. **This is perhaps our final chance to save Virginia and bring our conservative values to Washington.** Your vote is so much more than a vote for me: **it's a vote for the America First movement, a vote to restore our way of life, and an investment in a better future for our children.** Together, we will take back our country from Biden and the radical left. _**As your Congresswoman, I will always put America First and never compromise our shared REPUBLICAN values.**_ **I hope you will join me.** This is a culmination of all our hard work. These next few days will determine whether we prevail as one united America First movement or allow weak, establishment RINOs and unhinged socialists destroy our country. **This is the most critical moment of the race. Stand with me. Encourage your friends, family, and neighbors to join us.** Together, we can bring America First values back to Washington and __**TAKE BACK OUR COUNTRY**__. God bless,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Crystal VanuchRepublican Candidate for Congress

So in a moment, [**I’ll ask you to split a donation between my campaign and Serve America to help us win this race and expand the Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46686463/351322938/2038802527?refcode=20220618_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTU3MjdmNC0yZGVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KPfRgeSOpky5Qkxx1ndwoN-Qz85Vws2uytuFicRDXZs=) But first can I explain why your donation is so important—especially right now? Every three months, candidates for federal office must report their fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. It helps keep politicians transparent and accountable. Our report will show exactly how much we’ve raised and how many folks have chipped in to help. JD Vance, Donald Trump, and Mitch McConnell will pay close attention to our report, trying to find any weakness they can exploit. Right now, Democrats have a razor-thin 50/50 majority in the Senate. name: Max Steiner
subject: Update: Democrats deliver for veterans
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46686491/351323053/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE0N2M1ZC0yZWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q3Ww4B6M4HzGLhU4Dn3E6Sc55KX2o0qjyqjgnBKbh5g=)
Friend,

Yesterday, the Senate passed the "Honoring Our PACT Act." The bill will greatly increase resources for veterans suffering the long-term effects of burn pits. It is long overdue. The toxic chemicals burned near soldiers in Iraq and Afghanistan have caused cancers and lung problems ever since -- and will only get worse as my generation of veterans gets older.

The burn pit issue has been called the Global War on Terror's Agent Orange: first denied by the government, then under-resourced, and only belatedly recognized as a real problem.

The "Honoring Our PACT Act" was passed with strong bipartisan support in the House (256-174) and Senate (84-14).

**Every vote against it was Republican -- including our own Doug LaMalfa, who was apparently worried about the fiscal impacts of spending money on anything that isn't a farm check.**

Republicans like Doug LaMalfa and Trump claim to love the military, but what they actually mean is that they love guys with guns that they can order around. They want a parade on demand, and they're happy to vote for war after war, but they don't want to pay for the lives they've ruined.

Democrats see soldiers as people serving their country, Republicans like LaMalfa see soldiers as props serving politicians. Thankfully, the Democrats (and the moderate, patriotic Republicans who voted with them) won on this issue. Just as I intend to win in November.

**[We're coming up on our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline and we're still a bit short of our $35,000 goal to unseat Doug LaMalfa. clean_body: | = Friend, Yesterday, the Senate passed the "Honoring Our PACT Act." The bill will greatly increase resources for veterans suffering the long-term effects of burn pits. It is long overdue. The toxic chemicals burned near soldiers in Iraq and Afghanistan have caused cancers and lung problems ever since -- and will only get worse as my generation of veterans gets older. The burn pit issue has been called the Global War on Terror's Agent Orange: first denied by the government, then under-resourced, and only belatedly recognized as a real problem. The "Honoring Our PACT Act" was passed with strong bipartisan support in the House (256-174) and Senate (84-14). Every vote against it was Republican -- including our own Doug LaMalfa, who was apparently worried about the fiscal impacts of spending money on anything that isn't a farm check. Republicans like Doug LaMalfa and Trump claim to love the military, but what they actually mean is that they love guys with guns that they can order around. They want a parade on demand, and they're happy to vote for war after war, but they don't want to pay for the lives they've ruined. Democrats see soldiers as people serving their country, Republicans like LaMalfa see soldiers as props serving politicians. Thankfully, the Democrats (and the moderate, patriotic Republicans who voted with them) won on this issue. Just as I intend to win in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Max Steiner Combat Veteran and Democrat for Congress | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. name: Bob Casey
subject: Maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We are facing some of the biggest fights we’ve faced as a nation in a long time.
#
Hi Derek,
It’s Senator Bob Casey here. You might know me as 1⁄2 of Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate Delegation.
You also might know me for my maps.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220618-1?refcode=em20220618-6241&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6241_434096_znIojJ&akid=6241%2E434096%2EznIojJ)
Long story short, I know a LOT about elections in Pennsylvania. And people got *really* into it when I broke out my visual aid and made some videos breaking down Pennsylvania’s 2020 presidential election results. __
What can I say, Derek?__
_I love a good Pennsylvania map.___
And one of my new all-time favorite maps of PA is the map of John Fetterman’s Democratic Senate primary election win last month.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220618-1?refcode=em20220618-6241&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6241_434096_znIojJ&akid=6241%2E434096%2EznIojJ)
**Look at that map: John won every single county! He went 67 for 67, decisively winning urban, suburban, and rural communities across the Commonwealth.****
**
Here’s what that tells me: Come November, my friend John Fetterman isn’t just going to run up the tally in Democratic strongholds like Philadelphia and Pittsburgh. He has what it takes to reduce margins (and win!) in our rural communities — because John’s focused on ALL of Pennsylvania.
Like John always says: **Every County, Every Vote.**
Derek, I know John is the candidate to beat Dr. Oz, flip this Senate seat, and join me in Washington to fight like hell for Pennsylvania’s working families. But he can’t get it done without our help.
[**_Will you pitch in $5 to help ensure Pennsylvania has TWO Senators working on behalf of our Commonwealth's children and families?_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220618-1?refcode=em20220618-6241&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6241_434096_znIojJ&akid=6241%2E434096%2EznIojJ)
**[Donate now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220618-1?refcode=em20220618-6241&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6241_434096_znIojJ&akid=6241%2E434096%2EznIojJ)**
It's time for more leaders in Washington who are dedicated to an economy that works for working people.
It’s time for John Fetterman.
Thank you,
Bob

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220618-6241-footer&t=1&refcode2=6241_434096_znIojJ&akid=6241%2E434096%2EznIojJ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=6241%2E434096%2EznIojJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=6241%2E434096%2EznIojJ)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: Why this midterm matters!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAROME BELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
I am reaching out to encourage you to take action and support Republicans like myself in the upcoming Tuesday election. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaromebellforcongress/electiondaytuesday?e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | [ ](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=8582b0b6d8&e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | Peter, I am reaching out to encourage you to take action and support Republicans like myself in the upcoming midterm elections.
[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=d1860311a9&e=af4b86f5c6)
With Democrats holding a majority in Congress, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have been able to do **_unlimited_** amounts of damage to our country.
* Ridiculous amounts of overspending have led to skyrocketing inflation, which is hurting American families
* Biden’s open border policies have let violent drug cartels and dangerous human traffickers run rampant in our cities
* On his first day in office, Joe Biden shut down the Keystone Pipeline Project and has continued to crush American energy independence.
* Excessive amounts of regulation have kept Americans jobless and innovation at an all-time low.

For the sake of our country, we need to reverse this damage immediately. **[To not face long-term repercussions from Biden and Kamala’s failures, Republicans HAVE to win big in the 2022 election](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=f7a662db8c&e=af4b86f5c6). **

We **_NEED_** to send a loud and clear message to the Democrats across our nation. The message is this: [**_the American people are done supporting the Left as they ruin our entire way of life_**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=52013e8a77&e=af4b86f5c6).

[Are you willing to take action by supporting my campaign today](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=199f94df03&e=af4b86f5c6)?

I have been working to expose the Left since I started to support Donald Trump in 2015. Because of this, the Democrats are trying to suppress my voice as I speak out about Biden’s mask and vaccine mandates, terrible economy, rising gas prices, and every other failed policy.

Biden, Kamala, Pelosi, AOC and her squad, and the whole rest of the Left are targeting me because they know Republicans are only **5** **seats** **away** from regaining the majority in Congress.

If the Democrats continue to hold the majority in Congress, they can continue **_FORCING_** their radical agenda down our throats. Our country **_needs_** to rally around powerful Republican fighters like myself so **the interests of American families can be advocated for again**!

[Show your support by chipping in to my campaign today](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=5728f55f11&e=af4b86f5c6)!

Thank you for your support.

Respectfully,

**
Jarome Bell
Chief Petty Officer, Ret'd.
Republican Candidate for Congress**

P.S.: We have seen the disasters that Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have created while in office. To put a stop to America’s downfall, Republicans need to take action NOW and rally around politicians like myself to ensure we can regain a majority in Congress this election! [Donate today to show your support - thank you](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=2f450c2203&e=af4b86f5c6)!

---
| |
---

Wow, is it time for your __favorite__ newsletter already?

**JD’s Top Hits **is BACK and gracing your inboxes this beautiful, summer Saturday morning. See what JD has been up to!
**DON TRUMP JR.[blasted](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9b91a55198e94aa686d193a24d932cf7&_e=GfVDcgCn67OuOum6YF4iAl9GPRDxd1nBHXlsFnuQByBK3AttUrRWoSqq7fXb0grym92oEDnm9NjOwGq7TpVb-Cb8pzGEvg7HKWkwyB_lb_IJwAu2TfgaFxVnf5qPPKYCRY99THeMw19sb8fvMfUZ-cW11uaDrwZsA6TrMh9Hw1t0DbY_qYsUxYpVFgT7aCmfjfh4Rj4TRt6ShJfLFWPzSgSg92Kwa1r4FAH7FwazuSeLgfRHyl_FUjt7k8zTQN_tO8cjVx2d2h04XUr73hQW8VXDKPtRhPAktNRCJtVszJVLCazXloMLo5B6vrd1an6d)** Tim Ryan this week for his atrocious record, constant flip-flopping and always voting with Joe Biden and his radical allies.

**AS GAS HIT $5** in Ohio last week, JD had some [**choice words**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9b91a55198e94aa686d193a24d932cf7&_e=GfVDcgCn67OuOum6YF4iAn5GEUUxX_9tAWkhwzeLJ1hcK_jiMqZmvCpJA7YX4pVS52fAyJPoEj5JRj7z9ddopIH2GUlBRFdAEa8SEWd1c3mVdonHbKfk64nTcGYZv3cXy8n4-X7PSS9_RmpFrsmHLn03GvCoBgZQmxYytAwU10asLNc6ek1PsPsBIbd6hq8ttM9LTMu5wuIsd762bemBfr1Hki_MkQ2RyZ6wCg2x38ToS98NjxjeKs5o1v2NWeQ6EFxee_1SqI3NcJIkebwj1xbq1Bg091UX_abEwp2liDD6gi9Wlsf_X_WIee0-8ANVG2FkgzKXHnCqt52DZtE33ckw0sQ56UiGwJQMu3bmCdCJlOEhiqrjFz9J9zMMPNyjpsE56zvSIlHaklMxWV03qvMvlZgG7AHljrmW8YQtJqL_NM59nEkqtmHVqU22_SWC) for Tim Ryan and Joe Biden working in cahoots against the American people. JD said:

_“There is no one else to blame for the record-high gas prices that are devastating Ohioans other than Joe Biden and his extreme allies in Congress like Tim Ryan.

“Tim Ryan is a failed 20-year career politician who has voted for Joe Biden’s radical inflationary agenda 100 percent of the time in Congress. Ryan may lie thru his teeth to the people of Ohio about being a so-called ‘moderate,’ his actual voting record tells the story of a Congressman who sold his constituents out to leftwing special interests long ago.”_
[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9b91a55198e94aa686d193a24d932cf7&_e=GfVDcgCn67OuOum6YF4iAvN-fkliCPMztdFi3wwp9k90lXGRxNGpz__VrJ-_35XSCAV-UXJQ83h2PoNgffKCzWgClNmgQgFR2xYCs-bV5dAixAfCYQbpqG_BbGkdiiLKOKulKXmGovaRlv6PpDBCDovLhZzc2lqcDenwmi_J6yajsBqWB8UdVfX4PDUHb617VSwhvXxkpkUdiuxDOz67S8-3CivtgNU0tTaT55ig5hrR9kwZ6X55Lxe_NMN5I3dvMQZxzBZRAGl1ClrAPjBvjQNmRqLPiqmV3U0rG0eD44epi3jNBTJbKFX2ywi7ngqb)
**THE WASHINGTON EXAMINER** took a [**close look**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9b91a55198e94aa686d193a24d932cf7&_e=GfVDcgCn67OuOum6YF4iAgR_S_JqPbszUGyhtPSP6NvnJeutLXKJW9unzVFosCKIOpL9EIwyi-OeEZyQXa5cItqU1RfRcSkO5vKDBQkH338243zKSf-LbXD-h35Jmcw1kJcprJ3v8TjFHJrV2R3NaNvt-a-qV5p_apw06OCzOUIcPjw7eGS9qrnIzZnz4TikoNDazCpnwZxTBoGTQp5H2P2DezuAMbuh43JtU2XAKRpzs9ojnwOJ3oMH3mA3e_60ISuyCSsQNgyY9faWiK-W05QWo1p4WaPGv2qKlTDei-KkvcEJz4Qr0eoIVb-HBgtmesY8rF-FranneAsgSiragCHW5fB6Qqpst0NewogBEg4jS6ZsFlwMMWDin8P9DOuJ) at our race and concluded that JD is the more authentic candidate and well positioned to win in November. The article says:

_So who can speak most effectively to Ohio as a whole and the geographic diversity of the state?

The answer favors Vance._

[**JD CALLED OUT**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9b91a55198e94aa686d193a24d932cf7&_e=GfVDcgCn67OuOum6YF4iAvN-fkliCPMztdFi3wwp9k9ScoXnB9Hk0PASshSknlEdRA91J00CRX6LGo6PN1Zklkaj2V-8DHgHtx7JXC2gtJed5PyEh1YTocy1grqiIabLWVXN2z8nr69HYY0iQ_5DeuyqsXs7XR58zgiy30oRzvi2CCNPDW624_7g1Pc_ezj2Z86svH-0yNpd7iLkiHFwvOKnqbVnUswT-eEmk4NNuEux82vyk9_Ca7jnQL-HwxCkpOlpYsj-XoeAti3n1MCm0ibWVhF-bIq0focXq6sXhgJMiMexH2ypcglzZMQafVay) Tim Ryan for his flip-flopping on trade deals and tariffs on China.

_“When he was actually in office and had an opportunity to do something to protect American manufacturing and the workers who depend on those industries, he did nothing. And now he is running as a supporter of tariffs. The only thing it tells you is when Tim Ryan’s mouth is moving, he is lying.”_
[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9b91a55198e94aa686d193a24d932cf7&_e=GfVDcgCn67OuOum6YF4iAvN-fkliCPMztdFi3wwp9k9ScoXnB9Hk0PASshSknlEdRA91J00CRX6LGo6PN1ZklrTVP836-QcKTj_usyS2EtsjR2_jRPVxw5o9p6Xv5do11Op2OxVTtPRi_WjlBIZ9g0CefX84khtUFbFYuXEzM8S2UhoDZkQ6eKd0J1Jqk_tyF9laz-9CvBCppa-eZT4duc3g_Hb0gNSDr-Kz2I4AGAdIx-kztZPn8sfMg2iHRCyuyNIF5zFP2PH4p3V07i4x2qNrUOmpgitT-uLFtLIfiZA85dqYo60-RWY-Ots7n_iN)
**NEWSWEEK COVERED** JD in a great [**article**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=9b91a55198e94aa686d193a24d932cf7&_e=GfVDcgCn67OuOum6YF4iAo185R_vpjnPSovSok3OO0yEat8oJVak13ktQ-dQri-etfrDUWKsbpXzMPuUziq3JUZT2b8ZdxkXvYQIDFOVI-QWXJCBCYtQeV0OljDZO-4PxxRETS1zW0_RFUKQt-HdV0e1UyDvAc5E-pm5DGWXj4zzj5TSH4jgW4HB40F0Z98lltLOGyD2iu_MrwmB11THj4Uy5ZN39_0-epoYzd_u85P2Expet6jrJPMIRGDKmmDLcQuJ-z_J0pBNmiNKo3dQkDCoBHbrC4Mz-w63H_6g0u9FQFxc67_utNjr6iNh1wpFbP5i0VogGbEX4B8LbE9ACkrz65HrmoX50wqmiF1sd1Y%3D), saying:

_The fact is, Vance didn't change: He came full circle. After a detour at Yale, Silicon Valley and some Washington, D.C., think tanks—where he was praised for his literary insights—he came home again.

He emerged not merely unscathed but more focused and dedicated to the plight of his people. And willing to do more than just write about them. He entered the political arena to fight for them in the U.S. Senate.

The truth is, the Democratic Party and Republican elites—and Ron Howard too—don't have a problem with Vance. They have a problem with rural Ohioans who support him—and the rural Americans who supported President Trump too._

| Hey Peter, Maryland politicians love to say stuff like "Our state needs X" or "Marylanders want Y" without ever asking a single person for their input. But this campaign is different. Our campaign is powered by working people, for working people. My team and I don’t shape our policies based on what out-of-touch establishment leaders think sounds good in a headline, but by the real ways in which state government can tackle the day-to-day struggles impeding too many Marylanders from meeting their full potential. **That’s where you come in, Peter**. You have a big say in the decisions we make, including the top issues we talk about on the campaign trail and online. So before we finalize our campaign strategy for the final five weeks ahead of our July 19th primary, I want to hear from you. Will you select an issue below that you'd like to see us focus on over the upcoming months? **I’ve said this before, but it bears repeating: state government ought to be a transformative force for good in Marylanders’ lives.** And I want to hear what specific issues are most important to you so I can fight for policies that will make your life better.
As governor, I will take immediate action to curb the effects of climate change on the Chesapeake Bay because the home of Katie, a local farmer from Easton, will be underwater in ten years if we don’t.
On day one, I will increase pay for public school teachers and education support professionals because a public school counselor from our state simply does not have the capacity to support the emotional and mental health needs of over 700 students and families while making less than $50k a year.
So, if you have a few seconds to share your priorities with me, I would really appreciate it.
Thanks Peter,
John King

clean_body: Maryland politicians love to say stuff like "Our state needs X" or "Marylanders want Y" without ever asking a single person for their input. | = | Hey Peter, Maryland politicians love to say stuff like "Our state needs X" or "Marylanders want Y" without ever asking a single person for their input. But this campaign is different. Our campaign is powered by working people, for working people. My team and I don’t shape our policies based on what out-of-touch establishment leaders think sounds good in a headline, but by the real ways in which state government can tackle the day-to-day struggles impeding too many Marylanders from meeting their full potential. That’s where you come in, Peter. You have a big say in the decisions we make, including the top issues we talk about on the campaign trail and online. So before we finalize our campaign strategy for the final five weeks ahead of our July 19th primary, I want to hear from you. Will you select an issue below that you'd like to see us focus on over the upcoming months? I want to make sure we're focusing on the things that matter to you and your family. | | | | | | | | | I’ve said this before, but it bears repeating: state government ought to be a transformative force for good in Marylanders’ lives. And I want to hear what specific issues are most important to you so I can fight for policies that will make your life better. As governor, I will take immediate action to curb the effects of climate change on the Chesapeake Bay because the home of Katie, a local farmer from Easton, will be underwater in ten years if we don’t. On day one, I will increase pay for public school teachers and education support professionals because a public school counselor from our state simply does not have the capacity to support the emotional and mental health needs of over 700 students and families while making less than $50k a year. So, if you have a few seconds to share your priorities with me, I would really appreciate it. Thanks Peter, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I'm taking a stand
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztf0hel3fapu9u0gh8n81vmp0k7h2sf7sb4tfdao_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onlc8oe0p5iepin7cbmm3j72crmmgpr9p5iepomddr564pr8t7263ibcdhgc9qeeduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74db666pbbd1nmaomcdb0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66pb5cljmaoj4c5h2bs)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo9s7cai27h2e682epd3ubfevinmnslcatscltig_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cljmaoj4c5h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zidpjjk71uai3vnnlet2p1ogp871teks5r62cdv0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cljmaoj4c5h2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zonlmjfso2kkf8giksefj4okfocjd31h08pjmob8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cljmaoj4c5h2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: This is longer, but I hope you'll read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I'm no stranger to tough fights
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46687591/351328010/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1168-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzNlNzUyOC0zMWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g32RoLAEemy70zCvNK7jpvqww7Mhn1tEzlRtKb0TQXE=)
---
This is a longer email, friend, but it's really important that you read it.

With the Senate split 50-50 and access to abortion on the ballot, we absolutely cannot lose this seat. But political experts from Nate Silver to Rachel Maddow are sounding the alarm, and Republicans are breaking the bank to flip this New Hampshire Senate seat.
Extreme GOP groups have already spent more than $9 million attacking me, and a McConnell-linked super PAC recently announced a $4.7 million ad buy.

**I know that this sounds bleak, but here's the thing, friend: I'm no stranger to tough fights.** In 2016, I won by just 1,017 votes, so my team and I know what it takes to win. And one thing is abundantly clear: If I'm going to protect this seat, it will take all of us working together.
**[That's why I’m asking you to chip in $3 or whatever you can before our upcoming FEC deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46687592/351328012/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1168-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzNlNzUyOC0zMWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g32RoLAEemy70zCvNK7jpvqww7Mhn1tEzlRtKb0TQXE=)**

Republicans have seen the polls showing this race statistically tied. They've seen the headlines calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats. And they know that CNN reported that this seat is one of the most likely to flip in November. So it's no surprise that this seat is the GOP's top target.

With so much on the line in this race, we cannot afford to fall behind on our fundraising. But right now, we're not where we need to be. If we don't hit our end-of-quarter goal, the GOP will increase their attacks against my campaign, putting this seat — and the future of the Senate majority — at risk.
I need your support now more than ever. If we lose this seat, we will lose our Democratic Senate majority. **[Please rush $3 or any amount to defend this seat and our razor-thin Democratic majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46687593/351328014/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1168-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzNlNzUyOC0zMWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g32RoLAEemy70zCvNK7jpvqww7Mhn1tEzlRtKb0TQXE=)**
Thank you for reading this – your support means the world.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
| If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, **[donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46687594/351328016/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1168-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzNlNzUyOC0zMWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g32RoLAEemy70zCvNK7jpvqww7Mhn1tEzlRtKb0TQXE=)**. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46687595/351328017/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1168-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzNlNzUyOC0zMWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g32RoLAEemy70zCvNK7jpvqww7Mhn1tEzlRtKb0TQXE=) If you’re reading this from your phone, [**click here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46687596/351328019/110765679?refcode=mh-jtk1168-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzNlNzUyOC0zMWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g32RoLAEemy70zCvNK7jpvqww7Mhn1tEzlRtKb0TQXE=&emci=a7e8f965-46ed-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=cc3e7528-31ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=5452893) to automatically sign up for our SMS list. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scheller?=
subject: Scheller for Congress Newsletter
body:
Hot off the press! Here is your Scheller for Congress newsletter from the Republican Nominee in PA-07 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/423e6db61466/scheller-for-congress-newsletter-9024689?e=db8085a287)
---
# Lisa Scheller for Congress Newsletter!
Happy Friday #TeamScheller!We are officially on to the General Election and to kick off the General Election season, I would like to share a video with you that was made by the National Republican Congressional Committee that highlights my candidacy!Recently, the race was upgraded from being considered a “Toss-Up” to “Leans Republican” which shows that the residents of PA-07 are ready to fire the radical democrats in charge of Congress that have saddled us with record inflation, rising gas prices, and the crisis at our Southern Border just to name a few issues. Over the next few months, I will be traveling to every corner of the district talking to voters about my campaign to save the American Dream and I hope you will join me on this journey! -Lisa
[](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=7129a2c42a&e=db8085a287)
|
---
# News from the trail!
[National Journal: Rep. Susan Wild, a swing-district Democrat, is already rated as an underdog for reelection by The Cook Political Report. That’s an ominous sign for Democrats’ midterm prospects. ](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=7405be7d8f&e=db8085a287)[Delaware Valley Journal: “It’s going to be hard for Wild to talk about the pocketbook and kitchen table issues when her president is largely responsible for inflation, O’Neill said. Wild’s opponent, Scheller, serves as president and chairman of her family’s manufacturing company. ](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=183580a52a&e=db8085a287)[Lisa on the Volpe Report](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=7d8eaa6d70&e=db8085a287)

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Humbly asking for your help to protect Democratic Senate control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=MXbMw2TbY%2FxR2HlV0%2Fh1lBnNA%2FnWOPoa&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Today, I'm making a simple yet important request: a $5 donation.
One donation may not sound like a lot, but I promise: It could make all the difference in our fight to keep this seat blue and protect Democratic control of the Senate. When people like you step up by the thousands to chip in to this campaign, it means we have the resources to fend off relentless GOP attacks and run an aggressive, successful campaign.
And truth be told, we can't afford for a single supporter to stay on the sidelines right now:
If Mitch McConnell takes back the Senate - which he could do by flipping just a single Democratic seat - he could use a majority to pass a federal abortion ban. He could block any consideration of gun safety legislation. He could prevent evidence of Donald Trump's wrongdoings from being made public. He has already said he would block any nomination to fill an opening on the Supreme Court. But right now, his GOP Senate campaign group has more than $45 million in the bank to make that happen.
As I have for years, I will go toe to toe with McConnell, Trump, and any right-wing Republican who's hellbent on pushing an extremist, out-of-touch agenda on the American people. But it's going to take your $5, Friend, to make sure I can succeed. I'm up against a big, public FEC reporting deadline this month - and it's your $5 that will show the strength of our grassroots campaign. It's your $5 that will enable me to fight, win, and protect Democratic Senate control.
**[So please, before this FEC deadline: Will you donate $5 or more to help me protect this seat and ensure we keep control of the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1204-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=VY9sHq35D94qFDGf%2Fa2OHxnNA%2FnWOPoa&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Bill de Blasio for Congress
subject: No one will work harder
body:
Just look
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/201?t=1&akid=166%2E39519%2EM_eBca)

Friends -
Your $3 contribution will ensure we have the resources to win against well-funded and self-funded opponents.
Please know that Bill is out there EVERY DAY fighting for EVERY vote. But the fundraising is the key. We need them both. And Bill cannot self-fund, so we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Bill de Blasio’s campaign for Congress in New York’s new 10th Congressional District today? We would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/195?c0=join-bdb.JkhHxu&refcode=em-220618&t=2&akid=166%2E39519%2EM_eBca)
No one will work harder in this campaign, and for his constituents in Congress than Bill de Blasio.
We shared some photos earlier this week. But look at this:
**Brooklyn Block Party**
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/212?c0=join-bdb.EEwQiK&refcode=em-220618&t=3&akid=166%2E39519%2EM_eBca)

[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/212?c0=join-bdb.EEwQiK&refcode=em-220618&t=4&akid=166%2E39519%2EM_eBca)
**Petitioning in Sunset Park**
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/212?c0=join-bdb.EEwQiK&refcode=em-220618&t=5&akid=166%2E39519%2EM_eBca)
**Outside schools in the AM**
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/212?c0=join-bdb.EEwQiK&refcode=em-220618&t=6&akid=166%2E39519%2EM_eBca)

[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/212?c0=join-bdb.EEwQiK&refcode=em-220618&t=7&akid=166%2E39519%2EM_eBca)
**Red Hook Community Prom**
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/212?c0=join-bdb.EEwQiK&refcode=em-220618&t=8&akid=166%2E39519%2EM_eBca)
**Late night at Prospect Heights**
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/212?c0=join-bdb.EEwQiK&refcode=em-220618&t=9&akid=166%2E39519%2EM_eBca)
No one will work harder. But Bill can’t do this alone. If we’re together, we’re going to win. So please:
[**Use this link to make a $3 contribution to Bill de Blasio’s campaign for Congress. This is an FEC fundraising deadline month, so your donation means the world.**](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/195?c0=join-bdb.JkhHxu&refcode=em-220618&t=10&akid=166%2E39519%2EM_eBca)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/195?c0=join-bdb.JkhHxu&refcode=em-220618&t=11&akid=166%2E39519%2EM_eBca)**
Thanks,
Bill de Blasio for Congress

De Blasio for Congress

Peter,

One of the first things people will tell you if you plan to run for office is that **it’s a good habit to google yourself from time to time**. Well, I did that recently and this is what I found on the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s Website:

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=6688bc578dc24ce3a0718dc18497b82c&_e=tDW832raHQY5pCsSzdnzhL3b8aCEuDmREdtgazXxkGQMuW5CXwi0ZC9OFS0uk92AVVbRGFv87Zcg5npUeuAPV57ak0V7NHlxX7W1WVA2kvr9MQs9DIG0Fe5Rh1M6CjAbE8SpVCTp7UrvvFSjqBR_dvVsGLk3oFTKn-G3Is5Yru76CeYHSbRil8K06axIbeml5sqeF1FPyToQejfm6DoX2ilt8xMyW2hi3r41tfIwmpIwfOgtfVCjWC5-zF_Tha7NIjGId3KWgquRGZoNTNmSiss_RdiSdVEORfeDYXcHLtS4y-OCphiSpF3Tfa2easggjWOVHOFQkN-dbHtSByHIW_abmujmymv--Z9mNRjmsLVeujjqQL8SjVtSApwZhZ4oeUIz88e0BlVoTQWJ13tFuYi1psuilC5Q_HTV5snZ80oSXJLtHx6QIGulL2NUoIgx)
Calling me “Shady Alek Skarlatos," they begin (**LAUGHING OUT LOUD**), “would be nothing more than a rubber stamp for the MAGA Republican agenda in Washington.”

The press release goes on to say, “**After being rejected by Oregonians at the ballot box last election, Alek Skarlatos is once again running for Oregon’s Fourth Congressional District in order to bring his toxic agenda to Washington**.”

If by “**toxic** ” Democrats mean **tough on crime, pro-2A, lower tax/regulations, then yes, I’m toxic**.

**What I won’t stand for is to have lies written about me and passed around to the national media that discredit my good name.** These people don’t know me, yet the presume that if they write it on their official campaign website then it’s got to be true.

**Democrats are coming after me because they know I have a real shot at winning my race this time around.** I’ve been writing to you for months telling you that the attacks would come; they’ve arrived.

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share Your Thoughts on the Future of the American Dream
body:
| | | [](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9kEFrhDAQhX-N3hQTNRsPHhaKty2lFHoMYzJqWKMyiS39943b9VqY05vvDW-eaY02wHRqW15wXggmWVVJznMt-roWgjXm0pelhKQqYEYKOeG297PVsATw92EljbleXTq1jewZr5oGNecM6tIwOXDdo8GhbyRW6edN3cDOdhlfwWFLYVDk1QIqTENmCMEpkTGZca5YOrdTCJtPymvCuzge9U5o8gnJBhgxX2mMcjxER5g_f-Z3-sKfw1F2e3BKg9vAjktSvpzkAzw5cUB-3eMXEdlo9RvqEBM-Vw6N3V1coYvJn6Jel4BLiOrbNXv_6LKzu5Ras33bebZeXGJj42F6tBP-__YXNKSC6Q)
---
Hello Fellow Conservative, We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it? The woke Left has declared war on parents and schoolchildren with the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory. Progressive” policies on college campuses throughout the nation are threatening the future of free speech and other freedoms we enjoy. The government has abandoned free market principles in favor of out-of-control spending and higher taxes. Now, good people like you are feeling the effects of rampant inflation. And the American Dream is becoming more and more out of reach—especially for future generations. I know this is hard. I know this isn’t what we wanted. But right now, the war for America’s future is upon us. From what I’ve been told, you’re someone who is concerned about the direction our country is headed, and that’s why I’m emailing you today. The Heritage Foundation is currently working on a strategy to fight back and preserve the American Dream. And we want to get your thoughts. **[Would you take this important survey to let us know what you think about the state of the American Dream for you children and grandchildren? ](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9kEFrhDAQhX-N3hQTNRsPHhaKty2lFHoMYzJqWKMyiS39943b9VqY05vvDW-eaY02wHRqW15wXggmWVVJznMt-roWgjXm0pelhKQqYEYKOeG297PVsATw92EljbleXTq1jewZr5oGNecM6tIwOXDdo8GhbyRW6edN3cDOdhlfwWFLYVDk1QIqTENmCMEpkTGZca5YOrdTCJtPymvCuzge9U5o8gnJBhgxX2mMcjxER5g_f-Z3-sKfw1F2e3BKg9vAjktSvpzkAzw5cUB-3eMXEdlo9RvqEBM-Vw6N3V1coYvJn6Jel4BLiOrbNXv_6LKzu5Ras33bebZeXGJj42F6tBP-__YXNKSC6Q)** It should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is critical, so please don’t wait. clean_body: | | | Hello Fellow Conservative, We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it? The woke Left has declared war on parents and schoolchildren with the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory. Progressive” policies on college campuses throughout the nation are threatening the future of free speech and other freedoms we enjoy. The government has abandoned free market principles in favor of out-of-control spending and higher taxes. Now, good people like you are feeling the effects of rampant inflation. And the American Dream is becoming more and more out of reach—especially for future generations. I know this is hard. I know this isn’t what we wanted. But right now, the war for America’s future is upon us. From what I’ve been told, you’re someone who is concerned about the direction our country is headed, and that’s why I’m emailing you today. The Heritage Foundation is currently working on a strategy to fight back and preserve the American Dream. And we want to get your thoughts. It should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is critical, so please don’t wait. You can get started right now using this secure link: Thank you so much. I look forward to getting your insights. Regards, Andrew P. Friends,

Wyoming was founded and built on the idea of freedom, and that’s thankfully still what our state is rooted in today.

**In Wyoming, we believe in the Code of the West.** Those tenets about your word being your bond, knowing where to draw the line, some things not being for sale are all tenets that we aspire to live up to because they go to the core of who we are as a state. **I’ve worked to embody those principles and strive to follow them as I serve.**

Our people are resilient and need an honest person who is loyal to the Constitution above all else to fight for us in Washington, D.C.

clean_body: | Friends, Wyoming was founded and built on the idea of freedom, and that’s thankfully still what our state is rooted in today. In Wyoming, we believe in the Code of the West. Those tenets about your word being your bond, knowing where to draw the line, some things not being for sale are all tenets that we aspire to live up to because they go to the core of who we are as a state. I’ve worked to embody those principles and strive to follow them as I serve. Our people are resilient and need an honest person who is loyal to the Constitution above all else to fight for us in Washington, D.C. | I’m always committed to fighting for Wyoming and I’ll do it in a way that our state can be proud of. Rep. Liz Cheney Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming Our mailing address is: PO Box 3167 Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

body:
Sunny Hostin, Whoopi, and Joy Behar have been busy trashing Republicans...| | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=4eb6ead7e72c49a3ad34891d95031de1&_t=qVyZbXbuwzLK3u-ahFfl-ntS3C-UHvgT0OfvYbB4biYOJeXTaQF4WJFx_WMlsDTfqnwwawZx-xyfhnOeKLQQdkKvIkUxc2xjupJzYtt3SIh4ivrGPgKp-HcUp5Ti9Rg7I5adLCByQmMJjItpq3DnT0BOf4MkQ1z4kkCD6jKCRU8%3D)_

Peter, we’ve been watching _The View_ , so you don’t have to subject yourself to it. We like to keep up with what the left is talking about, and they’ve been on a parade of **LIBERAL INSANITY.** In just the last few weeks, Whoopi called to **BAN FIREARMS,** Joy Behar painted Republicans as **RACISTS** , and Sunny Hostin called Governor DeSantis a **FASCIST.** **_Peter, we’re not the left, we don’t call to cancel people, but we do have a plan to make them lose their minds. _** **What do they want least of all? name: Team UD
subject: We wouldn’t email you again if it wasn’t important:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
reaching out one last time

| We reached out on Thursday.
We reached out yesterday.
Now, we’re reaching out one last time about Sen. Raphael Warnock.

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Mary Miller Surges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
The June 28 Republican primary election in Illinois’s 15th congressional district was supposed to be a cakewalk for establishm
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9023k863vbq1nhvnrc6m2kmo83431dtftt1g8pg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cljm1o70cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6p34e3jjadtlc6r6aopmmlie6sj2mlrr1p3h6konctjgchjjad5l6ioe2tdkmurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8qmccdimmq6fdr0copb1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | |
---
|
---
---
Fellow Conservative: The June 28 Republican primary election in Illinois’s 15th congressional district was supposed to be a cakewalk for establishment liberal incumbent **Rodney Davis** (R-IL). He’s the kind of Republican Washington loves: a big-spending, anti-gun corporate lapdog.
But **Mary Miller** (R-IL), who was redistricted into this race against Davis, is the exact opposite. She is a proven, principled, conservative fighter. She has taken on the establishments of both parties and has the battle scars to prove it.
**Mary Miller is one of us; Rodney Davis is one of them.**
And Illinois conservatives know it. That’s why this race has closed to a dead heat with the primary fast approaching. The GOP establishment is in panic and is pouring millions of corporate dollars to save Davis’s floundering campaign.
Mary Miller doesn’t have Washington, Wall Street, or Silicon Valley – _**she has us**_.
**[Please help Mary Miller defeat RINO Rodney Davis and the Washington establishment.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zda3k80528hknjn9u9aoemcln1t4hlhbfnql42p0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cljm1o70cjh2bs)**
_HFF makes it possible for you to donate directly to her campaign. We will pay all processing fees so she can spend 100% of your contribution on voter contact._
Rodney Davis may be a nice guy, but he’s a lousy congressman – a follower and a flip-flopper who never stands on principle because he doesn’t have any. Davis’s record speaks for itself:
**❌ He voted FOR Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney’s January 6th witch hunt. **
**❌ He voted FOR amnesty for illegal immigrants. **
**❌ He SUPPORTED red flag laws to confiscate citizens’ guns without due process. **
**❌ He voted FOR Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi’s bloated, inflation-boosting spending bill. **
**[Now is the time for conservatives to step up and support Mary Miller. Please do what you can right now!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8jvt1qh86ovggm8bpnbta0q3af8p5e3247ub6k0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cljm1o70cjh2bs)**
_Rodney Davis may have an “R” next to his name, but he’s not the kind of Republican who will fight for our principles and values._ He’s not the kind of Republican America needs as we face a tidal wave of government-created crises at gas pumps, on the border, in our kids’ schools, and across the culture.
**RINO Rodney Davis is the Red Flag for conservatives.** Mary Miller is a brave, fighting champion for liberty. Conservatives everywhere are rallying to her campaign, she is surging in the polls, and the House Freedom Fund is leading the way.
**[Join the fight now and support Mary Miller for Congress.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu6tsnbsu82j9fu0n2chtjak4tmebe119fjf105o_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cljm1o70cjh2bs)** Please don't sit this one out. Mary Miller can win, but only if freedom-loving Americans across the nation lock arms and help push her on to victory. Please take action now.
Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help defend and grow the House Freedom Caucus. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
[**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znd70o82c85adreo95de06cajv6352tej68c3vto_rp22sh2s8i66pb5cljm1o70cjh2bs)
---
|
---
_**"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." – Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)**_
---
---
|

---
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. body:
We have to protect those that protect us

| [ ](http://links.rabineforgovernor.com/u/click?_t=78abe9dc86324f49b823fc51cf303a82&_m=a4f15723604845ea881df0a6010d7762&_e=BWO2hLi9EXmMwC9VVBwsDaYKliIzrhYQ6YAxFFgxlCFYSFEU5kKv5VfvymLxXbZMuJbfQ3A3HJCYZ2LvBGeCZmBJzg2Qt7G5mLfpysYnqGYF_lffRN7hNecyw3MPgLuBWui1bOyOmMbANUd9V8hd4nA82rHM-0_HiwMGQ6Rkrober_LhNjKRC84txYtz3aMj1C0NX1KxbfHlSnemU9wAFr2DbWpQiQcWG4CBOAL08r8LDd3l-2xmy9iq9rEvB1Ts_tGCwZVtCseHmEW9Bw_t4aMTdIdyRJSbZjj3aGrLuSms3HG2QqQaSCTehy96jKpB35XgWzQkMicQsa_3_gP5pvSk6gYD2aizb-hm97lWLNRYBsb1uIglVaZ7_gHgCyXNsZBNfczJ9t9ov9yVSmKBI6eDEtYmTXGfblhAOiDn4k7jLA-cgEfa2PgRBcfbQtRicuEivtx2eipWQGw-C6g3hSAb1gIdacPIZUKaXOY7jJDuxrpho4fWyapto6EjX-GUyaYFKSQTByBmbc27D1AmFGXwG0EBGoys3NIEGifn32M%3D)
