| **'FREEDOM SUITS MEMORIAL' UNVEILING IN ST. LOUIS**
The Freedom Suits Memorial honors and recognizes the approximately 400 slaves and their lawyers who sued for freedom under the United States' "Once Free, Always Free" law that existed from Missouri's conception to the Emancipation Proclamation. Among the cases were Dred and Harriet Scott, who, although initially won their case, would see it overturned in 1852 by the Missouri Supreme Court. The Dred Scott decision would later be upheld by the United States Supreme Court in 1857, laying the groundwork for the American Civil War.

Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis has been chosen to present a resolution honoring the momentous occasion and all those who made it possible. "Before the marches and battlefields, there was the courtroom and the Freedom Suits ready and willing to ignite the spark for freedom in Black America," Roberts said. "I am a Black lawyer in St. Louis, today, because those courageous men and women who stood up for justice. They were giants. Thank you, Freedom Suits, for lighting that spark."

The Freedom Suits Memorial will be unveiled on June 20 at 5 pm at the East Plaza of the Civil Courts Building. Those in attendance will include founder and organizer Judge David C. Mason; Dred and Harriet Scott's descendent, Lynne Jackson; and sculptor Preston Jackson.

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=95369ea63e&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=2a1e5a92f7&e=a088917f89).

clean_body: 'Freedom Suits Memorial' unveiling in St. Louis on June 20 | | | | | | | Capitol Report June 18, 2022 | | | | Contact Senator Roberts 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329 Jefferson City, MO 65101 (573) 751-4415 Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov | | | | | | | | | | | | 'FREEDOM SUITS MEMORIAL' UNVEILING IN ST. LOUIS The Freedom Suits Memorial honors and recognizes the approximately 400 slaves and their lawyers who sued for freedom under the United States' "Once Free, Always Free" law that existed from Missouri's conception to the Emancipation Proclamation. Among the cases were Dred and Harriet Scott, who, although initially won their case, would see it overturned in 1852 by the Missouri Supreme Court. The Dred Scott decision would later be upheld by the United States Supreme Court in 1857, laying the groundwork for the American Civil War. Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis has been chosen to present a resolution honoring the momentous occasion and all those who made it possible. "Before the marches and battlefields, there was the courtroom and the Freedom Suits ready and willing to ignite the spark for freedom in Black America," Roberts said. "I am a Black lawyer in St. Louis, today, because those courageous men and women who stood up for justice. They were giants. Thank you, Freedom Suits, for lighting that spark." The Freedom Suits Memorial will be unveiled on June 20 at 5 pm at the East Plaza of the Civil Courts Building. Those in attendance will include founder and organizer Judge David C. Mason; Dred and Harriet Scott's descendent, Lynne Jackson; and sculptor Preston Jackson. | | 2022 SENATE BILLS \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Authorizes a property tax credit for certain senior citizens \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines \- Modifies the Show-Me Heroes Program to provide for grants for veteran apprenticeship training programs \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons \- Relating to the legal minimum standard for valuation of insurance policies and contracts \- Creates provisions relating to certificates of moral character for persons convicted of certain offenses \- Modifies provisions relating to travel insurance \- Modifies provisions relating to arrests by private persons \- Modifies provisions relating to wrongful convictions \- Authorizes a tax credit for employers providing educational assistance to employees \- Establishes provisions relating to inquiries of wage ranges \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution processes \- Creates provisions relating to grants to not-for-profit organizations for physical security measures \- Designates "Police Officer Tamarris Bohannon Memorial Bridge" \- Modifies provisions relating to the Municipal Land Reutilization Law - Authorizes a tax credit for contributions made to refugee resource centers - Modifies provisions relating to warrants executed by law enforcement officers \- Designates every November 7th as Victims of Communism Memorial Day \- Authorizes a freeze on property tax assessments for senior citizens | | 2022 CO-SPONSORED BILLS \- Establishes the "Truth in Medicine Act" (Schupp) | | "Signed By Governor" | "Truly Agreed Bills" | | | | | HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19). SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing. Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and . Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov for more information on SBA disaster assistance. | | SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit or call 314-531-2003. You can also contact at 314-993-2777. | | COMMUNITY RESOURCE LIST The has a COVID-19 Community Economic Relief Fund. If you need help paying bills, rent, or food call 866-211-9966. : : | | | | | | MEDICAL RESOURCES The Department of Health COVID-19 hotline is open from 8 a.m. - 10 p.m. Call 314-657-1499 with questions or concerns. The Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services hotline can be reached at tel:%20\(877\%20435-8411). | | | | | | RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit: As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy. Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program. Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free. | | LOW-COST INSULIN Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the . | | "COVID-19 Food Stamp Information" | "Student Loans - COVID-19" | "When and How to Use Masks" | | Stay up to date on COVID -19 by using this online resource guide for creditable information while at home. | | Check the Status of your Missouri State Tax refund | | | CITIZENS SERVICE BUREAU If you are having issues with street lights, dumpsters, trees, graffiti, potholes or other such items, please report them to the Citizens' Service Bureau. You can call 314-622-4800 or report online at | | | | | | Keep In Touch Phone: Email: mailto:Steven.Roberts@house.mo.gov Office Address: Room 329 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Roberts for St. Louis, All rights reserved. |LIST:DESCRIPTION| Paid for by Roberts for St. Louis, James D. We’ve been planning for these ten days of getting out the vote for weeks and now it is time to start doing. We have staging locations set up across our district, and 9 rounds of door knocking teams launching today, alone. We are going to make some noise, because that’s how we win. **It all comes down to one question, will they know they have a choice?** To answer that question together, we need to knock on every door. We need to call the people to action, and guide that action into transformation. [**Can you help fuel our get out the vote operation by pitching in $1 for each day we have left until election day?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxES6oBdzf2FvAW__yDJ4YPs36wT-ZPWOstLhriFusAuewXMmNHtubSuOscWj48P5AMtL-irH6LIjOy85pM-5ZuGo9AdcHmZVwMRtYdWDBdk7G3JCbbJCNtEe6fzGaNVC5tK4wsalBRxpuUKmDaxkkfsvYIFFAdlqlRFX3qRu6Dp1GBsXyvcl_uLqk1m16HkiWsabpmNROVzm3eCWMo1bx8s7Xx1BhzYFkBs8u7o0_5JYDg/3n0/Se0az9F6QyKS0Njhme9mzQ/h1/sKl_lpZSZA0CxNMxpKdO-6jF2XKt0wCO9rc9Pn6bL4g) [Donate](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESwmottBJMJQHyMQRD9ATmOhmrmXhBxbR5vftDCceRMeSMOfX9bM193IUU0Kyq1TbdOApv6KJKToYoOQWGA7IdFWRg5TNpe9NXTTbwZSvlLna-YWeyNyND64hcJLVdCp-UvBlb2ZLA1eFF99tRym4GIaAKZQsxuvhcWZBPbKoM7OHkbABTChmW2zYqfhVZlLAvG2-JApRPFPqEpF-n-EwSkg7d2o54V5M4TQQ-fbZKOhQ/3n0/Se0az9F6QyKS0Njhme9mzQ/h2/zherW50E5YTxJu8vcnQP_4CKH08WDUkDl8HElEvHU_E) I’m tired of tolerating a representative who welcomes money from private prison companies, from fossil fuel companies, and from Big Pharma. I’m tired of watching Congress fail to act, and wondering why my representative isn’t leading the charge to make some changes. clean_body: We have 10 days | | | Dear Friends, Today marks 10 days until election day and it is time to go all out. We’ve been planning for these ten days of getting out the vote for weeks and now it is time to start doing. We have staging locations set up across our district, and 9 rounds of door knocking teams launching today, alone. We are going to make some noise, because that’s how we win. It all comes down to one question, will they know they have a choice? To answer that question together, we need to knock on every door. We need to call the people to action, and guide that action into transformation. I’m tired of tolerating a representative who welcomes money from private prison companies, from fossil fuel companies, and from Big Pharma. I’m tired of watching Congress fail to act, and wondering why my representative isn’t leading the charge to make some changes. I’m tired of watching Black women get told they aren’t qualified to lead. But I’m not just tired. I’m ready. I’m ready for change. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

**_A Note From Nikki:_** Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. **[Pre-order your signed copy today to have it shipped to you once it launches in clean_body: | | | Friend, Gas prices are on the rise — we want to know who you think is best suited to tackle the issue of rising prices at the pump. Will you take this survey by midnight tonight to let us know your thoughts? As a valued member of our team we need your input. Your opinion is important. Please share it with us. Sincerely, Stand For America PAC Team | A Note From Nikki: Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. name: Patty Murray
subject: ICYMI: Golden Tennis Shoe Awards
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Check out this year’s awardees
#
Peter,
I started the Golden Tennis Shoe Awards as a way to recognize that anyone who cares and speaks up–even a mom in tennis shoes–can make a difference. That the most powerful force for change isn’t special interests or big money, it’s special people with big hearts.
**[This year’s 2022 Golden Tennis Shoe Awardees were no exception. Watch the video about this year’s awardees and chip in $5 to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46688700/351333866/-1945364894?refcode=pm_em_220618_1&&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOThjMmEwYS0zZWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOyKsxEH0GhORPnup-y4neSrJl4XWlnIso2YjlcjET0=)**
* In 2015, Rick Clark was out of money and couldn’t afford rent or electricity when he decided he could still do more to help those around him. Rick started “Giving Back Packs” and has since given out thousands of backpacks filled with toiletries, food, and other supplies to people experiencing homelessness.

* Liselle Pires and Quena Batres met on a volcano during the pandemic – and quickly bonded over the challenges they faced as women of color who loved the outdoors. This led to the Trail Mixed Collective–an organization to create a safe space for women of color seeking out adventure sports.

* Jennifer Stuber took the heartbreaking tragedy of her husband dying from suicide and channeled that grief into purpose. From helping pass bills in the state legislature to creating innovative new programs, her tireless work is helping end the stigma around mental health, build coalitions to reach people far and wide, and save lives.

I was inspired by how all of this year’s awardees could have given in or given up, but instead, they chose to stand up, reach out, and help others around them. They have reminded me–and I hope you, too–that we are not alone. And if all of us do a little bit, we can work together to make our futures a little brighter, our world a little bigger, and our lives a little better.
**[Learn more about each of these awardees, and chip in whatever you can so I can keep building toward a stronger, fairer future for us all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46688701/351333867/-1945364894?refcode=pm_em_220618_1&&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOThjMmEwYS0zZWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOyKsxEH0GhORPnup-y4neSrJl4XWlnIso2YjlcjET0=)**
Thank you,
Patty Murray

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46688702/351333868/-1945364894?refcode=pm_em_220618_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOThjMmEwYS0zZWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOyKsxEH0GhORPnup-y4neSrJl4XWlnIso2YjlcjET0=)****

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Tanesha Booker
subject: Hi, I’m Tanesha
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Hi Peter! My name
is Tanesha — I’m Charles’ wife.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220618.zPHLNW&refcode=em20220618-other-2089&t=1001&akid=2089%2E346206%2Ec_MeAo ][IMG]

I want to wish all the dads, grandfathers, and father figures out there an
early Happy Father’s Day. Every day, I feel lucky to see the love Charles
gives our girls and I know how hard he’s worked to make sure our family
feels safe, secure, and loved.

Everything Charles has fought for as a public servant — a chance to get a
college education without going into crippling debt, a livable planet for
future generations, an end to police brutality that targets people that
look like us — is for our daughters.

But we know that will only happen if we make big changes in our politics —
and that starts with replacing Rand Paul. So that’s why I’m reaching out
to you today to help put together a special Father’s Day gift for
Charles:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220618.zPHLNW&refcode=em20220618-other-2089&t=1002&akid=2089%2E346206%2Ec_MeAo ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help me raise
$10,000 today for the campaign? It would mean a lot to Charles to know
that all of you are supporting him this election in this work to lift up
our families.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220618.zPHLNW&refcode=em20220618-2089&t=1021&akid=2089%2E346206%2Ec_MeAo ]Contribute $5

I know how hard Charles will fight for us because I’ve seen the way he’s
fought for our family.

Everything he does is in commitment to making sure the future is a better
place for our children. He saw the way his parents struggled to make ends
meet and has dedicated his life to ending generational poverty and making
sure every family has a fair shot at the American Dream.

That’s why when Charles talks about passing Medicare for All, a Kentucky
New Deal, or gun reform — I know these aren’t just policies to him.
They’re real solutions to the problems he’s witnessed in his life.

Charles is the change that Kentucky is hungry for. And it’s becoming clear
that Rand is realizing that too.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220618.zPHLNW&refcode=em20220618-other-2089&t=1022&akid=2089%2E346206%2Ec_MeAo ]I really want to surprise Charles tomorrow and tell him that I helped
raise $10,000 for the campaign. Will you chip in right now and fuel this
work to create a future our children deserve?

Thanks,

Tanesha

clean_body: [1]Charles Booker Hi Peter! My name is Tanesha — I’m Charles’ wife. [ ][IMG] I want to wish all the dads, grandfathers, and father figures out there an early Happy Father’s Day. Every day, I feel lucky to see the love Charles gives our girls and I know how hard he’s worked to make sure our family feels safe, secure, and loved. Everything Charles has fought for as a public servant — a chance to get a college education without going into crippling debt, a livable planet for future generations, an end to police brutality that targets people that look like us — is for our daughters. But we know that will only happen if we make big changes in our politics — and that starts with replacing Rand Paul. So that’s why I’m reaching out to you today to help put together a special Father’s Day gift for Charles: [ ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help me raise $10,000 today for the campaign? It would mean a lot to Charles to know that all of you are supporting him this election in this work to lift up our families. [ ]Contribute $5 I know how hard Charles will fight for us because I’ve seen the way he’s fought for our family. Everything he does is in commitment to making sure the future is a better place for our children. He saw the way his parents struggled to make ends meet and has dedicated his life to ending generational poverty and making sure every family has a fair shot at the American Dream. That’s why when Charles talks about passing Medicare for All, a Kentucky New Deal, or gun reform — I know these aren’t just policies to him. They’re real solutions to the problems he’s witnessed in his life. Charles is the change that Kentucky is hungry for. And it’s becoming clear that Rand is realizing that too. [ ]I really want to surprise Charles tomorrow and tell him that I helped raise $10,000 for the campaign. Will you chip in right now and fuel this work to create a future our children deserve? Thanks, Tanesha Contribute to Charles Booker:

body:
It's time to restore freedom.
| | [ ](http://email.email.doug4gov.com/c/eJxdj81OhDAUhZ-m7CDt7QCdBQuVjAtXaiY6q0lpCzTpDw4FHZ_egmiMSdOk57vn9hxZMY73mCW6AgyAC8JIgTHJMwKKQyGUoJTTRhC0w8pybTLpp27X-TkT3iZ9xZlopMJcCUZoq1qKmdwDJaQs2J5Dm5iqD2EYEb1BcIjnr39R6GEK9myV1JNFtF4_QVAs4uini1BRdMKcuR2Mbq8bEvHJdeci3ILn6eBHHbR348-Md0G58O1P6Qu7n-c3-XyM-OyMlhH8E3stY9D66cMJ2ySXSg7v2hg9FmWs3631l9ZblAqVtwhgNQGsBeH04PipP3afj2kj8_S1IwuCu3iH66B-57YV2VYXUFl_AXPRfEY)

| | Peter, **It's time for Pennsylvanians to unite**. Together, we can achieve a better and STRONGER Pennsylvania. Our liberties have been **stolen**. Our voices have been silenced. Our economy was destroyed. And our education system is failing. _We have to fight back, Peter._

It's going to take **STRONG** and ethical leadership to bring our state back, but together, we can do this. **Learn more about where I stand** :
* **REBUILD FAMILIES** : Shift education funding to children and implement tougher penalties for crimes against children.
* **RESTORE FREEDOM** : Reject all unconstitutional mandates and establish PA as a "2nd amendment sanctuary"
* **REVIVE ECONOMY** : Eliminate property tax and protect utility costs
* **REDUCE BURDEN** : Propose a budget that keeps spending in check and cut statewide regulations
* **RESTORE CONFIDENCE** : Secure elections from fraud
* **CLEAN UP HARRISBURG** : Eliminate back-door lobbying and prohibit political consultants from recieving lavish gifts

| [ **SUPPORT DOUG'S CAMPAIGN** ](http://email.email.doug4gov.com/c/eJxdUMFuhCAU_Bq8YeCpqAcPbTd76altNumeNgioJAJGsNvdry9a2yZNyEuYeW8yM7KpOKlJlegGCABhtKKMEFqkFBQHJpTIMp61gqKcKMP1mEq39HnvPlLhTDI0ZVEXdS27umJAK8VlmwspRMmylrC2o8nYDCFMHmUPCI7xeSWWWaVXbWclV5GIdbNWVnrsOrzKY8N9mDW3LnLRE8GT8zpoZz0eUHZcgrkYJfViUHbYXCFgK-jdMgsVQSvGCzfTqLvbTon45bq3kdyTFn-qPzvOBmXD9z1eZH6q2N28LZG-2FHLSPwDBy1jssPrpxWmTeZGTlc9jtqzMvbVb32tNe1WGlQ-IoDtCGBrBM7Plp-HU39_wa0s8HtPVwqe4gy3Sf3u7RLpHhdQefgC7K-OJA)
---
These goals may be ambitious, but **TOGETHER** we can achieve them. I just need YOUR support, Peter. _Will you join my team?_ Thank you, Doug Mastriano Candidate for Governor of Pennsylvania

name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: News to share (good and bad)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
There’s so much at stake in this election.
#
I’ll get right to it. We have good news and bad news to share.
**Here's the good news:** A new poll released this week shows Beto within just five points of Greg Abbott. Beto has cut Abbott's lead by a full 10 points since entering the race — and Abbott’s support among Texans is _plummeting_.
**But here's the bad news:** One of Abbott's strategists announced that they're planning to spend over $100 million attacking Beto. In other words, they’re going to try to buy their way to victory.

There’s so much at stake in this election, and we can’t let Abbott’s corporate mega-donors drown out Beto’s message.
**[Can you make your very first donation to Beto’s people-powered campaign for Governor today? The future of Texas is on the line.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220618-1.x2S9Sw&refcode=ema20220618-194503&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=194503%2E444211%2E-13WI4)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220618-1.x2S9Sw&refcode=ema20220618-194503&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=194503%2E444211%2E-13WI4)**
This race will be one of the most competitive — and expensive — in Texas history. But while Abbott calls up his large corporate donors for check after check, we'll be focused on the people of Texas.
**Because the people of Texas are with us.** They reject Abbott’s extreme positions on abortion and guns, the hatred he stokes towards vulnerable Texans, and his blatant attacks on their rights. That’s why his support has fallen below 50% — shockingly low for an incumbent.
While Abbott tries to buy re-election, Beto is focused on building a big, bold vision for Texas that encompasses everyone, _but we need this grassroots movement to have his back if we’re going to win_.
**[Will you donate $3 to help elect Beto, and defeat Greg Abbott?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220618-1.x2S9Sw&refcode=ema20220618-194503&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=194503%2E444211%2E-13WI4)**
Your support means so much to us.
Thank you,
Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220618-194503-footer&t=22&refcode2=194503_444211_-13WI4&akid=194503%2E444211%2E-13WI4)**
---

body:
California already has two senators pushing their far-left agenda, so they don’t need a third. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c36f920695f74c6d992ec6b273ee1ed7&_e=vtItFqCyx8uaiV1nD6-D6H4EVQzvZSxE0S3q32QFhv_OgjK1TeGgOMYPkJCYzp8bRmm-EKgoa9TEQEK7rM2mX1X2vkg3_XLaKl-0qrN6b78s0YX8Ocnw5AVow27vrgYhgblzk9hmAW96nvZn8nneGH2bKFai1a_pBmh22gTyiuNT95cem6FP4_ojudAf9Xn9LTJZdXurJg_8oZ9nISbhbYw7sBZ3NFwTMen8fK5jrBz_QBcCkGbDSpCvV40XUuvAos9XTvRj5nD307aSAt-U-VdTiLoKMmqqCwTNYKaHz0wlayet2tzjtnEWVMfBMx41hLkEDtsYlZM6VC8b6fMBrgpNIQ2GPtohA255oWAhhVUvPMBOjmwdjbJ-O3sYDiQ2lACLtyz5XddLN82WVOr9u86qDz5q9DdHC473aky0jpxYLx1mupJnPs_dXduVX08pDtZ7tYd-D2HBHLh_qwdgvi0mc2NeWAXb7ONi3-tbs6dyqPJ97hd0qQOBG4zagRFV)

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock claims he represents Georgia, but all you have to do is look at his voting record and donor list to see who he really represents... far-left states like California.

Not only does Senator Warnock vote with Joe Biden 96% of the time, **but he votes with California Senator Dianne Feinstein 99% of the time. That's 99%!**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c36f920695f74c6d992ec6b273ee1ed7&_e=vtItFqCyx8uaiV1nD6-D6H4EVQzvZSxE0S3q32QFhv_OgjK1TeGgOMYPkJCYzp8bRmm-EKgoa9TEQEK7rM2mX1X2vkg3_XLaKl-0qrN6b78s0YX8Ocnw5AVow27vrgYhgblzk9hmAW96nvZn8nneGH2bKFai1a_pBmh22gTyiuNT95cem6FP4_ojudAf9Xn9LTJZdXurJg_8oZ9nISbhbYw7sBZ3NFwTMen8fK5jrBz_QBcCkGbDSpCvV40XUuvAos9XTvRj5nD307aSAt-U-VdTiLoKMmqqCwTNYKaHz0zK9Dmn2v9khuC410qv8mglDsa6ydAB6qNhNRI_kaywO7LirRa1pMQhpKncle3u4efKaA_jmJX__fSAllUeVnMoh9Kg8Wj3ZQ924XjHvZYGS_AhTSlCdTaxrWI3onPO83zutXwiv8xaK_RUL6xjzyHBs-fcgVik_Pr75xo2TM_lxq4d03KvxO-CyD09cqBvBmnRt4BtWdpJyeY3zGGCcpvx)
**Additionally, Warnock votes with New York's Democrat Senator Chuck Schumer 99% of the time too!** The numbers don't lie.

_**So while my opponent may claim to represent Georgia, he votes like he's the 3rd senator from California or New York!**_

**[Donate right now and send California's 3rd senator packing!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c36f920695f74c6d992ec6b273ee1ed7&_e=vtItFqCyx8uaiV1nD6-D6H4EVQzvZSxE0S3q32QFhv_OgjK1TeGgOMYPkJCYzp8bRmm-EKgoa9TEQEK7rM2mX1X2vkg3_XLaKl-0qrN6b78s0YX8Ocnw5AVow27vrgYhgblzk9hmAW96nvZn8nneGH2bKFai1a_pBmh22gTyiuNT95cem6FP4_ojudAf9Xn9LTJZdXurJg_8oZ9nISbhbYw7sBZ3NFwTMen8fK5jrBz_QBcCkGbDSpCvV40XUuvAos9XTvRj5nD307aSAt-U-VdTiLoKMmqqCwTNYKaHz0xQngIUr7YTlBMXqWU88ki7dg1ncia935W18yYEiEMd1vm4lvWvleitXCpoGsKu_XMIVDBHo8RxbLqfOrvZmYh1MMD1MPCaKSj-8rw08ykUi6kzsFDK2or_JMUOmwLwIAqvft_Q6BxQYCuTqnHHWm8EGJiAH4kHPxvbVu5AX25ZM5INPfIpPxCgjQgZInqk3AmJ9fiVBtN6BzsA_PVQJtwk)**
**It's no wonder that more than half of my opponent's online donations come from the most far-left states like New York and California, but only 10% of his money comes from Georgia.**

clean_body: California already has two senators pushing their far-left agenda, so they don’t need a third. | Fellow American, Raphael Warnock claims he represents Georgia, but all you have to do is look at his voting record and donor list to see who he really represents... far-left states like California. Not only does Senator Warnock vote with Joe Biden 96% of the time, but he votes with California Senator Dianne Feinstein 99% of the time. That's 99%! Additionally, Warnock votes with New York's Democrat Senator Chuck Schumer 99% of the time too! The numbers don't lie. So while my opponent may claim to represent Georgia, he votes like he's the 3rd senator from California or New York! It's no wonder that more than half of my opponent's online donations come from the most far-left states like New York and California, but only 10% of his money comes from Georgia. Georgians deserve a senator with conservative values who will fight for them - not California! If we're going to flip a Democrat-held seat and stop the Biden agenda in the Senate, it starts in Georgia. Warnock's campaign may be supported by Hollywood millionaires, but our campaign is fueled by patriotic Americans - LIKE YOU! Sincerely, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Congresswoman Demings
subject: Please, friend, I'm counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Friend, polling shows me 2 points behind Marco Rubio, and experts say this race will come down to who has the resources to compete.

That's why this is so concerning: Florida can decide Senate control, and I'm currently short of my midnight fundraising goal. So my team sent me your updated supporter record:

Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Suggested contribution: $5

Today's donation: PENDING

DONATE: https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3584-fr-text

Donations from your area: 68% to goal

Deadline: 11:59 p.m.

This race is about more than just my unlikely story of opportunity: It's about a meaningful movement for Floridians and the country. It's about expanding our Senate majority. Mitch McConnell only needs one seat to flip a 50-50 Senate – and we can't let Florida be the seat securing him Senate control.

We can win this – CNN is calling this seat a top pickup opportunity – but we have a steep hill to climb. The GOP is pouring more than $10 MILLION into organizing in Florida to register a groundbreaking number of Republican voters .

Republicans are working in overdrive to make sure no Democrat can flip Florida ever again, friend. This is our moment: It has never been more important to build the infrastructure to fight back, and we need to make early investments. We can't do that if we miss this goal.

I know this people-powered movement is strong enough to defeat Marco Rubio and the GOP, but we need to raise another $50,000 RIGHT NOW to register more Democratic voters and flip Florida blue . Please, friend, I'm counting on you to help me reach this goal:

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3584-fr-text

Friend, rush $5 right now to help me close our fundraising gap before midnight tonight, pull ahead of Marco Rubio in the polls and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3584-fr-text

I can't thank you enough for your support,

Val Demings

--------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ibu2rS35CUKF9kop2dIjsg2] , or click here to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/hmC0qfqgmEqyHNrEYyYQgg2?unsubscribedata=Uc1PDL7IBYsHO6xmrSbnNsZwk53gSCSTahdHzfwJJox%2FwrEU4M39IZ4DcupekWJYZuNIqGB%2FcYsC3Dr12cDaBMi9QZw%2FymPe86W9kwXHKNIorFMudUH%2Bp5cvkTE2tdKLjLhytzg1MwBLlmli5j97Mp1usHylf%2BVTZ8TMd0P3gKei4Owhxj1Bl3D5uiIAwXZx5N%2F%2BYscquU34kirX2t1hC2m3K1ycNFAFsIUgkipZhwvjP1uflQ1HqlG7iXSxDsFHuvNgi6M3lizLX2PO4Ggyj4SdbE0O40QOwg9f4nm0knMQMvGzG673rfpI6RDxZnzDbRpoZFzw5LSqBlTJbFRqttXljWdrczm4C1QwtRtJ%2BwmRzjkbB%2FXaTlyYwJCKo41jT4ouqmq273sm5oxvMObnns7iCykTadsKjy34r1T1KOt65KdYO2Gov6hzw1LuUtuL .

clean_body: Our country needs tough conservatives in Congress who aren’t afraid to take on the woke mob.| | | Peter, Our country needs tough conservatives in Congress who aren’t afraid to take on the woke mob. That’s why I’m emailing you about Jim Bognet, who’s running for Congress in Pennsylvania. I’ve gotten to know Jim well during the past couple of years, and he’s got what it takes to be the strong leader we need in Congress. But he can’t get there without our help. Jim is running in one of the most targeted races in the country , which means Democrats are going to do everything in their power to defeat him. Peter, to win back the House, we MUST do everything we can to help Jim fight back and WIN. I’m proud to endorse Jim because I know he will stand up for all Americans by fighting Joe Biden’s incompetent administration. Jim grew up in rural Northeastern PA and learned his values working construction with his dad and going to Mass with his family on Sundays. He’s a tough conservative with proven experience. And in Congress, he’ll build the wall, stand up for our country, and FIRE PELOSI! Jim is 100% committed to putting Americans first - if we’re going to turn this country around, we must support him! In service, | | Tom Cotton | | | | PAID FOR BY BOGNET FOR CONGRESS | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Team Benson
subject: Here’s what you said
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
First, THANK YOU!

Hundreds of you took the time to share your thoughts with our team. And here’s what you said:

How confident are you feeling about the future of our democracy?

I think that we will muddle through somehow and save our democratic form of government, although we must be ever more vigilant. - Valerie

Very anxious about what is coming at the polls in terms of violence and attacks. - Margaret

Republican Party, as currently exists, has devolved to a fascist totalitarian state. - Ronald

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=061822 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=061822]

What challenges do you see in your city or area?

Very far right people running to be put in offices to take away our rights with much money behind them and attacking everything I believe in. - Carol

Challenge in Michigan is defending the right to vote. - James

Keeping domestic terrorists...from sabotaging elections and threatening duly elected officials. - Mary

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=061822 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=061822]

Do you think we’re on the right path?

I think SOS Benson is doing a great job. Very honest and forthright. I pray she wins the election against her crazy opponent. - Carol

Yes, Secretary Benson, thank you for working to protect our voting rights, this is a very important foundation. Please continue to focus on the basics. - Gretchen

We will only stay on the right path if Democrats can continue to stay in power. - Lucille

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=061822 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=061822]
You can see, we’ve got great support on our team but we’ve still got a lot of work to do.

Thank you for providing your thoughtful feedback about the current state of your community. Be sure to support Jocelyn’s campaign today.

-Team Benson

name: Adam Schiff
subject: This is why we need to fight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| 147 Republicans in Congress voted to overturn the 2020 election, and their dangerous ideas have only become more mainstream from Congress to state legislatures.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=387%2E5257348%2EfVtYGG)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220618_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=387%2E5257348%2EfVtYGG)
Derek,
Yet another week has gone by and Republican candidates and GOP voters have shown us what a stranglehold Donald Trump has maintained on his party. In race after race, Republicans are tripping over themselves to embrace Trump and tout his endorsement as the single most important measuring stick for their campaign’s legitimacy.
By working to impress a twice-impeached president, they have: Repeated the Big Lie. Spread election conspiracies. And justified or downplayed the attacks on our democracy.
_Honestly, it’s all pretty sad and pathetic. And dangerous, to say the least._
**Trump isn’t even _on_ the ballot this year**, but this election is symbolically a referendum on how much sway he still has over the party he’s molded into his own cult of personality, less than two years after he used election conspiracies to incite the most dangerous assault against our democracy in modern history.
**That means this election is _also_ our moment to save our democracy from Trump and all of his extremist cronies by rebuking his lies, his corruption, and his violent rhetoric.** If we don’t, Republicans could take back Congress, Trump will run in 2024, and he could seize a second term in power — even if he loses the popular vote and Electoral College.
**147 Republicans in Congress voted to overturn the 2020 election, and their dangerous ideas have only become more mainstream from Congress to state legislatures.**
We can't let them retake the House. Keeping Kevin McCarthy out of the Speaker's office is one way we can protect the heart of our democracy.
But, Derek, the thing is, Republicans are raising _record-breaking_ amounts of money from their right-wing benefactors and dark money Super PACs.
But we can and will overcome their efforts with a huge grassroots-powered movement.
**[I need your support to defeat MAGA extremists running to flip our House majority and roll back our progress. Can you pitch in $10 today to help?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220618_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=387%2E5257348%2EfVtYGG)**

name: Deb Baldus McGrath (personal)
subject: a few reflections ahead of Father’s Day:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
To my dad, my husband, son, and all the fathers and father figures out there: We celebrate you!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46684148/351311632/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.2a18edc9-21ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.2a18edc9-21ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTE4ZWRjOS0yMWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H_3Ctx-g4cPux63fhhcJvYlTD8Cg6BRX6zBnDJUGQzs=) Peter,

As you know, tomorrow is Father’s Day, so I wanted to share a few thoughts with you about the fathers in my life. [Later, I will ask you to chip into my campaign for Congress, so I can work to build a stronger future for our communities in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46684149/351311633/-1740198439?refcode=ea.2a18edc9-21ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.2a18edc9-21ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTE4ZWRjOS0yMWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H_3Ctx-g4cPux63fhhcJvYlTD8Cg6BRX6zBnDJUGQzs=)

**My own father, Al Baldus, was a true public servant.** He served our country in WWII and the Korean Conflict. Later, he served our state as a legislator in Madison and then as a Congressman in Washington. However, it was his patience, kindness, and quiet strength he showed for my family, day in and day out, that I valued most about my father. **So much of who my father was, and what he spent his career doing, has inspired my path in the military and public service.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46684150/351311634/-1740198439?refcode=ea.2a18edc9-21ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.2a18edc9-21ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTE4ZWRjOS0yMWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H_3Ctx-g4cPux63fhhcJvYlTD8Cg6BRX6zBnDJUGQzs=) _Me, as a child, with my father and my family_ **My husband, Kevin, is also a committed public servant to our country and a partner to me in raising our children.** He served in the Army for 32 years, putting his life on the line to protect the freedoms we hold dear. His service (and mine) meant we have spent many of our 34 years of marriage apart. We traded off responsibilities in raising our children as one of us deployed and the other stayed to care for our family. Being a military spouse and parent is not easy, but I am deeply grateful for the sacrifices Kevin made for our country and our family. Now our son is a father and serving in the military. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46684151/351311635/-1740198439?refcode=ea.2a18edc9-21ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.2a18edc9-21ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTE4ZWRjOS0yMWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H_3Ctx-g4cPux63fhhcJvYlTD8Cg6BRX6zBnDJUGQzs=) _Kevin and I with our children_ My father, husband, and son inspire me as caring parents every day. On the long days campaigning for Congress, I know the sacrifices I am making will all be worth it for the opportunity to build a stronger future for Wisconsinites, and all the families like mine across the country.

[That’s why I have to ask you to chip in to support the campaign we’re building together. Any amount you can contribute _today_ will make a difference as we gear up for our upcoming election >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46684152/351311636/-1740198439?refcode=ea.2a18edc9-21ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.2a18edc9-21ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTE4ZWRjOS0yMWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H_3Ctx-g4cPux63fhhcJvYlTD8Cg6BRX6zBnDJUGQzs=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | ****[$3 clean_body: To my dad, my husband, son, and all the fathers and father figures out there: We celebrate you! | = Peter, As you know, tomorrow is Father’s Day, so I wanted to share a few thoughts with you about the fathers in my life. = My own father, Al Baldus, was a true public servant. He served our country in WWII and the Korean Conflict. Later, he served our state as a legislator in Madison and then as a Congressman in Washington. However, it was his patience, kindness, and quiet strength he showed for my family, day in and day out, that I valued most about my father. So much of who my father was, and what he spent his career doing, has inspired my path in the military and public service. = Me, as a child, with my father and my family My husband, Kevin, is also a committed public servant to our country and a partner to me in raising our children. He served in the Army for 32 years, putting his life on the line to protect the freedoms we hold dear. His service (and mine) meant we have spent many of our 34 years of marriage apart. We traded off responsibilities in raising our children as one of us deployed and the other stayed to care for our family. Being a military spouse and parent is not easy, but I am deeply grateful for the sacrifices Kevin made for our country and our family. Now our son is a father and serving in the military. = Kevin and I with our children My father, husband, and son inspire me as caring parents every day. On the long days campaigning for Congress, I know the sacrifices I am making will all be worth it for the opportunity to build a stronger future for Wisconsinites, and all the families like mine across the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Thank you - and to all the fathers and father figures out there: Happy Father’s Day! Deb | Deb Baldus McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. This campaign runs on the support from folks like you. = | **=** **=** Learn more at: Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 41, Menomonie, WI 54751 Use of Deb Baldus McGrath's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform (or that of others) does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, the Central Intelligence Agency, or any other branch of government. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: A corporate money dump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,
corporate-backed Super PACs and
organizations just keep popping up to spend against us in primaries.

These groups have spent more than $6 million against us in primaries this
year — the newest one is Opportunity for All Action Fund running ads
against Kina Collins in IL-7.

Whether it’s this new group, Team Blue PAC, Mainstream Democrats PAC,
United Democracy Project or Democratic Majority for Israel (DMFI), they’re
all run by the political establishment and they're all willing to spend
millions of corporate dollars to stop our progressive candidates. They
spent more than $3 million against Summer Lee and $2 million against
Jessica Cisneros. Now, they’re targeting our last primary challenger of
the year: Kina Collins.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110595?refcode=em20220618-23906&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=23906%2E1203867%2Ex6GmAZ ]Donate $3 today to help us fight back against
billionaires and corporations. We need your support to help Kina win her
primary on 6/28 (just 10 days away). The establishment will not stop
spending against us, so we really need your help today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110595?refcode=em20220618-23906&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=23906%2E1203867%2Ex6GmAZ ]Contribute $3

The Democratic Party is a big tent, but, unfortunately, for corporate
interests and even right-wing foreign policy positions. This includes
lawmakers that obstruct the Democratic agenda (Josh Gottheimer, Team Blue
PAC), Silicon Valley billionaires (Reid Hoffman, Mainstream Democrats
PAC), and right-wing foreign policy hawks (United Democracy Project and
DMFI).

Instead of fighting back against corporate greed, the Democratic Party
embraces it. Instead of saying “No” to billionaire donors, the Democratic
Party protects their interests. Instead of working for the people, they
spend millions to stop progress.

We won’t stop fighting to transform the political establishment by
electing more lawmakers who will challenge the status quo. And we can only
keep up our work with the help of our grassroots donors.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110595?refcode=em20220618-23906&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=23906%2E1203867%2Ex6GmAZ ]Peter, can
you chip in to fuel our work to elect progressive fighters like AOC, Cori
Bush, and Jamaal Bowman? We can only do this $3, $27, and $50 at a time
with your support.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=23906%2E1203867%2Ex6GmAZ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=23906%2E1203867%2Ex6GmAZ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220618-23906-footer&t=1025&refcode2=23906_1203867_x6GmAZ&akid=23906%2E1203867%2Ex6GmAZ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=23906%2E1203867%2Ex6GmAZ

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: can’t afford a summer slump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

We want to be blunt for a moment,
Derek:

Our campaign has a clear and data-driven path to victory this November. It
builds on a decade of deep organizing in our communities to bring together
a coalition of Georgians that Brian Kemp and too many other politicians
have left behind.

But the summer months are notoriously difficult for grassroots campaigns
and we’ve seen fundraising slow these first weeks of June. With so much
going on, we get that it can be easy to tune out of political campaigns —
but these months are crucial for our team,
Derek.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1455?refcode=sa_em_220618_B1_Slump_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=672%2E1862389%2Epd3NlJ ]That’s why we’re asking: can you make a $5 contribution
today to elect Stacey Abrams as the next governor of Georgia? Any amount
helps us get out of our summer fundraising slump and will set Stacey up
for success in November.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1455?refcode=sa_em_220618_B1_Slump_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=672%2E1862389%2Epd3NlJ ]DONATE NOW

This fundraising slowdown is happening at the worst possible time. In less
than two weeks, everything that we’ve raised since the general election
began is going to go public for the first time.

Kemp, GOP strategists and the media are all going to go over our
fundraising report with a fine-tooth comb to see if we have the resources
to run a competitive campaign.

Republicans are hoping to catch us in a summer slowdown exactly like this
one. We understand that not everyone is able to donate every time that we
email — but if just one in four people chipped in after reading this, we’d
be on track to a huge show of strength at the end of the month.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1455?refcode=sa_em_220618_B1_Slump_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=672%2E1862389%2Epd3NlJ ]Derek, will
you chip in $5 — or whatever makes sense for your budget —
before June 30? When these numbers go public, we want Brian Kemp to see
the strength of our grassroots team.

Thanks,

Abrams for Georgia

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Gov DeSantis: “I will never stop fighting”
body:
Our country is currently facing a great threat. A new enemy has emerged from the shadows
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7q07cjm62hs277l7ckdtc2asupnv8gohevenh0g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr66dpkeipm9cj3m6o79cr2e9jb5d356iprccbkcph3co9ncjg63dbge6rr2obgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666qbbd1nmti6cd72mdi3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933climao71c9j6aoh5u)
[****](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zup0o3bfpbvpsdsi4k1ta23b98vtlvqk1nlogqbg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clge2oj6clh2bs)

Friend,
**Our country is currently facing a great threat.** A new enemy has emerged from the shadows that seeks to destroy and intimidate their way to a transformed state, and country, that you and I would hardly recognize.
This enemy is the radical vigilante woke mob that will steamroll anything and anyone in their way. Their blatant attacks on the American way of life are clear and intensifying: stifling dissent, public shaming, rampant violence, and a perverted version of history.
A group that will, literally, tear down monuments and buildings but -- perhaps in an even more sinister way -- tear down the American spirit itself. **They go after the family unit, parental rights, traditional moral values, the church, and fact-based education.**
Over the past few years, we've watched horrified as this group has attempted to _**brainwash our children**_ into thinking we live in an evil, racist, irredeemable country.
We listened to them deny science and data to exert political theater all the while _**trampling over personal liberties enshrined in the Constitution.**_
[**> > DONATE NOW TO HELP US CONTINUE THE FIGHT <<**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2n0r2qmsafi0f5mv0k4583oo7mvs5de5ug8vp6g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clge2oj6clh2bs)
We saw them take to the streets for an entire summer like outlaws burning, looting, and destroying everything in sight while being told they were "mostly peaceful" and "passionate."
We watched _**Big Tech moguls in Silicon Valley be the arbiters of truth**_ - deciding who gets to speak and who gets silenced through the digital public square.
We listened to the legacy media muffle legitimately verifiable news stories that didn't align with their preferred narrative, only to watch the truth trickle out months later at a more politically expedient time.
**Well,****Friend****, the time for listening and watching from the sidelines is over.**
This enemy has taken over media, educational institutions, corporate boards, professional sports, foundations, and professional institutions. They have left no corner of our lives untouched. But all hope is not lost.
**We The People still have a say.** We know the truth, you and I, about America and the country she is and can be. We must fight to defeat these false pretenses and predetermined narratives.
**I am choosing to counter this enemy with faith, with reason, and with freedom. As Governor of the Free State of Florida, I have chosen to lead with a vision that builds America up rather than tears it down.**
Together we can ensure that our children are raised to know they live in the greatest state in the nation, the greatest country in the world and that they have an opportunity to continue making them even greater.
[**If you 've been waiting for the right time to get off the sidelines and fight for the rights you know were given to man by God Himself - the time is NOW.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7ds3tsjdk60hpfg5e483qmo5slftvujr32oe0io_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clge2oj6clh2bs)
[**If you 're with me, **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqrkfuqadep7h30ug3rpimgk1ggu38a2fb6dv8ro_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clge2oj6clh2bs)[**Friend****, chip in any amount to help me defeat this enemy.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcf6retjba3nacnk8rf1l80otrelgi1sm9bc9i70_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clge2oj6clh2bs) I can't do it without you. I promise you; I will _**never**_ stop fighting.
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm0q6ssqpk5tbtcvvn664ch7uv7cnuk2dqpbap4g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clge2oj6clh2bs "CHIP IN NOW") [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqqb6nsakle68c1vmma6jua0puo9i0rdpq3c9j2o_rp22sh2s8i66pb5clge2oj6clh2bs)
---

Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor

Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606

name: Ric Grenell
subject: It’s me versus Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress
body:
Peter, I’m fighting to Save America, are you with me? | | |

Hi folks,

Tomorrow is Father’s Day, so you know what that means:

- A full day at home with the family

- My favorite foods

- Hours of play time with Brady

- Control of the remote

- And if I’m lucky I’ll get that new Browns hoodie I’ve been eyeing

There’s a lot that is good about Father’s Day, but for me this day also
serves as a day of reflection. I’m so proud of my kiddos and how far
they’ve come, and I want nothing more than to give them a bright future.

The future that my far-right opponent JD Vance is selling won’t help my
kids thrive. He’s anti-democracy, anti-abortion, and very much pro-padding
billionaires’ pockets with big bucks.

All of our kids deserve opportunities that help them realize their full
potential. That’s why I’m working hard to flip this open Senate seat blue.

clean_body: [ ][IMG] Hi folks, Tomorrow is Father’s Day, so you know what that means: - A full day at home with the family - My favorite foods - Hours of play time with Brady - Control of the remote - And if I’m lucky I’ll get that new Browns hoodie I’ve been eyeing There’s a lot that is good about Father’s Day, but for me this day also serves as a day of reflection. I’m so proud of my kiddos and how far they’ve come, and I want nothing more than to give them a bright future. The future that my far-right opponent JD Vance is selling won’t help my kids thrive. He’s anti-democracy, anti-abortion, and very much pro-padding billionaires’ pockets with big bucks. All of our kids deserve opportunities that help them realize their full potential. That’s why I’m working hard to flip this open Senate seat blue. [ ]Will you chip in $25 to help me win big in Ohio so we can cut workers (and our kids) in on the deal? subject: More than halfway
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
When we file this quarterly report with the FEC, we want there to be no doubt we're ready to fight for Pramila’s re-election, our Democratic majority, and a bigger progressive coalition in Congress.
#
Peter, we're more than halfway through June, and that means we're only a couple of weeks away from the second FEC end-of-quarter deadline of 2022 on June 30.
**To put it into perspective:** June 30 is the last FEC deadline before Pramila's primary election in August and one of the last before the general election in November. 😱
**Here's why this deadline is so important:** When we file this quarterly report with the FEC, we want there to be no doubt we're ready to fight for Pramila's re-election, our Democratic majority, and a bigger progressive coalition in Congress. The FEC will post our fundraising numbers publicly, so this is our chance to set the stage for the rest of this critical midterm election year.
So what do you say? [**Contribute $3 or any amount now to help us prepare for the organizing ahead and keep pace with our fundraising for the quarter. There's a lot on the line for our movement and we can't afford to fall short.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14407?refcode=em20220618-1362&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1362%2E420207%2ETLbsOa)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14407?refcode=em20220618-1362&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1362%2E420207%2ETLbsOa)**
Thanks so much for helping us get a head start on our end-of-quarter fundraising push, Peter.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

clean_body: When we file this quarterly report with the FEC, we want there to be no doubt we're ready to fight for Pramila’s re-election, our Democratic majority, and a bigger progressive coalition in Congress. Peter, we're more than halfway through June, and that means we're only a couple of weeks away from the second FEC end-of-quarter deadline of 2022 on June 30. To put it into perspective: June 30 is the last FEC deadline before Pramila's primary election in August and one of the last before the general election in November. 😱 Here's why this deadline is so important: When we file this quarterly report with the FEC, we want there to be no doubt we're ready to fight for Pramila's re-election, our Democratic majority, and a bigger progressive coalition in Congress. The FEC will post our fundraising numbers publicly, so this is our chance to set the stage for the rest of this critical midterm election year. So what do you say? Thanks so much for helping us get a head start on our end-of-quarter fundraising push, Peter. In solidarity, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

subject: Wish Governor DeSantis a Happy Father's Day
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1ffb80144498a69c9b593b3ec9d45b5a242d30be9a5679ada117fd1e73c068360719a020c04884f3c63d27d3bd8d745cfcff7067523ac7e08740f68f0da65d7bf57c1e56ddc535a57e5ccb6b4745585a

Peter,

My husband, Governor Ron DeSantis, is the most pro-family Governor in the nation. Every day, he goes to work with Florida families in mind.

Being a parent alongside Ron is the greatest joy of my life. As a father, he knows the importance of having strong fathers in the home. As we celebrate all the dads in our lives this weekend,
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a7daa0528659f5b1cf09f2541294791aab9403ebbab65503dd55deaff9b89093a4c2e79cd088421ed01bc682a5c6d124966cd75f41889dcc6a5029e6742410bb

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a7daa0528659f5b1cf09f2541294791aab9403ebbab65503dd55deaff9b89093a4c2e79cd088421ed01bc682a5c6d124966cd75f41889dcc6a5029e6742410bb
SIGN THE CARD

This Father’s Day, I want to surprise the Governor with a Father’s Day card signed by his TOP supporters! The card closes at 11:59 PM tonight,
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a7daa0528659f5b1cf09f2541294791aab9403ebbab65503dd55deaff9b89093a4c2e79cd088421ed01bc682a5c6d124966cd75f41889dcc6a5029e6742410bb
>>">so show your support for Governor DeSantis’s commitment to building strong families in Florida by signing this Father’s Day card for him NOW! >>>

Thank you for helping us celebrate my husband, and to all the strong fathers making a difference for Florida families – Happy Father’s Day!

Sincerely,

Casey DeSantis

name: Amanda
subject: I know it’s getting late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
I’ll keep this quick:
---

---
Team, I know it’s a Saturday, so I’ll keep this quick: At the NDRC, we just announced our Democracy Targets for the 2022 midterms, and we’re as busy as ever getting ready to elect champions for fair maps.

As Finance Director, I want to be able to say yes to _everything_ our team wants to do. But that depends on us making our fundraising deadlines — like the one we’re approaching TONIGHT — and we need grassroots donors like you to help us do it.

[_Will you click here to pitch in anything you can before midnight to help us reach our June mid-month goal and support fair-map Democrats all over the country this November?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46689713/351342042/792749532?amount=20&refcode=20220618.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3NjYyNzliLTQ5ZWYtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qpyxS2WczPbw3YKRvUCiErLp5ATT8godYSDzN3ItJz4=)

Thank you!

Amanda

clean_body: I’ll keep this quick: Team, I know it’s a Saturday, so I’ll keep this quick: At the NDRC, we just announced our Democracy Targets for the 2022 midterms, and we’re as busy as ever getting ready to elect champions for fair maps. As Finance Director, I want to be able to say yes to everything our team wants to do. But that depends on us making our fundraising deadlines — like the one we’re approaching TONIGHT — and we need grassroots donors like you to help us do it. = Thank you! Amanda | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. body:
We're behind. And if we don't turn things around soon, then we're likely going to miss our fundraising goal for the quarter It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

Peter,

We’re now past the midpoint of the month which means that the end of the 2nd quarter fundraising period is going to be here in the blink of an eye.

Yesterday the email we sent raised just $1,500 – **in our budget we made the assumption that it would bring in north of $10,000**. So, suffice to say, we need this email to do perform substantially better.

**[Can I lean on you to donate $1 today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=424e2fa8d3f34019bbf52740e3e108f9&_e=HFNx9qjEDlmlUO1B-aHmjOk8iwF9HvoXBu4HhYqXKn2PgHDCaJWw0ccKtPjFYU77gnAJ2ayH4kBaUMFsYtffyqIgz4wUN8_QGtlVmhWsk7wQMOdN1RhDXp1-xSFx8mYE1oJz7YO74xkUOR_mou6lbCVBCqQ0Ljs6SAK6BOSVtUCyXTIpw3T3Swnmp3b7t5q6IRm_yZWnXi9YZ61jxRUZ4EIJFtyv13-ZoTUhZGa6pwTMxoyBEA_1_xjBpiJ8bPT0WLa2tAmawGgPVrgfdDVskqNGTJWoatbf7_INmfkVTFMlSO0q3YvErZ9-9nRMj2VfE0d7NNTiUe9fTsOy0ZRBxz9_3ih1FF2PqcnAyG3A8C8z7Va_kNp9Ib8XI1ioKzfQ)** given the that we’re mere days away from the June fundraising deadline and Republicans need just 5 seats to flip control of the House in November?

[**RUSH $1 OR MORE TODAY -> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=424e2fa8d3f34019bbf52740e3e108f9&_e=HFNx9qjEDlmlUO1B-aHmjOk8iwF9HvoXBu4HhYqXKn2PgHDCaJWw0ccKtPjFYU77gnAJ2ayH4kBaUMFsYtffyqIgz4wUN8_QGtlVmhWsk7wQMOdN1RhDXp1-xSFx8mYE1oJz7YO74xkUOR_mou6lbCVBCqQ0Ljs6SAK6BOSVtUB-fb2C5hxWViumkoKsWLVW1SZKx_tKtRwrJv0tBe4M-IdMZdZvkkKQM1_6ywWfr3Ht0JV6T6atGJQBbhcpY-6C-xmJ6AzhQ_4caCkPQ6Ixpp8BcytMT_1qhakLqGFNiImGyUAdHB0zKYLqnx1EulYbrC2_gJ_wuE8oC5_8ky_w5-mXv4HOWiErJbnTls6w__6xQNhTtXZqGnCJY5UqrTKW)

We've got our work cut out for us:
1. Raise $8,000+ from this email campaign
2. Withstand millions in attack ads against us
3. Keep our voters engaged and interested when many think we’ve already won.

**[Your $1 contribution will certainly go a long way](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=424e2fa8d3f34019bbf52740e3e108f9&_e=HFNx9qjEDlmlUO1B-aHmjOk8iwF9HvoXBu4HhYqXKn2PgHDCaJWw0ccKtPjFYU77gnAJ2ayH4kBaUMFsYtffyqIgz4wUN8_QGtlVmhWsk7wQMOdN1RhDXp1-xSFx8mYE1oJz7YO74xkUOR_mou6lbCVBCqQ0Ljs6SAK6BOSVtUA2lOH6RvCOKL3X3tnqypDY6boKrgnBZ4ZAoDgRgxztjB5us3NJnfbw982UMxNagUoYJJ7bkbGOXI7Ijny5gQOaqjOZ9lOUAl25paTDD8hifb-X9vx-yADb3JIb37i4cnhytgyDr26b6-hmRSzPiVIuHfJbbFHRBykfe73st0v4Jbx_R9_SEHd0tckTU_9-XDE_PT49FeaOqwKS35NyjPzG)** in helping me and my team make sure that after we hit our fundraising goal this quarter, which if accomplished, will help put us into the position of being able to lend other Republicans a helping hand as we work to take back the House.

[**CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT HERE -> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=424e2fa8d3f34019bbf52740e3e108f9&_e=HFNx9qjEDlmlUO1B-aHmjOk8iwF9HvoXBu4HhYqXKn2PgHDCaJWw0ccKtPjFYU77gnAJ2ayH4kBaUMFsYtffyqIgz4wUN8_QGtlVmhWsk7wQMOdN1RhDXp1-xSFx8mYE1oJz7YO74xkUOR_mou6lbCVBCqQ0Ljs6SAK6BOSVtUAThU6GsiYt3auboSNHg9YpG_Wb1MzC9WJVmyfypaf9mgSgsvcROSdpXBNdByhJxciY-hp8JKtjLmf4EfscdUB3Zg0sWXheC5Xg8hHNR40pnM9XpfMGO8r-8hRtPDFXNmWmd4WgdtJw0BqiuonVUXewpKykSSA5GPVjqQ5pHoBV0JrEMz3whQs64872fiO0xSPuKsH5g-3xy3asQWIOi5CG)

body:

| | Peter, Our campaign is only beginning. Now that we’ve won the primary, this is your next big opportunity to join our campaign. We are on track to defeat Michelle Lujan Grisham this November. We are in the best position right now to win this race and deliver REAL results to New Mexico families.

name: Arrest Warrant
subject: Issued by the FBI
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michigan for Ryan D
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsy7sbLhpN

I stood up. And this is what happens when you stand up to tyranny
in Biden's America.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osy7sbLhpN

Friend,
The FBI just showed up.

You read
that right. The FBI sent people to my home to arrest me.

This is
face of tyranny and government overreach.

Anyone
who has followed our campaign knows I am prepared to give my life
fighting against this exact oppression.

But let
me back up.

My name
is Ryan Kelley. You've probably never heard of me, or at least
hadn't heard of me before today when my name and picture was
splashed across every news outlet in the country. Thats ok. The
media and the establishment swamp have tried to pretend I don't
exist, but I am now leading in the polls to be the Republican
nominee for Governor in Michigan.

That's
right. Governor. In Michigan. A state where election fraud
happened and Trump's victory was stolen...and Biden's DOJ just
had me arrested.

I started
this campaign for a simple reason. The government's grip on the
throat of its citizenry has grown so tight as to make our
republic unrecognizable.

When the
COVID lockdowns came to Michigan and the "vaccine passport", and
"rules for thee but not for me" crowd unconstitutionally locked
us in our homes and closed businesses and took away our rights--I
stood up.

I stood
up. And this is what happens when you stand up to tyranny in
Biden's America.

I will
never bend the knee to tyrants. I don't think you will either.

There is
a simple answer. We beat them. We beat them at the ballot box so
badly that they can't cheat. They can't steal it.

We beat
them so badly that no government, no political party, no deep
state operative will ever, ever forget the consequence of
oppressing the will of the people and attempting to steal our
God-given rights.

I need
your help. I need you to make a donation right now and help me
fight back. I have no intention of letting up now.

That
they're trying to throw me in prison shows they're scared. You
know what will scare them more? A war chest unrivaled in history.
A war chest that says every man and woman across this country who
believes in liberty and the rights of the people are standing
arm-in-arm ready to defend those rights.

You've
probably never gotten a letter from a political prisoner, but
you're getting one now. The question is: What will you do next?

Will you
delete this email and go back to your day waiting around for them
to take away your next freedom? Maybe your second and first
amendment rights next? Or will you click the link, make a
donation, and be part of the true grassroots movement that is
building here?

I've made
it clear where I stand. I will not back down. I will not stop
defending OUR rights. Yours and mine. I need you to commit, right
now. Click the link, make as generous a donation as you can.

They want
us silent. They want us on our knees.

Stand up.
Stand with me. Get involved right now, while there is still time.

Ryan D.
Kelley,
Political
prisoner and candidate for Governor.

Paid for by Michigan for Ryan D. Kelley | 6181 Lake
Michigan Drive #105, Allendale, MI, 49401

Contributions to Michigan for Ryan Kelley not tax deductible
for federal income tax purposes as charitable contributions.
Michigan law requires us to obtain, maintain and report the name,
address, occupation and employer of each contributor who gives
more than $100 in an election cycle. Michigan law limits
individual contributions to Michigan for Ryan Kelley to $7,150
per election cycle. Contributions are prohibited from the
treasuries of corporations, labor unions, federal government
contractors, and foreign nationals without permanent residency
status.

name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: Will you become a Citizen Co-Sponsor of my plan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
I've made ending the opioid epidemic the heart of my campaign.
| | |
---
**The opioid epidemic is personal to me, Peter.**
1,034 Missourians lost their lives to opioid overdose in 2020 alone. And I am heartbroken to say that after a yearslong battle with addiction and nearly 500 days of sobriety, my beautiful son Matt was one of them.
But I know my story isn’t unique. I know my pain and heartache are shared by too many. **That's why I've made ending the opioid epidemic the heart of my campaign.**
I believe that tackling this crisis starts with serious investments in making opioid treatment more accessible and affordable, especially in rural areas. But our work doesn't end there. We must also combat the stigma and shame associated with addiction and continue funding research to find more innovative solutions to this insidious problem.
**My plan is bold and ambitious – but that's exactly what a public health crisis demands.** Even still, building support in Washington for this type of transformative plan won't be easy. It's going to take a powerful, united grassroots public pressure campaign. **[That's why today, I'm asking you to join me as a Citizen Co-Sponsor of my plan to tackle the opioid epidemic. I've set a goal to have 500 people sign on before 11:59 p.m. tonight, and as one of my very first supporters, I'm counting on you to stand with me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46689842/351342517/1949405044?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=jtk57-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTU1ZWU0ZC00YWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iiv0zPDikd3oNxHsbtIAJ8i507iZ_S0jvfIZPn1EMBA=&emci=57513375-48ed-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=3155ee4d-4aef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=4450063)**
| | [Become a Citizen Co-Sponsor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46689843/351342518/1949405044?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=jtk57-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTU1ZWU0ZC00YWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iiv0zPDikd3oNxHsbtIAJ8i507iZ_S0jvfIZPn1EMBA=&emci=57513375-48ed-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=3155ee4d-4aef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=4450063)
---
My son Matt worked so hard to help others with addiction. Today, I'm taking over this work in his honor and trying to do the same. Together, we can overcome stigma, make treatment more accessible, and end the opioid epidemic in America so that our communities can thrive again.

– Trudy Busch Valentine
