clean_body: I've made ending the opioid epidemic the heart of my campaign. | | | The opioid epidemic is personal to me, Peter. 1,034 Missourians lost their lives to opioid overdose in 2020 alone. And I am heartbroken to say that after a yearslong battle with addiction and nearly 500 days of sobriety, my beautiful son Matt was one of them. But I know my story isn’t unique. I know my pain and heartache are shared by too many. That's why I've made ending the opioid epidemic the heart of my campaign. I believe that tackling this crisis starts with serious investments in making opioid treatment more accessible and affordable, especially in rural areas. But our work doesn't end there. We must also combat the stigma and shame associated with addiction and continue funding research to find more innovative solutions to this insidious problem. My plan is bold and ambitious – but that's exactly what a public health crisis demands. Even still, building support in Washington for this type of transformative plan won't be easy. It's going to take a powerful, united grassroots public pressure campaign. | | My son Matt worked so hard to help others with addiction. Today, I'm taking over this work in his honor and trying to do the same. Together, we can overcome stigma, make treatment more accessible, and end the opioid epidemic in America so that our communities can thrive again. – Trudy Busch Valentine | | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate are not tax deductible. | | 2022 | Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate PO Box 11826 Clayton, MO 63105 United States

body:

|

| | Derek, We know a thing or two about winning close elections. Back in 2014, Mark won his reelection campaign by less than one percent. The work we did that summer, with Election Day still months away, was one of the difference makers in the outcome of the race. That’s why we absolutely must support Democrats in the races that will decide control of the Senate _right now_. [_**Chip in $5 to keep the Senate blue. Control of the Senate will be determined by the support we can provide to campaigns TODAY.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46689868/351342763/372082164?refcode=mw_em_220618_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQ0MzNjNi00YWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=01OLeyz6OcYzLh-lXFmHE9bfNnL_3UNb79S-n5jUgzM=) There is a very good chance that control of the Senate will come down to one or more races decided by a similar margin to Mark’s race in 2014. And we can’t afford to lose any of them with a one-vote margin in our majority in the Senate. These campaigns are doing crucial voter contact and outreach as we speak. They are trying to get their message out to the people who will decide the outcome of their elections. We need to be right there with them to help. [_**Chip in $5 today so we can support battleground Senate races that will decide if we control the Senate after 2022.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46689870/351342765/372082164?refcode=mw_em_220618_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQ0MzNjNi00YWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=01OLeyz6OcYzLh-lXFmHE9bfNnL_3UNb79S-n5jUgzM=) Thank you, Team Warner **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46689872/351342767/372082164?refcode=mw_em_220618_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQ0MzNjNi00YWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=01OLeyz6OcYzLh-lXFmHE9bfNnL_3UNb79S-n5jUgzM=)**

name: The Wade Brigade
subject: Wade's Whereabouts! [runoff edition]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoffad?refcode=whem0618 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoffad?refcode=whem0618]
Folks,
We’re 3 days away from the runoff this Tuesday and Wade & our team have been working hard canvassing, phone banking and meeting voters at local events!
After a long week of canvassing, yesterday our dedicated interns had the opportunity to tour City Hall and meet with Savannah Mayor Van Johnson! We’re proud to have young folks working on our campaign and learning more about local & state politics. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/intern-1_edit.gif]
Wade participated in the March For Our Lives in Savannah with Stacey Abrams, where folks were standing up for the protection of Roe v. Wade and the passing of common-sense gun laws – both of which are issues he is passionate about. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/march-2_edit.gif]
In addition to interviews with local radio & news stations throughout the past few weeks, Wade was proud to attend the NAACP candidate’s forum to speak about the issues and our campaign. He was the only candidate for the 1st District in attendance. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/forum3_edit.jpg]
Wade also recently attended the City of Brunswick Chamber of Commerce Convention, where he had the opportunity to meet with some of our district’s leaders and learn more about our local businesses and economy. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/brunswick_edit.jpg]
Throughout this campaign, Wade has enjoyed spending Sundays worshipping with folks across the district. Most recently, he had the opportunity to worship in Liberty County with Al Williams at the Cathedral of Praise, Bethel AME, and Mt Zion Missionary Baptist. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/church%201_edit.jpg]
We’re working hard to spread the word, but if you’re in Georgia please help us let folks know – Vote Wade Herring in the Democratic primary runoff on this Tuesday, June 21st!
In this together,
The Wade Brigade
Donate Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoffad?refcode=whem0618]
https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1 [https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1] https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1 [https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1] https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/]
www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [http://www.WadeHerringForCongress.com] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com

Peter Willis,

Howard Schultz, a ludicrously out-of-touch billionaire CEO (who Hillary Clinton allegedly planned on installing as the Secretary of Labor if she didn’t run the single worst campaign in modern history and lose to Donald Trump) is getting his butt kicked by Starbucks workers in their fight to unionize.

That’s why Bernie Sanders is touring America to stand up to corporate power and demand CEOs – like Howard Schultz – stop UNION-BUSTING.

Howard Schultz lied to union organizers and ok’d retaliation tactics like firing workers and threatening to strip healthcare for transgender employees. We can’t let this corporate thuggery stand.

Our Revolution is standing with Bernie to stop the corporate assault on workers’ rights. We’re leading the fight to help low-wage workers ORGANIZE by advocating for real labor law reform on the state and federal levels! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5943?t=1009&akid=3048%2E5885482%2Edf0kli)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: We Did It!
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_did_it&n=1)
---
## We Did It!
### Saturday, June 18th, 2022
Friend, A leftwing group bought an expensive ad in the Star Tribune this week, thanking politicians like Joe Biden, Amy Klobuchar & Angie Craig for "lowering gas prices." Ridiculous claim. Everyone knows gas prices are going up and it's because of politicians like them. We've been talking about a way to solve the problem in the short term and you just helped make it possible. I explain how in this week's _Hot Minute_ video: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZ9sudaQYCMNFZHfoh2cugb&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_did_it&n=2)
## [WATCH NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZ9sudaQYCMNFZHfoh2cugb&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_did_it&n=3)
Thank you for contacting your legislators. It had a HUGE impact. They are scared to spend YOUR surplus money on more wasteful government projects...at least for now. But don't worry, we'll be taking this GIVE IT BACK message to voters in the next four months, including at the [Minnesota State Fair](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_state_fair_booth?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_did_it&n=4)!
## **Jake Duesenberg**
**Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_did_it&n=5 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_did_it&n=5)

clean_body: | We Did It! Saturday, June 18th, 2022 Friend, A leftwing group bought an expensive ad in the Star Tribune this week, thanking politicians like Joe Biden, Amy Klobuchar & Angie Craig for "lowering gas prices." Ridiculous claim. Everyone knows gas prices are going up and it's because of politicians like them. We've been talking about a way to solve the problem in the short term and you just helped make it possible. I explain how in this week's Hot Minute video: Thank you for contacting your legislators. It had a HUGE impact. They are scared to spend YOUR surplus money on more wasteful government projects...at least for now. But don't worry, we'll be taking this GIVE IT BACK message to voters in the next four months, including at the ! Jake Duesenberg Action 4 Liberty | "Support Us"

clean_body: California already has two senators pushing their far-left agenda, so they don’t need a third. | Peter, Raphael Warnock claims he represents Georgia, but all you have to do is look at his voting record and donor list to see who he really represents... far-left states like California. Not only does Senator Warnock vote with Joe Biden 96% of the time, but he votes with California Senator Dianne Feinstein 99% of the time. That's 99%! Additionally, Warnock votes with New York's Democrat Senator Chuck Schumer 99% of the time too! The numbers don't lie. So while my opponent may claim to represent Georgia, he votes like he's the 3rd senator from California or New York! It's no wonder that more than half of my opponent's online donations come from the most far-left states like New York and California, but only 10% of his money comes from Georgia. Georgians deserve a senator with conservative values who will fight for them - not California! If we're going to flip a Democrat-held seat and stop the Biden agenda in the Senate, it starts in Georgia. subject: Behold! The Mini Bazooka Of Death
body:
A few weeks ago the amazing Mini Bazooka Of Death was...
---
| | | We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/7091/6374453/db0b4a7a70ed53b789fa7253e47f1e748218df3f/42f62aca8a6d7a04c01fd020357da90ecf02a154) here at any time. June 18th, 2022 \- Breaking News - Firearms Reviews - 2nd Amendment - Ammo & More -. | | | |
* * *
| | | | A few weeks ago the amazing Mini Bazooka Of Death was introduced.

Well, that's not its real name.

But considering this amazing tool shoots off electromagnetic radiation to keep soldiers alive in Afghanistan, Iraq, and other hostile zones... it's earned the name "Mini Bazooka Of Death."

Once you see it, you'll agree it's hands down one of the coolest and most amazing survival gadgets ever invented.

The Mini Bazooka Of Death was originally used by a Top-Secret military division to terminate threats without bullets!

And because it was so effective it was actually classified.

Fortunately, the technology inside was finally made available to the public for self-defense.

And you can own one without a permit or needing to fill out any paperwork.

[Check out this incredible tool](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/7091/6374453/5ca1339fa23df13df7f3866e3d920c275b57e7c8/42f62aca8a6d7a04c01fd020357da90ecf02a154) right now.

Not only will the Mini Bazooka Of Death keep you safe from dangerous criminals...
* It also starts fires
* Helps catch food
* Was called the best emergency rescuing device by the U.S. Navy

And much more.

[Check it out right here!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/7091/6374453/5ca1339fa23df13df7f3866e3d920c275b57e7c8/42f62aca8a6d7a04c01fd020357da90ecf02a154)

| ~National Gun Owner
---

P.S. This tool's real name is the **** ***** [top secret]. [And you can only get it on the next page.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/7091/6374453/5ca1339fa23df13df7f3866e3d920c275b57e7c8/42f62aca8a6d7a04c01fd020357da90ecf02a154)

June 18th, 2022 \- Breaking News - Firearms Reviews - 2nd Amendment - Ammo & More -. | | | | | | | | A few weeks ago the amazing Mini Bazooka Of Death was introduced. Well, that's not its real name. But considering this amazing tool shoots off electromagnetic radiation to keep soldiers alive in Afghanistan, Iraq, and other hostile zones... it's earned the name "Mini Bazooka Of Death." Once you see it, you'll agree it's hands down one of the coolest and most amazing survival gadgets ever invented. The Mini Bazooka Of Death was originally used by a Top-Secret military division to terminate threats without bullets! And because it was so effective it was actually classified. Fortunately, the technology inside was finally made available to the public for self-defense. And you can own one without a permit or needing to fill out any paperwork. right now. Not only will the Mini Bazooka Of Death keep you safe from dangerous criminals... It also starts fires Helps catch food Was called the best emergency rescuing device by the U.S. Navy And much more. | ~National Gun Owner P.S. This tool's real name is the ** * [top secret]. We know exactly what we are up against — more Trump influence getting a grip on South Texas, but we won’t allow that to happen.

clean_body: Pelosi’s Jan. 6th Committee is a walking joke. | Peter, The theatrics from Pelosi’s sham committee are nothing more than a pathetic, vindictive, and strategic attempt to try and smear President Trump. But we shouldn’t be surprised, this is what the Left does. What absolutely sickens me, however, are the despicable RINOs who go along with their schemes. I know all too well how anti-Trump “Republicans” attack TRUE MAGA fighters... Just like Liz Cheney is attacking President Trump, George Soros’ puppet Mitch McConnell launched a vile smear campaign against me and my children all because I said I’d NEVER vote for him in the Senate. Just like President Trump, I’ll ALWAYS fight back, and I’ll never cave to McConnell’s pathetic smear campaign. I’ve made myself crystal clear – Mitch McConnell is a coward, and real America First conservatives in this country – the grassroots freedom wing of the Republican Party – are coming for him. As long as grassroots patriots like YOU are fighting by my side, we will WIN the 1 SEAT needed to take back the 50-50 Senate and build a NEW pro-Trump majority. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

The future of voting rights and our democracy, the health of our planet, abortion rights, and more will likely be decided by this race.
We don’t mean to alarm or scare you, but those are just the honest stakes.
If we want to see real progress on these issues and build a bright future for the next generation, then we need to expand our Senate majority with leaders who will not hesitate to cast the decisive vote for change.
That is Cheri Beasley, and nonpartisan analysts from CNN to NBC to FiveThirtyEight all agree that North Carolina is one of Democrats’ best opportunities to flip a seat.
[**Cheri needs a lot of grassroots support to pull this off. Can you chip in today to send Cheri Beasley to the Senate where she can cast the decisive vote to pass legislation to defend our democracy, planet, right to abortion and more?**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220618-2-ma&refcode2=1078.357359.RQh_jo&t=1&akid=1078%2E357359%2ERQh_jo)

****

Ted Budd has made clear he will fall in line with whatever Trump Republicans and his corporate special interest donors want.
A nationwide abortion ban? He’s in. Letting Big Oil and Pharma rip off consumers? He’s okay with their price gouging — and already voted against legislation to cap insulin prices. Overturn the 2024 election if it doesn’t go Trump’s way? He tried to overturn the 2020 election on January 6, so he probably won’t hesitate to try again.
[**Please contribute any amount you can today to stop Ted Budd and elect Cheri to the U.S. Senate. Peter,

We’re now past the midpoint of the month which means that the end of the 2nd quarter fundraising period is going to be here in the blink of an eye.

Yesterday the email we sent raised just $1,500 – **in our budget we made the assumption that it would bring in north of $10,000**. So, suffice to say, we need this email to do perform substantially better.

**[Can I lean on you to donate $1 today](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4d8f2f169bec4655baa0ca28f49047e9&_e=ZLGKRPpOH0lmtgGmptjgtYCJU8svwqccr-KGm4TYHZuJyWE3LyADoXJu4oBrjNQ5uAEwpg-YqLzGN0c0HP9GuaU-L4MQWzIFJnDPxdbo2RCbXWVs2EiNo1Nz6x0VcUPGqU3DUGvmO9SU7gwz5dl6fYRFoNGfxkxGSQsWEd1vj9gj1mCiDdZYn5drD96_MVtBWlrbnlUPVPIykDmf4UrbDT2K8nb7ZYR2y42UjdAxHsjRd3_AqkVMDTCnXFqaNh1yisxzrtSYnHka7NiBf4wd8kN-lr_Ia_2x4c9LaUiZSjbkG77lgtKDycngYcxrmFEs9OBLp92gmoYF_gNjZHMj7OyKdtW9Glr2kZB_SPe08EhICJwyvc4n6IGj3GWL4XCo)** given the that we’re mere days away from the June fundraising deadline and Republicans need just 5 seats to flip control of the House in November?

[**RUSH $1 OR MORE TODAY -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4d8f2f169bec4655baa0ca28f49047e9&_e=ZLGKRPpOH0lmtgGmptjgtYCJU8svwqccr-KGm4TYHZuJyWE3LyADoXJu4oBrjNQ5uAEwpg-YqLzGN0c0HP9GuaU-L4MQWzIFJnDPxdbo2RCbXWVs2EiNo1Nz6x0VcUPGqU3DUGvmO9SU7gwz5dl6fYRFoNGfxkxGSQsWEd1vj9gxqClXceHGkGHqkU-rDNltlTvGqV4NfkqgHiD6emc_AXIX69UAEjfPO9MHMx12uTHSmhNNzVUTd8Af2dYyL3rarZZKORaxi5J56PAuEQh5IbFN7c-NYSMquD__3H2ucRrbrHoFj_jT33puQFbkP10Rx9MLbXBKgDMjHq4PsxunlWkcSKnSegd3QX7x66wiSAVDFlpOon4WZjHF2qDhWYin)

**[Your $1 contribution will certainly go a long way](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4d8f2f169bec4655baa0ca28f49047e9&_e=ZLGKRPpOH0lmtgGmptjgtYCJU8svwqccr-KGm4TYHZuJyWE3LyADoXJu4oBrjNQ5uAEwpg-YqLzGN0c0HP9GuaU-L4MQWzIFJnDPxdbo2RCbXWVs2EiNo1Nz6x0VcUPGqU3DUGvmO9SU7gwz5dl6fYRFoNGfxkxGSQsWEd1vj9iBFX3OOKFimp7TL84v8oZ7TUOzuncfi7zLTUW8B67JV5b-GOjGzE9XXAHT8d2R_Z33i-44FexauU-W7F3oZ09cJR3-CCVqO5vB130HwtC-KdANdBxXxHQCzgQyHD0qs-KK_uNiZf2oVrnIHKL1mQKR5c2T329mPm9EA6MfEQY3zY0oo5l5aREmfnTVvaTg0WeCnritIJkmIAYB8MqoZX6H)** in helping me and my team make sure that after we hit our fundraising goal this quarter, which if accomplished, will help put us into the position of being able to lend other Republicans a helping hand as we work to take back the House.

Hello,
It was Ben Franklin who, when asked what form of government the constitutional convention had produced, said: “A republic, if you can keep it.”
Donald Trump’s election sealed the deal for me to retire after nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. Having been in uniform for every President since Jimmy Carter, I showed my respect for Mr. Trump with my feet. I was done. It was apparent that the next four years would not go well.
Unfortunately, putting himself before his country culminated when Trump and his fellow Republicans planned, cajoled accomplices, then launched a domestic insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Five lives were lost, and the nation’s innocence, as well. And it ain’t over.
January 6th set a precedent that leadership in a political party will condone political violence. **To this day, GOP members who continue to perpetuate the Big Lie are a direct threat to our democracy.** An opportunity to come clean for my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, who voted against Trump’s impeachment and tried to block a bipartisan commission from investigating the attack, still has yet to occur.
The Republican party needs to cull its ranks of the active insurrectionists. Every single person involved in the January 6 attack needs to be held accountable for their actions, including sitting members of Congress who participated in the planning and execution of the insurrection.
**I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley because I place nation over baseless insurrection. It is a decision not entirely unlike the time of Lincoln. One does not serve the nation in military service to watch idly while it is dismembered by the likes of Donald Trump and his accomplices, to include Chuck Grassley.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising boatloads to spend against me. I am the ultimate “hard target” for the Republicans, but to get elected, **I need your help. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs – instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors _like you_.**
[**Please, if you can afford to, donate $5 or more to my campaign right now – every dollar you can before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46690426/351346622/-42398318?refcode=em20220618pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzhiMzgyZS01NmVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xa1P7mXlTpzIyIyuLfPqnVZT31M1gS2k9RlZEVDZHgc=)

clean_body: If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Hello, It was Ben Franklin who, when asked what form of government the constitutional convention had produced, said: “A republic, if you can keep it.” Donald Trump’s election sealed the deal for me to retire after nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. Having been in uniform for every President since Jimmy Carter, I showed my respect for Mr. Trump with my feet. I was done. It was apparent that the next four years would not go well. Unfortunately, putting himself before his country culminated when Trump and his fellow Republicans planned, cajoled accomplices, then launched a domestic insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Five lives were lost, and the nation’s innocence, as well. And it ain’t over. January 6th set a precedent that leadership in a political party will condone political violence. To this day, GOP members who continue to perpetuate the Big Lie are a direct threat to our democracy. An opportunity to come clean for my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, who voted against Trump’s impeachment and tried to block a bipartisan commission from investigating the attack, still has yet to occur. The Republican party needs to cull its ranks of the active insurrectionists. Every single person involved in the January 6 attack needs to be held accountable for their actions, including sitting members of Congress who participated in the planning and execution of the insurrection. I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley because I place nation over baseless insurrection. It is a decision not entirely unlike the time of Lincoln. One does not serve the nation in military service to watch idly while it is dismembered by the likes of Donald Trump and his accomplices, to include Chuck Grassley. Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising boatloads to spend against me. I am the ultimate “hard target” for the Republicans, but to get elected, I need your help. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs – instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors like you. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We can – and we must – protect our democracy. Thank you for always being a part of the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Team, We’ll make this quick so you can get back to enjoying your weekend — Tomorrow is Father’s Day, and our dad is not easy to impress. Finding the right gift is always a challenge for us, but we think we came up with a good one. **This year, we set a goal to have 200 of his dedicated supporters sign our Father’s Day card for him.** We want to surprise him with a birthday card signed by folks like you and the people he serves in the Senate. Our dad has been fighting for other working dads, guardians, and father figures across Colorado and the country by expanding the monthly Child Tax Credit, improving our public school system, and helping to create jobs that allow parents to keep roofs over their heads and food on the table. And Dad is always there for us; cooking dinner, answering our calls and texts (no matter how inconvenient); and when needed, helping with our homework. **Please help us show our appreciation for him: Take a moment to sign the card and help us wish our dad a happy Father’s Day.** | | **[SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46690451/351346680/1803391826?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220618_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOThiMzgyZS01NmVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JeZ8xtkBwVgmzqZqyO2_v-tdrt83R3GsMlVbZbQc3g8=&emci=c931c079-47ee-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=f98b382e-56ef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1295540)**

Here in Arizona, our election doesn’t start on August 2nd...
---

---

---
There are only 18 days until voters receive their ballots in the mail, and here at campaign headquarters, we’re making thousands of calls to secure as many votes as possible.

clean_body: We have to be ready. | Peter, Here in Arizona, our election doesn’t start on August 2nd... ...that’s when it ENDS. Over 80% of the vote in Arizona is conducted by mail in the days and weeks before Election Day, which means our campaign has to be running at full stream from now until August 2nd. There are only 18 days until voters receive their ballots in the mail, and here at campaign headquarters, we’re making thousands of calls to secure as many votes as possible. | ---|--- But to ensure our efforts are fully funded, I’m turning to my grassroots supporters. Primary elections are often decided by voter turnout. That’s why it’s so important that we remind our supporters to vote early and conduct voter outreach to Arizonans who are still undecided about who to support. Every dollar we raise is another vote we can win, and in a close election, that could be the difference between victory and defeat. Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

body:
Spoiler alert: IT’S HIMSELF!!!!!
#
Derek,
I want to take a moment to personally remind you of the famous mega-donors supporting Dr. Oz in the race for Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate seat.
* Donald Trump + his MAGA million$
* Heirs to the DuPont family chemical fortune
* Billionaire/disgraced casino magnate Steve Wynn
* The Koch Family

🤢 As my daughter Gracie would say, like ew. But you wanna know who Dr. Oz’s #1 mega-donor is?!****
**IT’S HIMSELF!!!!!**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220618-2?refcode=em20220618-6249&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6249_434096_3SjGQx&akid=6249%2E434096%2E3SjGQx)
Yep. My dude Dr. Oz is estimated to be worth up to **$422,000,000** , thanks to his days hawking phony diet pills + quack treatments on TV — and that’s only counting the dollar$ he was legally required to disclose.
**Oz has already loaned his campaign more than $12 MILLION during the primary alone.**
Thanks to his own funds, Trump’s support, and his GOP billionaire friends who can dump unlimited sums into super PACs, Dr. Oz has virtually unlimited sum$ to try to BUY Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. 🔴
[**_We can’t let that happen. Please, Derek, can I count on you to donate $5 or anything you can spare now to fight back against Dr. Oz? He might spend the most of ANY U.S. Senate candidate, so anything you can give today will help._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220618-2?refcode=em20220618-6249&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6249_434096_3SjGQx&akid=6249%2E434096%2E3SjGQx)
**[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220618-2?refcode=em20220618-6249&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6249_434096_3SjGQx&akid=6249%2E434096%2E3SjGQx)**
Look, Oz is a big threat, and we can’t underestimate him. But I know for a fact he’s no match for our movement. 💪💪💪
Thanks for chipping in today,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: “Let her try, Polly.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
I would not be here if my daddy hadn’t pushed open a door so that I could have a chance. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46691059/351349041/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZY_HOL_E_20220618_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzFmNDFjNi01YWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nAkNxPHKe1LmuocyYxE-DOg7yT8srS0g5UxEpkXwb78=&emci=77de0ac0-5aef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=571f41c6-5aef-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
I wish I could give my daddy a call for Father’s Day tomorrow. After my mother died, I called him every night. Most weekends, we watched sports together, with Daddy in Oklahoma and me in Massachusetts, and we called back and forth on the phone after a really good (or bad) play. I wanted to keep him company, and I wanted to hear his voice. He taught me to dream big. In the 1920s, he had big dreams of his own: He wanted to fly airplanes. He was barely out of high school when he rebuilt a two-passenger, open-cockpit airplane and taught himself to fly above the prairies of eastern Oklahoma. I always pictured him landing and taking off in vast wheat fields, a tiny plane in an immense blue sky. He survived the double blows of the Dust Bowl and the Great Depression in the small town where he grew up. Decades later, both my parents still talked of bank failures and families who lost their farms during some of the toughest times for our country. By the time World War II came along, they already had three young boys. Daddy tried to enlist to be a fighter pilot in the war, but the Army Air Forces (as it was known then) said he was too old, or at least that’s the explanation I heard. When the war finally ended, he desperately wanted a job flying the new passenger planes for one of the fast-growing airlines like TWA or American. But that didn’t work out either. My mother told me that those jobs also went to younger men. So he moved from one job to another: He was a salesman, he fixed cars, he ended up as a janitor. He liked working with his hands, doing repairs around the house. And like a zillion other families, we got by. When I was a senior in high school, I started thinking about college. I wanted to be a teacher, and that meant I needed a college diploma. But my mother said it was out of the question. She pointed out that we couldn’t afford college, that she and Daddy just didn’t make enough money. Besides, he’d had a heart attack, and now it took both of my parents’ paychecks to manage. I knew how much my parents sacrificed for my future and for my brothers’ future, but I wanted to teach. It was my big dream, and I wouldn’t give up. My mother kept saying no, and we argued back and forth. Then Daddy surprised both of us, saying: “Let her try, Polly.” And I was off and running. There were lots of bumps and wrong turns along the way. I got married at 19 (it didn’t work out). I moved. I dropped out of school. But eventually, I made it. Whatever I did, my daddy believed in me and my big dreams. He would say, “That’s my Betsy." In truth, I think he found it pretty miraculous that his baby girl had ended up a teacher. He nearly busted his buttons the first time I was quoted in the newspaper. When he got sick, I came across a video series about the airplanes of World War II. I bought all the videotapes and took them to him. I was sure he would love seeing the old planes, that he would point out this or that plane he remembered from the war. But the only thing he wanted to talk about was how much he missed my mother. For months — for years, actually — after he died, I would see or hear something and think, Oh, I’ll tell Daddy about that. And then I’d get a little jolt all over again. He was gone. I would not be here if he hadn’t pushed open a door so that I could have a chance. That is how this daughter of a janitor ended up as a public school teacher, a law professor, and a United States Senator. And our story isn’t unique. Parents all across our country are working hard to give their children the opportunities they themselves never had. That kind of sacrifice — a sacrifice fueled by love — is why I’m in this fight all the way. All of our children deserve a chance to succeed. And all of our parents deserve the peace of mind of knowing their hard work created a better future for their children and grandchildren. That is the promise of America, and I’m fighting to make sure we keep that promise. My daddy is gone, but I want to wish him a Happy Father’s Day tomorrow anyway — and to all the fathers and father figures who are trying their hardest to give their children a strong future, setting the example every day of what it means to care for the people you love. clean_body: I would not be here if my daddy hadn’t pushed open a door so that I could have a chance. | | | I wish I could give my daddy a call for Father’s Day tomorrow. After my mother died, I called him every night. Most weekends, we watched sports together, with Daddy in Oklahoma and me in Massachusetts, and we called back and forth on the phone after a really good (or bad) play. I wanted to keep him company, and I wanted to hear his voice. He taught me to dream big. In the 1920s, he had big dreams of his own: He wanted to fly airplanes. He was barely out of high school when he rebuilt a two-passenger, open-cockpit airplane and taught himself to fly above the prairies of eastern Oklahoma. I always pictured him landing and taking off in vast wheat fields, a tiny plane in an immense blue sky. He survived the double blows of the Dust Bowl and the Great Depression in the small town where he grew up. Decades later, both my parents still talked of bank failures and families who lost their farms during some of the toughest times for our country. By the time World War II came along, they already had three young boys. Daddy tried to enlist to be a fighter pilot in the war, but the Army Air Forces (as it was known then) said he was too old, or at least that’s the explanation I heard. When the war finally ended, he desperately wanted a job flying the new passenger planes for one of the fast-growing airlines like TWA or American. But that didn’t work out either. My mother told me that those jobs also went to younger men. So he moved from one job to another: He was a salesman, he fixed cars, he ended up as a janitor. He liked working with his hands, doing repairs around the house. And like a zillion other families, we got by. When I was a senior in high school, I started thinking about college. I wanted to be a teacher, and that meant I needed a college diploma. But my mother said it was out of the question. She pointed out that we couldn’t afford college, that she and Daddy just didn’t make enough money. Besides, he’d had a heart attack, and now it took both of my parents’ paychecks to manage. I knew how much my parents sacrificed for my future and for my brothers’ future, but I wanted to teach. It was my big dream, and I wouldn’t give up. My mother kept saying no, and we argued back and forth. Then Daddy surprised both of us, saying: “Let her try, Polly.” And I was off and running. There were lots of bumps and wrong turns along the way. I got married at 19 (it didn’t work out). I moved. I dropped out of school. But eventually, I made it. Whatever I did, my daddy believed in me and my big dreams. He would say, “That’s my Betsy." In truth, I think he found it pretty miraculous that his baby girl had ended up a teacher. He nearly busted his buttons the first time I was quoted in the newspaper. When he got sick, I came across a video series about the airplanes of World War II. I bought all the videotapes and took them to him. I was sure he would love seeing the old planes, that he would point out this or that plane he remembered from the war. But the only thing he wanted to talk about was how much he missed my mother. For months — for years, actually — after he died, I would see or hear something and think, Oh, I’ll tell Daddy about that. And then I’d get a little jolt all over again. He was gone. I would not be here if he hadn’t pushed open a door so that I could have a chance. That is how this daughter of a janitor ended up as a public school teacher, a law professor, and a United States Senator. And our story isn’t unique. Parents all across our country are working hard to give their children the opportunities they themselves never had. That kind of sacrifice — a sacrifice fueled by love — is why I’m in this fight all the way. All of our children deserve a chance to succeed. And all of our parents deserve the peace of mind of knowing their hard work created a better future for their children and grandchildren. That is the promise of America, and I’m fighting to make sure we keep that promise. My daddy is gone, but I want to wish him a Happy Father’s Day tomorrow anyway — and to all the fathers and father figures who are trying their hardest to give their children a strong future, setting the example every day of what it means to care for the people you love. Elizabeth | = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

subject: January 6th Is About Criminalizing Dissent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FIREBRAND PAC
body:
# Help Firebrand Fight to Win
[Donate Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bktulht-ihhjkhtyud-r/)
# Watch: How To Talk About January 6th
Americans know exactly why Washington and the corporate press are fixated on manufacturing false narratives about January 6: to delegitimize patriotic dissent, intimidate the public, and unjustly persecute political opposition. This video compels the GOP to fight courageously for our country by pursuing the truth. [](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bktulht-ihhjkhtyud-y/) | **New Episode**
# Criminalizing Dissent
**June 17th **Disturbing evidence shows how government power is being abused under the pretext of January 6th to criminalize dissent and neutralize Democrats' political opposition. The GOP must demonstrate how the January 6th narrative, persecutions, and show trials gravely threaten the rights of all Americans. [Watch Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bktulht-ihhjkhtyud-j/) [Listen on Spotify](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bktulht-ihhjkhtyud-t/) [Apple Podcasts](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bktulht-ihhjkhtyud-i/)
---

# Can We Prove Election Fraud?
**June 16th** Molly discusses the Left's response to "2,00 Mules" and why the MAGA movement should focus its energy on securing the vote in the states. name: Bella
subject: Can you help Tim out?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15435?t=1007&amount=25&akid=4228%2E3611125%2EnRFqAB ]Tim and bella

Hi there! It’s Bella.

As you know, tomorrow is Father’s Day. So I thought it’d be a great idea
to surprise Tim by helping him out with his Senate campaign.

You see, Tim has done A LOT for me recently. He’s helped me with my
college applications (v time consuming!), and even hosted my graduation
party without embarrassing me 😂

So now I want to help him for Father’s Day—but I’ll need your help.

Tim is running for Senate against a super-rich Silicon Valley millionaire
who has a lot of billionaire friends basically paying for his campaign.
Tim—well, he doesn’t have that.

So instead, he’s counting on everyday people like you and me to help him
travel around Ohio and talk to voters across the state. But all of that
travel and outreach is expensive, so I thought it’d be nice (and
necessary) if we all chipped in a few dollars to keep him going.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15435?t=1008&amount=25&akid=4228%2E3611125%2EnRFqAB ]I really just want to give Tim one less thing to worry about on
Father’s Day. So, would you mind helping me out by donating whatever you
can to support his Senate campaign?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15435?t=1009&amount=25&akid=4228%2E3611125%2EnRFqAB ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15435?t=1010&amount=50&akid=4228%2E3611125%2EnRFqAB ]Donate $50

Thanks!

—Bella

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=4228%2E3611125%2EnRFqAB ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

clean_body: [ ]Tim and bella Hi there! It’s Bella. As you know, tomorrow is Father’s Day. So I thought it’d be a great idea to surprise Tim by helping him out with his Senate campaign. You see, Tim has done A LOT for me recently. He’s helped me with my college applications (v time consuming!), and even hosted my graduation party without embarrassing me 😂 So now I want to help him for Father’s Day—but I’ll need your help. Tim is running for Senate against a super-rich Silicon Valley millionaire who has a lot of billionaire friends basically paying for his campaign. Tim—well, he doesn’t have that. So instead, he’s counting on everyday people like you and me to help him travel around Ohio and talk to voters across the state. But all of that travel and outreach is expensive, so I thought it’d be nice (and necessary) if we all chipped in a few dollars to keep him going. [ ]I really just want to give Tim one less thing to worry about on Father’s Day. So, would you mind helping me out by donating whatever you can to support his Senate campaign? [ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $200 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount Thanks! —Bella [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Tina Peters
subject: It's Crunch Time!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Tina Peters
body:
Primaries are June 28th
| | | |
---
---
---
|
# It's Crunch Time!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| With less than two weeks before Coloradans head to vote in the primary, our campaign has done a lot of reflecting. Hard to believe it's only been 4 months since I announced my run for Secretary of State, to upset the status quo and change the course of Colorado by daring to challenge Jena Griswold. It has been a few months with many challenges. It has not been a smooth ride but here we are thanks to the many supporters around the state and the grassroots volunteers that have joined this movement. I would not be the frontrunner without all of your support. Thank you!
Everyone is aware that neither Pam Anderson, a Zuckerberg associate with her long-standing history at CTCL nor our mostly unknown candidate, Mike O'Donnell, who believes Biden won the 2020 election fair and square, has a chance to beat the Soros-funded Jena Griswold. I have stood strong in the face of never-ending attacks and political theater over the last 18 months for doing my job for my Mesa County constituents. I will carry that same commitment if you elect me as your next Secretary of State.
This fight is not about party affiliation, it's about whether an elected official will do what it takes to protect the truth whether it serves them or not. It's about serving "we the people" and not special interests, lobbyists, and non-profits. It's about restoring confidence in our elections so we can be certain that when we vote, it's counted and recorded accurately! I am committed to making this my primary goal as the next Secretary of State of Colorado.
---
---
| Re-electing Jena Griswold would mean our elections would be centralized in Denver, would never be free, fair, or transparent, and not representative of the great people of Colorado. As an America First Candidate, I am willing to stand in the gap along with other patriots across our great nation and work to return to ELECTIONS, NOT SELECTIONS!
I humbly ask you to continue supporting me as I fight for all of Colorado to become your next Secretary of State.
Remember they are coming for you the voter - I am just standing in the way!
To see our latest [press release](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z8KaB_Z-bXZZOOU9EgCmcdBgoNvY474ff7AwKRkjaSEbhly5dRZMmol9GQ3Fi-4ZF4bW9n5hQa7GuaUisal4RmkOO2iWD3BoNMWn-9pCEV457uqW2oAkXBXiF0QOUz95uJjjJQBo9iQ_-pZ-tJhDuzqxiYPuNXTbpnxOuTVPMNXXWP8SMTJb9E4s-LsOVc7twhCL6Yg_GNpIYK_r9PFECDAnj7O7PvjfAEQaCvygN39hhBm-ZVa5Gw==&c=rLhEXaNFnjO79ch8A9T2cisxXQ5l-JQdIHF4g1o3UN4Yfw3K47Re3w==&ch=uPr_5U1ISLg6taBzvqWVD6xku_kFvZlKcNkAy1VcL3hxnStM4uD9zg==), please read [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z8KaB_Z-bXZZOOU9EgCmcdBgoNvY474ff7AwKRkjaSEbhly5dRZMmol9GQ3Fi-4ZF4bW9n5hQa7GuaUisal4RmkOO2iWD3BoNMWn-9pCEV457uqW2oAkXBXiF0QOUz95uJjjJQBo9iQ_-pZ-tJhDuzqxiYPuNXTbpnxOuTVPMNXXWP8SMTJb9E4s-LsOVc7twhCL6Yg_GNpIYK_r9PFECDAnj7O7PvjfAEQaCvygN39hhBm-ZVa5Gw==&c=rLhEXaNFnjO79ch8A9T2cisxXQ5l-JQdIHF4g1o3UN4Yfw3K47Re3w==&ch=uPr_5U1ISLg6taBzvqWVD6xku_kFvZlKcNkAy1VcL3hxnStM4uD9zg==).

body:
We're behind. And if we don't turn things around soon, then we're likely going to miss our fundraising goal for the quarter It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=3efe339317e84cce8790d08feba0df31&_e=vlzPJEnXX-RGZCjmQiG1_NowmVd-rVZdCCfYpd1KHxyxyCCwGGcOMWeUmPDNF_gARKgLXYO281tU6hjw9Dnh6tlSs1OviDhnvih2CN9ha_ovV3BudrHMlwP31EzBw1NRiDzmQEjZRBR2E2UNfFQX-NlS96MLuHdLFcTLy_qOStEmKbAtkzqbR2zuxOLGZ0AM_uj2vpoKzVVQHtgNnzP-tSuW_1zGMB3UheHW-xJxwrDFjkMtP-tpPwOK7c_o5SXLhOzwaa8uO_pGPCG4z3iwir1izp6fClVajsRxhKQVLirAcMXVtD2lYTB8BNC-EJmm4ajrschCm6BHZCZDrCSfJpQZfXRlUUcLlnMoLR2-TS66RuYvWGfWa-wxjXryNErM)
---

Peter,

We’re now past the midpoint of the month which means that the end of the 2nd quarter fundraising period is going to be here in the blink of an eye.

Yesterday the email we sent raised just $1,500 – **in our budget we made the assumption that it would bring in north of $10,000**. So, suffice to say, we need this email to do perform substantially better.

**[Can I lean on you to donate $1 today](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=3efe339317e84cce8790d08feba0df31&_e=vlzPJEnXX-RGZCjmQiG1_NowmVd-rVZdCCfYpd1KHxyxyCCwGGcOMWeUmPDNF_gARKgLXYO281tU6hjw9Dnh6tlSs1OviDhnvih2CN9ha_ovV3BudrHMlwP31EzBw1NRiDzmQEjZRBR2E2UNfFQX-NlS96MLuHdLFcTLy_qOStFCuMFGk9gjjx7V_UuS6MlvlvSpiBkExemDC7zx37AFpUsNPUnhMihRcjFXJ_fglyLBXPR8rcvc_KFkuNX1u2zOTuTPQcWb4aIokq9KplExQBfhmt6B_N0EHgLBbqRVQ0TTFM7bBFahbOllUcco8djTZWhmYYxjb_agrfch3Ni_6jdl0ZXkELIihJk0p9ebNE9ZGwAYfCSQRfgLcQSsXPgC)** given the that we’re mere days away from the June fundraising deadline and Republicans need just 5 seats to flip control of the House in November?

[**RUSH $1 OR MORE TODAY -> **](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=3efe339317e84cce8790d08feba0df31&_e=vlzPJEnXX-RGZCjmQiG1_NowmVd-rVZdCCfYpd1KHxyxyCCwGGcOMWeUmPDNF_gARKgLXYO281tU6hjw9Dnh6tlSs1OviDhnvih2CN9ha_ovV3BudrHMlwP31EzBw1NRiDzmQEjZRBR2E2UNfFQX-NlS96MLuHdLFcTLy_qOStHQzrpvsA-ZGJV84poyNFI4BleRaq47oySmIk9m7rxJLupeF9yso6shxsppJyYSYTGTpWNCMjOqDc0P-NJAnhr3-VtqZ89i4ppJC5bSw2SHt5RHYuLo-CvXW76VXK_2wsjVq5dyYN-MOZWHq9BPTO9s4BpuxdRBH8rtBn-Xp32RCYUZ7WnmGdblvNdCJzkLLrctUzvkXeBFKAwK8HdJ4J-D)

We've got our work cut out for us:
1. Raise $8,000+ from this email campaign
2. Withstand millions in attack ads against us
3. Keep our voters engaged and interested when many think we’ve already won.

**[Your $1 contribution will certainly go a long way](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=3efe339317e84cce8790d08feba0df31&_e=vlzPJEnXX-RGZCjmQiG1_NowmVd-rVZdCCfYpd1KHxyxyCCwGGcOMWeUmPDNF_gARKgLXYO281tU6hjw9Dnh6tlSs1OviDhnvih2CN9ha_ovV3BudrHMlwP31EzBw1NRiDzmQEjZRBR2E2UNfFQX-NlS96MLuHdLFcTLy_qOStFBVBkqO1ABR92fCEUyJy9obH6Igs2iP0xnDXd_f6YkN4P9bYPR6tJJtrGfxYlevNt6d7JySqheIbzm-ZKgfJf7ZAvFCNxK8woUBuwHeLS_-EaybDhZeGet5ktusuv34VXQhQBWjqgqwEUjWuoOYX5pKlsiWRUX6Uy89n6QTQ6Lr9HiNa7gKGQVDg6Ibl14nga4VG6oTd6TplvX5B4zdfzs)** in helping me and my team make sure that after we hit our fundraising goal this quarter, which if accomplished, will help put us into the position of being able to lend other Republicans a helping hand as we work to take back the House.

[**CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT HERE -> **](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=3efe339317e84cce8790d08feba0df31&_e=vlzPJEnXX-RGZCjmQiG1_NowmVd-rVZdCCfYpd1KHxyxyCCwGGcOMWeUmPDNF_gARKgLXYO281tU6hjw9Dnh6tlSs1OviDhnvih2CN9ha_ovV3BudrHMlwP31EzBw1NRiDzmQEjZRBR2E2UNfFQX-NlS96MLuHdLFcTLy_qOStExwR_gsKIL0PDZaYZHWFyYLvwlBEpYrNYlgk9oCitsfXxcsiAZfnJrwpQpqq2hd1FVENcIUrFNBWsSQ7mOybig_xj8EbNYDDfIvNIVRhkSt8wAN4E2JQPUdMpQAGNXt8pFhJ2gQCeH02JtGNYMwvC9hVMmdoX3YDtPBZFEkWYmwL8dmN0azCiXkUdtk07L_WK1xtYpoYpVlU9cQtpzEXLM)

name: Liz Mathis
subject: Reflecting on my Dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
body:
This Father’s Day weekend, I want to share with you a little bit about my Dad, James Rumann.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46691630/351357590/-471267517?refcode=em_fr_2022.06.18_b2_lm_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTBkM2M4Yi02NWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_uSq3RaaMQoUwreHg4Lx1B-beulujlw5FkUZWozqaSk=)
Peter, This Father’s Day weekend, I want to share with you a little bit about my Dad, James Rumann. My father was a WWII veteran and 1929 Great Depression survivor. He sold seed corn and raised our family on a farm in eastern Iowa, teaching us a thing or two about hard work. One of my favorite memories is from 2004 when I was lucky to take my Dad to the WWII Memorial when it first opened. That day he told me things I never knew about his service, about a part of his life that he never talked about. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46691631/351357591/-471267517?refcode=em_fr_2022.06.18_b2_lm_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTBkM2M4Yi02NWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_uSq3RaaMQoUwreHg4Lx1B-beulujlw5FkUZWozqaSk=) When I think about my Dad, I think about the values of fairness, hard work, and of course the service he offered to our nation. These are the same values that drive me every day and that I’ll bring to Congress representing the people of Southeast Iowa. Happy Father’s Day weekend. -Liz P.S. My Dad imparted in me an incredible work ethic, and I’ll put that to use as a champion for Iowa’s farmers, workers, and families. [**If you are able to contribute to help me get there, I would be deeply grateful.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46691632/351357592/-471267517?refcode=em_fr_2022.06.18_b2_lm_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTBkM2M4Yi02NWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_uSq3RaaMQoUwreHg4Lx1B-beulujlw5FkUZWozqaSk=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46691633/351357593/-471267517?refcode=em_fr_2022.06.18_b2_lm_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTBkM2M4Yi02NWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_uSq3RaaMQoUwreHg4Lx1B-beulujlw5FkUZWozqaSk=)

# Sign Petition - Stop Red Flag Gun Control Bill
|
---

|
---
| | | | |
---
## Demand U.S. Senate Kill Gun Control Bill
|
---
Reports of a compromise between democrats and weak, anti-freedom, anti-second amendment republicans are making their way through the media. Here is the list of senators who are traitors of the American people; U.S. Senators Chris Murphy (D-Conn.), John Cornyn (R-Texas), Thom Tillis (R-N.C.), Kyrsten Sinema (D-Ariz.), Richard Blumenthal (D-Conn.), Roy Blunt (R-Mo.), Cory Booker (D- N.J.), Richard Burr (R-N.C.), Bill Cassidy (R-La.), Susan Collins (R-Maine), Chris Coons (D-Del.), Lindsey Graham (R-S.C.), Martin Heinrich (D-N.M.), Mark Kelly (D-Ariz.), Angus King (I-Maine), Joe Manchin (D-W.Va.), Rob Portman (R-Ohio), Mitt Romney (R-Utah), Debbie Stabenow (D-Mich.), and Pat Toomey (R-Pa.) These 10 republican senators have agreed to sell our rights, they have agreed to destroy the second amendment and the fifth amendment of the constitution for a gun control solution that has proven to be ineffective at preventing crime. Part of the agreement includes enticing states to pass "red flag" laws. Here are 5 reasons to oppose the red flag laws: There’s No Evidence Red Flag Laws Reduce Gun Violence
Congress Lacks the Authority to impose on States
Red Flag Laws Violate Due Process
Red Flag Laws Could Lead to More Violence
Red Flag laws attempt to predict crime The democrats and anti-gun republicans must be stopped. It has been reported that Sen. Mitch McConnell has agreed to this compromise language and is willing to support this gun control bill. Please sign the petition alerting Senators Wicker and Hyde-Smith that you expect them to vote NO if this horrible bill comes to a vote. You must also remind them that a vote to give away our gun-rights and to destroy our constitution will be remembered at the next election.

|
---

subject: SIGN ON: Red Flag Law now!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/Derek%20Marshall%20Logo%20-%20Standard%20Stacked%20Lockup%20JTree%20MAIN%20COLOR.png]
UC Davis Research: “California’s ‘Red Flag’ Law Utilized for 58 Threatened Mass Shootings”
Tell Congress: Pass a Nationwide Red Flag Law! [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/tell-the-senate-pass-extreme-risk-protection-order-laws?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220618_01%26noskip%3Dtrue]
California’s “red flag” law is saving lives, temporarily removing access to firearms from at least 58 individuals who had made mass shooting threats.
That’s according to a newly-published study from the University of California at Davis.
Red flag laws allow courts to issue Extreme Risk Protection Orders (ERPOs) to keep those who threaten harm to themselves or others away from deadly firearms.
Derek Marshall is a Democrat running against NRA Republican Rep. Jay Obnernolte, who voted NO on a national red flag law. Can you FIGHT BACK?
Tell Congress: pass a nationwide red flag law now! [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/tell-the-senate-pass-extreme-risk-protection-order-laws?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220618_01%26noskip%3Dtrue]
Red flag laws don’t just stop mass shootings.
80% of ERPOs in California were issued to stop domestic violence. 30% were used to stop suicides.
When family members or law enforcement see warning signs of violence, we need to be empowered to act.
Sign the petition: pass a nationwide red flag law now! [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/tell-the-senate-pass-extreme-risk-protection-order-laws?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220618_01%26noskip%3Dtrue]
Thanks for standing up.
– Marshall for Congress
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pl_derekmarshall?amount=10&refcode=pl_footer]
Meet Derek [www.DerekMarshallCA.com]

P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • (760) 486-2416 [tel:(760) 486-2416]
Twitter [https://twitter.com/derekmarshallca] | Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/DerekMarshallCA] | Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/derekmarshallca]

body:
It's more clear that ever Ronny Jackson is unfit for office | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=8ca66a2865&e=4712f71bea)

| **Ronny Jackson is radical, dangerous, and unfit for office.**

Our nation was attacked on January 6th and Ronny Jackson was an active participant.

Now, after aiding and abetting an attempted coup, Ronny Jackson is making the ludicrous claim that the January 6th hearings are a “joke” and “witch hunt.”

[**Will you chip in $25 today so I can defeat Ronny Jackson and uphold the sanctity of our nation?**](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=7458083a2f&e=4712f71bea)

---
| Our democracy is the most important thing we have.

Right now, it’s at stake.

We must hold Ronny Jackson and the other January 6th insurrections accountable for their unthinkable actions.

[**I need you to help me hold Ronny Jackson accountable and shine a spotlight on his appalling actions by donating to my campaign. Will you contribute to my campaign today?**](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=5b15c57e27&e=4712f71bea)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards?=
subject: We need your help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
Let's Represent! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7085548225cb/lets-talk-about-it-7271205?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=8a987d198c&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear Friend,

In a recent [article](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=55283ee9ac&e=10c1db3257), I said, “Americans do not take pride in seeing political grandstanding and obstructionist antics. They care about **finding an affordable home** in a safe neighborhood. They care about the **safety of the schools** their children attend and whether or not they can access **affordable health care**. And they want to know that the solutions to these challenges will **not threaten the fiscal stability** of the federal government.”

**Are these things that matter to you?**

My campaign team is ready to roll out a big push to let voters know I will best represent them. However, we are shy of hitting our financial goal for this week and can’t make this happen without your financial help.

**I am humbling asking for you to contribute today!**
---
|
---
|
---
| [DONATE $22](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=10b97760b6&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE $22")
---
| | [DONATE $122](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=36c5cbc119&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE $122")
---
| [DONATE $222](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=f0ca2db82d&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE $222")
---
| As you enjoy a great Father’s Day weekend, I invite you to **join me in this historic campaign. Please share my message** and let people know, with their vote, Utah will be well represented in the U.S. Senate!

Thank you so much!
---
|

Hey – just got some more details about the NDRC’s 2022 Democracy Targets. Here’s the criteria that A.G. Holder and the team used to choose our initial targets: ➞ Races that will be important to redistricting.
➞ Races where we can reelect fair maps champions.
➞ Races where we can hold Republicans accountable for gerrymandering.
➞ Races that are critical to defending democracy. Before I go further, **can you make a quick donation to help us invest in our target races and fair maps efforts?[_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndrc-helpwinkey_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46691693/351371464/792749532?amount=20&refcode=20220616.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxMTA1NDIwLTZiZWYtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KhD1DBYwDif9SuVGiF_qqlRnsesPzPp6y0kCe8NMljI=)**

Okay, let’s break it down. ➞ **Races that will be important to redistricting.** This is especially critical now that we know the GOP plans to use elections to jeopardize the independence of state supreme courts.

➞ **Races where we can help reelect fair maps champions.** We need to support officials who have fought against Republican gerrymanders, like the governors of Kansas and Wisconsin.

➞ **Races where we can hold Republicans accountable for gerrymandering.** Texas and Florida are two states where we can do this.

➞ **Races that are critical to defending democracy.** Trump’s allies in the GOP are openly plotting to undermine democracy and even overturn election results. Winning key races in states like Georgia, Pennsylvania, and Arizona will be essential to stopping them! Does this sound like an effort you want to be a part of? Then we need you now, team. The more funds we can raise, the more we can invest in these target races and all our fair maps and democracy-saving work. **Will you rush an immediate donation to help us continue fighting to _end gerrymandering and save democracy_? clean_body: just got some more details about the NDRC’s 2022 electoral targets Hey – just got some more details about the NDRC’s 2022 Democracy Targets. Here’s the criteria that A.G. Holder and the team used to choose our initial targets: ➞ Races that will be important to redistricting. ➞ Races where we can reelect fair maps champions. ➞ Races where we can hold Republicans accountable for gerrymandering. ➞ Races that are critical to defending democracy. Before I go further, can you make a quick donation to help us invest in our target races and fair maps efforts?= Okay, let’s break it down. ➞ Races that will be important to redistricting. This is especially critical now that we know the GOP plans to use elections to jeopardize the independence of state supreme courts. ➞ Races where we can help reelect fair maps champions. We need to support officials who have fought against Republican gerrymanders, like the governors of Kansas and Wisconsin. ➞ Races where we can hold Republicans accountable for gerrymandering. Texas and Florida are two states where we can do this. ➞ Races that are critical to defending democracy. Trump’s allies in the GOP are openly plotting to undermine democracy and even overturn election results. Winning key races in states like Georgia, Pennsylvania, and Arizona will be essential to stopping them! Does this sound like an effort you want to be a part of? Then we need you now, team. The more funds we can raise, the more we can invest in these target races and all our fair maps and democracy-saving work. Will you rush an immediate donation to help us continue fighting to end gerrymandering and save democracy? = – Ben | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Demings, Val
subject: still short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
last few hours
| |
---
I'm sorry to crowd your inbox, friend, but I wouldn't bump my last message if it weren't critical to defeating Marco Rubio.
My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations over the last few hours, my campaign is still short of our upcoming midnight fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short.
While national Republicans are funneling _upward of $10 million _into this race _ _ to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on our plans to reach more voters. **I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly:**
[**Please, rush $5, $25 or whatever you can spare to close my fundraising gap. Every dollar will help this people-powered team defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46691704/351371585/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3581-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDEwNTQyMC02YmVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=99vMuFipglSHritG6jUK1f8jDY8pAsnIqDPGrltvJj4=)

**Friend, I am hours away from my midnight deadline, and I'm still short of my can't-miss midnight goal. My race in Florida is the most likely to determine Senate control, so I cannot fall behind on resources. Please, take a look at your supporter record:**
| | **SUPPORTER RECORD**
---
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
DONOR STATUS: **PENDING**
SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $5
DEADLINE: 11:59 p.m.
---
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46691707/351371588/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3581-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDEwNTQyMC02YmVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=99vMuFipglSHritG6jUK1f8jDY8pAsnIqDPGrltvJj4=)

The timing – and the sheer consequences _–_ of falling short right now couldn't be more serious. I don't say that lightly. Polling has me down _ _ a few points __ behind Marco Rubio, just as he and the GOP hauled in millions to dismantle our Senate majority.

**If I don't have the resources to narrow this polling gap, we could hand Senate control straight back to Mitch McConnell.**

We joined Status Coup and Briahna Joy Gray this week to share some reflections on our race, and the path forward for the progressive movement. | | |
---
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78ORT8Pt3SALA3pMGVDypeKbyy2kgsjsCmnmy8k7FgsqB6wuCJ9K2SYervuUQSBWz0Ow4RaxiGVvqPNPMoG2M3fDPCnIS-H6Pidyr9H-hweUtNH8pfJPnbczJqHlY2f0CJ9eGai0vp04NiCsy33lbiokAqgFSLj2SgA4dA5kNGjlLmVkiygFzV4xZZTqQapICy0hq1OIAGb8KJThwx4VSG5Bgx4FIZYcKdQAAp_KfrAyRgecE6xOb1bT86gknzyeb2yYsyUmCDlNRvXhYsoGdiba0/3n0/Mk8wymBwTHO7wPfSUFbrQA/h0/ej3882tZOci-JOFwiN8EIoeYJrM4loVHr-DUXnmRZiU)
| | Dear Peter, We learned yesterday that the San Francisco Board of Elections apparently won’t certify the results of last week’s election [until July 15](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/XlxiKm-amnZREMhISCI1HQ9J5K8vudKV7Ysq9JxeDwJ086n1zyg3sLHlVuf6F3MOXTHYJiI4O2Iy3v2fmDRVjqtef6cnHpyC0f8MIxYmzFjtt9dpbpFXe3f7sfXwuTCeGIMmx7B8aUfGzi9C7_VBXmo9Xs1gU38KBvovi7kSMmXJt6y7nu0lNVzfXaWJzOMRTQdqcKt_2OEWPByGst94-_4MKU-EQyNgtcDsD7LWIIYYdUjn_6ztikAQlrXAnbR01LHvBtiCiN6jLZu6zEG5U5uV4t7j5ybP0cW-iUyqXLM/3n0/Mk8wymBwTHO7wPfSUFbrQA/h1/-zT0Aen6AFVnk9bqfvJ-n_lJdwR0Krp74HfPVANtiqM). Its latest count shows us 580 votes out of the second place finish that would place us in the general election. [**Are you able to support our work holding Pelosi accountable while we await the final results?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MIviGiWPOXTuHIcGP-Mt3FmoxHofie5MT6VFvBW9fl0S3wGVbCQOSCraMPIvhAR5PyMWRrDlaqHLTP-q0bpZveVmJ1bkOoBGT1r_veUPUpgCsXU51C3nT5iWYe29eN4xLXz0fiZSp-sf5Gxq-fh-_vZGH3lRWItrkOR2T84B63Qwcu_tZYFVAOdYnJzfhA9KsOIQvnw1XzAPUfshfozqw9Bc5oyfwBMZgOe7D0WkdNh9RBqX1l_UA9HaYazmwvTfqs/3n0/Mk8wymBwTHO7wPfSUFbrQA/h2/4QMLMBaPDiINbnRnDV1Wx6hPzYdvWOfNPNMAY-iFmZg) Yesterday, I joined Steve Grumbine with Status Coup for an hour-long interview. We discussed the role of labor unions in entrenching corporate politicians, the character assassination strategy on which Pelosi relied to secure her re-election in 2020, and the particular figures in San Francisco politics who enabled it. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOJPR4Z5lDybbWIPhQSOR8F9XMraYUhMBTsAwwp2UAzizeveYVGlh61FhFXDeNGPML7iJU8oG4ByP1luS0lf3w5YW7cs8QFbeZRlkS6dH6wDFaLAnjhAGqJavlzsDbBgoSNMnpHIm2kxhLhFTWfbhtInPwnw2fskz49mKrtCEPijLa4-e5d7rX2OH1m2cNoMQL4kQIEEIurufO_RcJASMf1X6ZnPVUqGjhB0BvsmSvBsG9223ltIw1e_iktylD4uGg/3n0/Mk8wymBwTHO7wPfSUFbrQA/h3/tIA_ryMvAMoMX_Z-t5bpeInFeYtt1_EftUZHl3zV00A) [**Can you contribute today to enable our efforts to continue informing the public conversation about issues that corporate news media overlook?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MIviGiWPOXTuHIcGP-Mt3FmoxHofie5MT6VFvBW9fl0S19HW5WuU1dwk_KGGqGGVMuHQ54kvPh_CvFoUWTLRNyuvH4364rzzw95dXZMAIhvwnIku_ehLRWlsfNuHueucEVeKwvWGnrauTFRzfMzXw5GGKVxrSAtrJwU2sdu4vMqEFGxQnbHKnWxg2Qh8hn4wjE8yXJ28SSnkSvhvj9KqG4eAfGbdmCof7cyYjPjwREEdQbxteljm5aWlKD_5vH9hp8/3n0/Mk8wymBwTHO7wPfSUFbrQA/h4/wkKrrI-jn99dSY0efUgZQJEGICrfACtFWWdOTExh1g0) I also shared a memorable half hour with Briahna Joy Gray on her Callin show. We discussed the pattern of infighting among voices on the Left, the death threat that drove me to leave town for a hiking trip earlier this week, and the disappointing tendency of many so-called “progressive” organizations to support their stated principles only when politically convenient. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDLzTskFacKG55Mdrn7IuCoX-bckTCrvW2TbLkO2_xTZy4binl1FNGU-ZdGjXHcCrL4cHru4Y7fzkRm3klg0zDRnKTlIU7bLDWEeCgfCeDtCai7tlgXO_H1iGR5vKMa6xxLOrBjMqnZSOTo34oyhxRkIb6nCVDBXG8rlssrQb3gevma1KAeMitWeyN54aX7QsBj6JdlL6jssxblGAqXh9lIQOjWEVUIml75ofZkEQSyvkwYm8GcifFwrwfr1s_BlReF6i-KyxkZXze8NAU5owPFM6Oe6F2vS-zzflbr8Uf98aTzpgHKXja6TenSx7PVuywg/3n0/Mk8wymBwTHO7wPfSUFbrQA/h5/aMOmKRbvczf_-KnEtK-ufoOkSoAUaXC1Kiu9Eybrn1Y) My discussion with Briahna touched on several opportunities for the movement going forward. We discussed the need to democratize labor unions from within, and explored alternative models of community organizing. We also shared a laugh about the bizarre fixation of so many critics with my hair, of all things. Briahna also shared her views of our race, and the opportunity that it offered the national movement. Her feedback on my voice was so remarkably generous that she brought me to tears—not once, but twice. She noted during our discussion that:
> “You’re so smart, you’re so informed, you have such a wide basis of knowledge to draw from. To me, you were like the ‘super fighter.’ You were our best....You’re someone who I’d send into battle very confidently....You were like an accountability bomb...”
The need to force accountability on the bipartisan corruption in Washington is exactly what drove me to run up the steepest hill in politics. Ironically, our historic success in climbing that hill is also what inspired racist smears by local Democrats loyal to Pelosi's party machine, and unethical journalists who continue to silence whistleblowers and suppress evidence to support their self-serving lies. [**Can you contribute today to help us continue holding a corrupt system accountable? We’re committed to challenging corruption wherever we find it, and to seeing every vote counted. We invite you to stand with us!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MIviGiWPOXTuHIcGP-Mt3FmoxHofie5MT6VFvBW9fl0SzVitqcrDBBnNDohNkCiJNy0n2Saepx6iIxUxdDBOcr-ETGAKChPkWkiMO7O4ZUOhOE5S4XagcK9qa59QvsVSR1S_sc-J7AXS205c5M9NJNUCLbu_erpIqgP5-Ya_d2wteR0ow_2n-qqVQVbKWh17ru9bZ5Aif9c-8Eua6O559domByIcCQF5yRqXM2mRix5dUJJIZD4MS-X2uo6g8yt2QE/3n0/Mk8wymBwTHO7wPfSUFbrQA/h6/OQxURxMQcmy6cjdYGscCQrj3S-MgpvmzzUpJNkqQt2g) I’m grateful for the chance to share analysis and insights, and also for your support. Ultimately, we—not only those of us here now, but future generations who aren't yet here to defend themselves—are all in this together. Your voice,
Shahid PS -- If you learned anything from either of these interviews, please share them with friends who share our concerns! Given the profound and continuing hostility of weaponized journalists promoting disinformation in the service of Pelosi's corruption, your help informing voters about the issues can make a big difference. |

clean_body: We joined Status Coup and Briahna Joy Gray this week to share some reflections on our race, and the path forward for the progressive movement. | | | | | Dear Peter, We learned yesterday that the San Francisco Board of Elections apparently won’t certify the results of last week’s election . Its latest count shows us 580 votes out of the second place finish that would place us in the general election. Yesterday, I joined Steve Grumbine with Status Coup for an hour-long interview. We discussed the role of labor unions in entrenching corporate politicians, the character assassination strategy on which Pelosi relied to secure her re-election in 2020, and the particular figures in San Francisco politics who enabled it. I also shared a memorable half hour with Briahna Joy Gray on her Callin show. We discussed the pattern of infighting among voices on the Left, the death threat that drove me to leave town for a hiking trip earlier this week, and the disappointing tendency of many so-called “progressive” organizations to support their stated principles only when politically convenient. My discussion with Briahna touched on several opportunities for the movement going forward. We discussed the need to democratize labor unions from within, and explored alternative models of community organizing. We also shared a laugh about the bizarre fixation of so many critics with my hair, of all things. Briahna also shared her views of our race, and the opportunity that it offered the national movement. Her feedback on my voice was so remarkably generous that she brought me to tears—not once, but twice. She noted during our discussion that: “You’re so smart, you’re so informed, you have such a wide basis of knowledge to draw from. To me, you were like the ‘super fighter.’ You were our best....You’re someone who I’d send into battle very confidently....You were like an accountability bomb...” The need to force accountability on the bipartisan corruption in Washington is exactly what drove me to run up the steepest hill in politics. Ironically, our historic success in climbing that hill is also what inspired racist smears by local Democrats loyal to Pelosi's party machine, and unethical journalists who continue to silence whistleblowers and suppress evidence to support their self-serving lies. I’m grateful for the chance to share analysis and insights, and also for your support. Ultimately, we—not only those of us here now, but future generations who aren't yet here to defend themselves—are all in this together. Your voice, Shahid PS -- If you learned anything from either of these interviews, please share them with friends who share our concerns! Given the profound and continuing hostility of weaponized journalists promoting disinformation in the service of Pelosi's corruption, your help informing voters about the issues can make a big difference. | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via .
