name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: voters from all 159 counties
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek, did you
know that Georgia has the second-most counties in the nation? From Appling
to Worth, there are 159 counties in the Peach State.

We need to earn votes in each and every one of these counties if Stacey
Abrams is going to be the next governor of Georgia. That’s why we aren’t
writing a single one of these counties off.

Our campaign is focused on bringing together Georgians who Brian Kemp and
too many other politicians have left out and left behind. We’re traveling
everywhere in the state to ask everyone how we can earn their votes.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1456?refcode=sa_em_220618_B2_County_S1_T1_COM_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1006&akid=676%2E1862389%2EsvkyLH ]Can you make sure we have the resources to get our message out to every
single one of our 159 counties in Georgia? Make your
first contribution to
our campaign today >>

There are right around 5,134 registered voters in Taylor County
alone, Derek.
You’d be surprised how few of those 5,134 voters ever see a politician or
even get a call. In places like Taylor County, where our leaders haven’t
bothered to even compete for votes, showing up and making folks feel seen
is key to representing them.

But we can’t just reach out to voters one time. It takes repeated,
persistent organizing to earn Georgians’ support and make sure they turn
out to the ballot box. We have to talk to voters in Taylor and each of the
other 158 counties if we’re going to bring together a winning coalition.

No matter their zip code, county or background, Georgians deserve the
chance to not just survive but to thrive — but right now, there are too
many barriers in their way.

From hospitals closing in rural areas and our suburbs to voting rights
being stripped away, from a lack of economic mobility to rising gun
violence, Georgians in every single county face countless obstacles to
success. Worse, Brian Kemp has either let those obstacles stand or put new
stumbling blocks in place himself.

That’s why Stacey is fighting to build One Georgia, where opportunity,
safety and success are not determined by zip code, background or access to
power.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1456?refcode=sa_em_220618_B2_County_S1_T1_COM_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1007&akid=676%2E1862389%2EsvkyLH ]We are getting Stacey’s positive message out in person, on TV, online
and anywhere that we can. Can you chip in $5 to help us
reach voters in places like Taylor County?

Thank you for your support,

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1455?refcode=sa_em_220618_B2_County_S1_T1_COM_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1008&akid=676%2E1862389%2EsvkyLH ]StaceyAbrams.com

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=676%2E1862389%2EsvkyLH ]receive fewer emails or

http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=676%2E1862389%2EsvkyLH

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Kaspar?=
subject: Remember to Vote for Scott on or before June 28th!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KASPAR FOR CONGRESS**
body:
Get the information you need to participate in Early Voting | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kasparforcongress/kaspar-john-anthony-task-force-9257126?e=9931950ab1)
---
| | |
---
|
---
|
# Early voting underway!

Early voting began Monday for the June 28th GOP Primary in Cook and DuPage Counties. Here's your opportunity to choose the candidate that will make the 6th Congressional District a Republican one.

We have a genuine opportunity to send a message throughout Illinois and Washington, DC that Americans are fed up with the Biden Democrat agenda. We have a real chance to win back Congress for Republicans and send Nancy Pelosi packing!

I'm asking for your vote in the 6th Congressional District Primary.

I'm an engineer, lawyer, father and husband who is worried the American Dream is fading away. [I've had the opportunity to experience that dream](https://kasparforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4e283db73c0929a02145e8702&id=23b20e23fa&e=9931950ab1). [My father came to this country from the then Communist country of Latvia just after WWII](https://kasparforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4e283db73c0929a02145e8702&id=4c663ac594&e=9931950ab1). He settled here in the Chicago area and married my mother a fourth generation native of Chicago from Beverly here in the district. Together, they taught me and my siblings about the values that make for success in this country. And we as a family are concerned our American success could be at risk.

[We've set up a webpage](https://kasparforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4e283db73c0929a02145e8702&id=8e9ab51256&e=9931950ab1) you can use to get the information you need to help you vote now during the Early Voting period and on Election Day.

I'm ready to serve on day one in Washington. It is my pledge to you follow the Constitution when I go to Washington--not the politicians. I supported President Trump from the beginning because he believes in the greatness of America. And I'll support that agenda as well if you give me the honor of representing you.

I thank you in advance for your support at the June 28, 2022 primary election.
### You can contribute to Kaspar for Congress by clicking [here](https://kasparforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4e283db73c0929a02145e8702&id=4ff8873b6c&e=9931950ab1).

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Red State Senator votes with Biden 96% of the time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
California already has two senators pushing their far-left agenda, so they don’t need a third. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=63e4e087af4c4dc4b501e13cbc013437&_e=JsL2brNQgsqRV3v1W6WRXiTplvXu0rcOfBmHZF2lmq7_x4sKWD6xu3DKRYheOgcnL-20f_wVcrk9i75Aa7n_ynGGWe6skxso6Bke6yPJCua_hMLyxLwBstYwcT-geBaF90gIoX-4EEQLBL6GOAlOD4pPrLMMVDA1sDuSHPWRbBdtOpjKZ5MwnsynAFDwgMLAClSZ8dZ23mqQDvgIpwRmxYOO9i-h6-deHrW91E9eniSuPjztJtS0ChUFQ_Wrzo68fldmybdNxmvSKRMXbELV5JgE68iOUV0A_lc1uhOwmhP1s1l9VicOPPEMKuzsRt3iSDVmrCMuWGaTKvdArqRYZi8alYOQrGWx2HV2TV3DyqlRamSkSKvqYOB68l4zv5uJ15NR38leS6XdJXC1CVnAKuvqLYzQ5MusYk-gi2pZ3CWEhYFHTZ1q1B9rHydzuZ9DUmh8OueM4_nNn_kYkqDo9mfkmiZKnW1pdahWQtkBEPliT_KPeD2mejisK6fleGtIIfAj-5q8lqxjHErOrnwWsg%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock claims he represents Georgia, but all you have to do is look at his voting record and donor list to see who he really represents... far-left states like California.

Not only does Senator Warnock vote with Joe Biden 96% of the time, **but he votes with California Senator Dianne Feinstein 99% of the time. That's 99%!**

name: Penny Ronning for Congress
subject: Reminder: How You Can Help Communities Impacted by Floods
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Penny Ronning for U
body:
The Power of Community
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ajBhfi7eVSY7gx-tOza7lrekRN66t8YBSN3kS62pvw1-5x3-EYW89AaVmjjRTH12GXEn9Y7s1qyNWpe72AtqWzbixsp6pWEzTsbpFiP97t1siFjg_-EfUhzFXFMUrPLaeJQiZao5m-EHZcaINcplOw==&c=_u1rGw_Yk4TnxUJRyy6jm1PztzQcQXmggTmgvF81yM0Dwuq-wyrOMQ==&ch=cAnyfaCe-TX_25q85IAzYhzpm7V2xv1ZnF_dxblsj43cqQv4KJMCCA==)
---
| The Power of Nature and the Power of Community.
---
|
---
| |
---|---
|
Dear Peter,

This week, South Central Montana experienced devastating floods and the rivers are still high. At yesterday's public briefing for the residents of Red Lodge, Penny learned that four bridges were lost within two hours in Red Lodge alone. Through videos and news reports, we've all seen the devastation from Yellowstone National Park to Red Lodge, East Rosebud to Fromberg, Roscoe to Billings, and more.

We have also seen the power of community.

People helping people and caring for one another.

If you would like to help communities and people impacted by what is being called the 500-year flood, you can do so by donating to the local animal shelters, non-profit organizations, and municipal governments of the impacted communities.

You can also donate to the following organizations that are helping families in all of the flooded areas:

[The American Red Cross of Montana](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ajBhfi7eVSY7gx-tOza7lrekRN66t8YBSN3kS62pvw1-5x3-EYW89PlEOxaRuGuuYaEo3tzo4TOwIVPnQYKpwLHnGQfUpwcH7lJoxBhky8rGlAR04ii0X1zLqcgZxcQADI2p084vu3JtToIVEw2r4vBBgSpz37VumsGM8Ae3fNA=&c=_u1rGw_Yk4TnxUJRyy6jm1PztzQcQXmggTmgvF81yM0Dwuq-wyrOMQ==&ch=cAnyfaCe-TX_25q85IAzYhzpm7V2xv1ZnF_dxblsj43cqQv4KJMCCA==)

[Montana Food Bank Network](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ajBhfi7eVSY7gx-tOza7lrekRN66t8YBSN3kS62pvw1-5x3-EYW89PlEOxaRuGuujRZj-0pAFZFowccaGJDl6HVUgi4wSFljPoUoTTY58XsVq8mJNZ-ScpyQavAgAVjWB8rdwztWn9M=&c=_u1rGw_Yk4TnxUJRyy6jm1PztzQcQXmggTmgvF81yM0Dwuq-wyrOMQ==&ch=cAnyfaCe-TX_25q85IAzYhzpm7V2xv1ZnF_dxblsj43cqQv4KJMCCA==)

[Billings Family Service](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ajBhfi7eVSY7gx-tOza7lrekRN66t8YBSN3kS62pvw1-5x3-EYW89PlEOxaRuGuuWktFlmgFstzCenb1Q1RCNAkrJMj7qJlEpyd_F5SqZhxNx1mb2FvBYf7J_wHcCuYge-5KNxz3Muax8YRolROq7BvPuKESg-Ev&c=_u1rGw_Yk4TnxUJRyy6jm1PztzQcQXmggTmgvF81yM0Dwuq-wyrOMQ==&ch=cAnyfaCe-TX_25q85IAzYhzpm7V2xv1ZnF_dxblsj43cqQv4KJMCCA==)
Thank you for your continued prayers and action to help those in need.

clean_body: The Power of Community | | | | == | The Power of Nature and the Power of Community. | | | ---|--- | Dear Peter, This week, South Central Montana experienced devastating floods and the rivers are still high. At yesterday's public briefing for the residents of Red Lodge, Penny learned that four bridges were lost within two hours in Red Lodge alone. Through videos and news reports, we've all seen the devastation from Yellowstone National Park to Red Lodge, East Rosebud to Fromberg, Roscoe to Billings, and more. We have also seen the power of community. People helping people and caring for one another. If you would like to help communities and people impacted by what is being called the 500-year flood, you can do so by donating to the local animal shelters, non-profit organizations, and municipal governments of the impacted communities. You can also donate to the following organizations that are helping families in all of the flooded areas: == == == Thank you for your continued prayers and action to help those in need. | | | | We invite you to donate to Penny's campaign. You can donate online here or by sending a check to: Penny Ronning for U.S. Congress PO Box 22445 Billings, MT 59104 | | == | == to the campaign are exactly that - to the campaign! We have an amazing team working hard every day and we invite you to join in support of People Over Politics! Representation matters and it's time to put a results driven leader in Congress for all Montanans. | | | Looking for a way to volunteer? Join us in Billings for our weekly campaign volunteer hours! body:
| Peter,

**Before Biden** , gas was $2.39 a gallon, inflation was a low 1.4%, the markets were heading towards record gains...

All because President Trump was leading the great American comeback.

**_Now with Biden in the White House_** , gas is over $5 a gallon, inflation is 8.6%...a 41 year high, and the S&P 500, the Dow, and Nasdaq are lower than when Joe Biden was sworn in as president.

In just two short years, Biden and his radical Left-wing pals have crushed our economy.

BEFORE you do anything else today, we need your immediate support to **restore Republican control of the United States Senate** THIS November. After you give, we'll add you to our exclusive Reclaim America roster for future in-the-know updates and coverage.

It's the ONLY way we can save our country from the incompetence led by Biden and the woke radicals in the White House.

We are specifically reaching out to you before anyone else because **_you're one of the key America First patriots_** and we believe you are ready to take a stand and do every last thing to beat the Left this November.

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: This should absolutely be banned right now

body:
Do you agree?| | | Hi there, Corporations should not be allowed to own residential real estate. This is one reason the housing market is out of control right now. My national housing plan includes millions of units of social housing, nationwide rent caps like we had under FDR, and community land trusts that put real estate into local community control instead of out-of-town corporations who have no stake in the community. [**Can you donate here right now to help me fight for housing in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46691864/351378308/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzA0YjA5My03ZWVmLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MQVM8tmMAJ_os9s-L2zlgAP_wU4MaTA5ZPdSMfx0iaE=) No one should spend more than one-third of their income on housing, and people who want to become homeowners should be able to. It’s time to reclaim our housing from corporations and Wall Street. Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411
